title: Emergent Relational Order in LLM Agent Societies: From Collective Affect to Authority Stratification
comment: Accepted to Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics: ACL 2026. 37 pages
summary: Fei Xiaotong's Differential Order Pattern characterizes rural society as egocentric and relationally graded, with cooperation attenuating over social distance. Although often treated as culturally specific, its mechanistic basis remains under-operationalized, and prior LLM-based simulations have mainly addressed short-term coordination rather than long-horizon social structure. We propose CAREB-MAS, a multi-agent framework grounded in Affect Control Theory, Social Identity Theory, and Durkheimian collective affect. Agents reason through an emotion-ethics-belief chain and maintain dynamically evolving egocentric identities, while the macro environment specifies only individual production, preference-based allocation, and minimal interaction protocols. Across long-horizon simulations, agents spontaneously reproduce five core Differential Order phenomena: stable labor specialization, guanxi-based economic ethics, relational decay of cooperation, emergent relational authority, and clan-based center-periphery stratification. These patterns shift with production structure from kin-centered integration toward greater functional interdependence. Extensive experiment results support interpreting Differential Order as a structure-sensitive emergent outcome of general social mechanisms, with LLM-based multi-agent simulation providing an interdisciplinary framework for studying social structure and change.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CAREB-MAS多智能体框架，将费孝通的"差序格局"理论进行机制化操作化，通过LLM模拟长周期社会结构演化。
AI.motivation: 现有研究将差序格局视为文化特定概念，缺乏机制化基础；此前LLM模拟主要解决短期协调问题而非长期社会结构演化。
AI.method: 框架整合情感控制理论、社会认同理论和涂尔干集体情感，Agents通过情感-伦理-信念链推理，维持动态自我中心身份，宏观环境仅指定个体生产、偏好分配和最小交互协议。
AI.result: Agents自发再现五种差序格局核心现象：稳定劳动分工、关系型经济伦理、合作的关系衰减、涌现的关系权威、宗族为中心-边缘的层级分化；这些模式随生产结构从亲属中心整合转向更大功能依赖。
AI.conclusion: 差序格局可解释为结构敏感的一般社会机制涌现结果，LLM多智能体模拟为研究社会结构与变迁提供跨学科框架。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about LLM-based multi-agent social simulation using Fei Xiaotong's sociological theory - it has nothing to do with Computer Graphics, 3D Human Motion Generation, Text-to-Motion, video-to-motion extraction, or any visual/motion synthesis methods. Even though both involve LLMs, the application domains are entirely different: this is social science/sociology research while the profile is computer graphics motion generation.

title: Decentralized Coordination of Autonomous Traffic Through Advanced Air Mobility Corridors
comment: Presented at the AIAA SciTech 2026 Forum
summary:
The use of dedicated corridors for Advanced Air Mobility (AAM) traffic is one of the most commonly proposed pathways to integrating them into existing airspace operations. Most prior research has focused on the design of networks of AAM corridors and conflict resolution for aircraft within corridors. It is also generally believed that while attractive from an implementation perspective, corridor-based operations may be inefficient, especially in the absence of centralized traffic management.
  In this paper, we show that contrary to this belief, it is possible for autonomous aircraft to learn to self-organize into corridor flows in decentralized settings. We illustrate our approach using scenarios in which fixed-wing aircraft need to safely and efficiently traverse (1) a single corridor with metering after the exit, (2) a sequence of two consecutive corridors, and (3) a corridor that splits into two. We find that in decentralized settings with only local information, the aircraft are able to conform to the corridor boundaries more than 94% of the time and reach their goal in a relatively efficient manner. Furthermore, tactical interventions to handle violations of the separation minimum are needed only infrequently in low- and medium-density settings. However, such tactical interventions become more frequently necessary only when traffic density is high.

AI.tldr: 本研究展示了在分散式设置下，自主飞机能够通过学习自我组织成AAM走廊流动，颠覆了走廊运营效率低下的传统观念。实验涵盖三种场景，结果显示飞机能以94%以上的遵守率安全通过走廊。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为，基于走廊的AAM运营虽然实现简单但效率较低，尤其是缺乏集中式交通管理时。作者试图证明这一观点是错误的，探索自主飞行器在仅使用本地信息的分散式环境下自我组织成走廊流动的可行性。
AI.method: 研究采用强化学习方法，让固定翼飞行器在三种场景中学习自我组织：(1)带出口计量的单走廊；(2)两个连续走廊；(3)分叉走廊。飞机仅获取本地信息，在分散式设置下进行训练和测试。
AI.result: 飞机能以超过94%的遵守率conform to corridor boundaries，在低密度和中等密度设置下仅需偶尔进行战术干预处理违反分离最小值的情况；但在高密度交通下，战术干预变得更频繁必要。
AI.conclusion: 分散式设置下，自主飞行器可以有效学习并遵守AAM走廊限制，为AAM融入现有空域运营提供了一种可行方案，颠覆了走廊运营效率低下的传统观念。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about autonomous aerial vehicle traffic coordination using reinforcement learning in Advanced Air Mobility corridors - an air traffic control problem. The research profile is about Computer Graphics - specifically text-to-motion in 3D human motion generation using diffusion models, VLM, and video generation. These are entirely different application domains: autonomous vehicle coordination vs. human motion synthesis. The methods are also different (RL vs. diffusion). No relevance to text-to-motion, 3D human motion generation, or any computer graphics application.

title: Generating Realistic Individual Activity Schedules via Activity Location Allocation Based on Simulated Travel Times
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures. This is the author version of a short paper accepted for presentation in the poster session at the 17th Conference on Spatial Information Theory (COSIT 2026)
summary: Individual level daily activity schedules are essential for a wide range of applications, including infectious disease control, urban transportation planning, and policy design. In practice, such schedules are typically generated by combining population data with travel survey data. These data sources are used because they are often publicly available, whereas observed individual activity schedules are difficult to obtain due to privacy concerns. However, because of the complexity of mobility modelling, it is difficult to generate realistic activity schedules that also preserve travel times consistent with those reported in travel surveys. To address this issue, we propose a framework for generating activity schedules that iteratively applies a dynamic programming method to allocate activity locations based on simulated travel times. Numerical experiments with dummy data show that the proposed method reduces the discrepancy between simulated travel times and those reported in travel surveys by 52.2% relative to the first iteration through iterative refinement.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于动态规划迭代优化的活动日程生成框架，用于解决隐私约束下个体日常活动行程难以获取的问题，并确保模拟出行时间与调查数据一致。
AI.motivation: 由于实际观测的个体活动日程因隐私问题难以获取，现有研究通常依赖人口数据和出行调查数据结合生成活动日程。然而，现有方法难以生成既真实又保持与调查数据出行时间一致性的活动日程。
AI.method: 提出了一种迭代动态规划框架，根据模拟出行时间分配活动地点，并通过迭代优化减少模拟出行时间与调查报告中出行时间的差异。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，与第一次迭代相比，该方法将模拟出行时间与调查出行时间之间的差异减少了52.2%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够有效生成保持出行时间一致性的个体活动日程，为传染病防控、城市交通规划等应用提供了可行数据支持。

relevance_reason: This paper is about activity schedule generation for transportation/urban planning using dynamic programming optimization. It is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. The paper addresses travel time simulation and activity location allocation, not 3D human motion generation, video generation, visual language models, or any of the methods mentioned in the research profile. The application domain is entirely different (transportation planning vs. computer graphics/motion synthesis).

title: Critique of Agent Model
summary: What is an agent? What constitutes agency? With the rise of Large Language Model (LLM) systems marketed as ``coding agents'', ``AI co-scientists'', and other ``agentic" tools that promise to drive up productivity, and at the same time, ``existential" concerns such as AI escaping human control with destructive power under a speculative ``machine agency" against humans, it has become essential to clarify where automation ends and agency begins, both for building capable systems and for understanding whether and what to fear. Drawing on Descartes' grounding of agency in independent thought, and on portrayals of autonomous beings in science fiction, we survey the current landscape of AI agents, and analyze agent architectures along five dimensions: goal, identity, decision-making, self-regulation, and learning. Specifically, we argue that genuine agency requires these structures to be \emph{internalized within the system itself} rather than assembled through external scaffolding. This distinction between \emph{agentic} systems, whose competence resides in engineered workflows, and \emph{agentive} systems, whose capabilities (including social interaction) arise endogenously, defines the boundary between systems designed for prescribed tasks, and those capable of operating in the open world with true autonomy. Building on this analysis, we propose the Goal-Identity-Configurator (GIC) architecture for a general-purpose agent model, combining hierarchical goal decomposition, identity evolution, simulative reasoning grounded in a separately trained world model, learned self-regulation, and self-directed learning from both real and simulated experience. Furthermore, we share insight on the auditability, controllability, and safety of agentive systems that possess greater autonomy and ``agency", but remain under human oversight.

AI.tldr: 该论文探讨了AI代理的定义与边界，区分了"agentic"（代理型）和"agentive"（能动型）系统，提出GIC架构实现真正的自主代理，并讨论其安全可控性。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM系统被冠以"代理"之名，且存在AI失控的"机器代理"担忧，学界亟需厘清自动化与代理的边界，既为构建更有能力的系统，也为理解应担忧什么。
AI.method: 借鉴笛卡尔将代理根植于独立思考的理论，以及科幻小说中自主实体的描绘，从目标、身份、决策、自我调节和学习五个维度分析当前AI代理架构。
AI.result: 真正的代理需要目标、身份等结构内化于系统本身而非外部脚手架；"agentive"系统具备真正自主性。论文提出结合层级目标分解、身份演化、 simulative推理、习得自我调节和自导向学习的GIC架构。
AI.conclusion: GIC架构可实现开放世界中真正自主运作的代理，同时通过审计性、可控性和安全性设计确保人类监督下的安全部署。

relevance_reason: This paper is about AI agent theory and autonomy concepts, completely unrelated to Computer Graphics, Text-to-Motion, or 3D Human Motion Generation. While the research profile mentions VLM (Visual Language Model), this paper does not apply VLMs to motion generation - it only discusses general AI agent definitions. The application domain is entirely different: this is AI theory/philosophy paper, not a computer graphics or motion synthesis paper.

title: A Geometry-Informed Computer Vision Method for Detecting and Examining Overtaking Vehicles From A Bicycle
comment: 18 pages, 6 figures, in preparation for journal submission
summary: Instrumented bicycle studies have produced direct field evidence on vehicle passing behavior, but extracting overtaking events from continuous rear-facing video has remained dependent on manual, frame-by-frame annotation. This bottleneck constrains sample sizes and limits naturalistic cycling safety research. We present a geometry-informed computer vision pipeline that automates overtaking event detection from a single bicycle-mounted camera without multi-sensor configurations or explicit camera calibration. The system combines RT-DETR object detection with ByteTrack multi-object tracking through a three-stage geometric validation module enforcing bearing angle trend, apparent size growth, and spatial confirmation criteria derived from perspective projection principles. Validated on 315 manually annotated real-world overtaking events from urban roads in Ann Arbor, Michigan, the pipeline achieved 97.8% recall with zero false positives. The system identified overtaking intentions a mean of 2.44 seconds before vehicle passage, with 84.1% of events exceeding the 1.5-second human reaction time threshold, demonstrating feasibility for active cyclist warning. Lateral passing distance measurements from 96 events revealed 33.3% of passes below the 5-foot (152.4 cm) threshold, consistent with non-compliance rates in prior field and self-reported studies. A preliminary calibration-free lateral distance estimation approach using bounding box geometric features achieved mean absolute errors of 13-14 cm under leave-one-out cross-validation, sufficient to distinguish close passes from standard passes for safety categorization. By automating event isolation from consumer-grade footage, the system removes the primary annotation bottleneck of instrumented bicycle research and provides a scalable foundation for vehicle-bicycle interaction analysis across larger datasets and diverse urban environments.

AI.tldr: 研究团队开发了一个基于计算机视觉的自动化超车事件检测系统，使用单辆自行车安装的摄像头（无需多传感器或相机标定），通过RT-DETR目标检测和ByteTrack多目标跟踪结合三阶段几何验证模块，从城市道路视频中自动提取超车事件。该系统在315个手动标注事件中达到97.8%召回率且零误报，并能在车辆通过前平均2.44秒识别超车意图，33.3%的通过距离低于5英尺安全阈值。
AI.motivation: instrumented bicycle研究产生了车辆超车行为的直接现场证据，但从连续后视视频中提取超车事件仍依赖于手动逐帧标注。这种瓶颈限制了样本量，制约了自然主义骑行安全研究的发展。
AI.method: 提出了一种几何信息化的计算机视觉 pipeline，结合RT-DETR目标检测和ByteTrack多目标跟踪，通过三阶段几何验证模块（方位角趋势、表观尺寸增长和空间确认）实现超车事件自动检测，无需多传感器配置或显式相机标定。
AI.result: 在安娜堡315个手动标注的真实世界超车事件上验证，pipeline达到97.8%召回率，零误报；系统可在车辆通过前平均2.44秒识别超车意图，84.1%的事件超过1.5秒人类反应时间阈值；96个事件的横向通过距离测量显示33.3%的通过低于5英尺阈值；无标定横向距离估计方法的平均绝对误差为13-14厘米。
AI.conclusion: 该系统消除了instrumented bicycle研究的主要标注瓶颈，为在更大数据集和多样化城市环境中进行车辆-自行车交互分析提供了可扩展的基础，展示了主动骑行者警告的可行性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about vehicle detection and tracking from a bicycle for cycling safety research using classical computer vision (RT-DETR, ByteTrack). This is completely unrelated to the research profile which is about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. The methods are also different - this uses object detection/tracking, not Video Generation Models, VLMs, 3D Motion Generation Models, or Diffusion-based Motion Synthesis. The pain points are not addressed - this extracts 2D tracking info, not 3D motion information from video.

title: RIFT-Bench: Dynamic Red-teaming For Agentic AI Systems
summary: Agentic AI systems powered by large language models (LLMs) are rapidly evolving into autonomous decision-making systems, exposing attack vectors beyond those of traditional LLM vulnerabilities. Existing security evaluations are often tied to specific implementations or domains, limiting unified comparison across heterogeneous systems. To address this gap, we introduce RIFT-Bench, a graph representation-driven methodology for dynamic red-teaming that enables unified evaluations across diverse agentic architectures. Building on a novel hierarchical representation, RIFT-Bench operates in two automated phases: Discovery, which extracts system structure, and Scanning, which deploys adaptive adversarial attacks and produces a comprehensive evaluation report. It evaluates the examined system itself, leveraging a broad set of dynamically adaptable adversarial probes across diverse attack vectors and objectives. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed evaluation pipeline across 45 agentic systems spanning a diverse range of implementations, showing that the approach generalizes effectively to heterogeneous agentic architectures. Beyond systems and attacks, RIFT-Bench also supports direct evaluation of mitigation strategies. These key capabilities make RIFT-Bench a scalable foundation for security evaluation of agentic AI systems.

AI.tldr: RIFT-Bench是一个基于图表示的动态红队评估框架，用于对异构Agentic AI系统进行统一的安全评估。该方法包含两个自动化阶段：Discovery用于提取系统结构，Scanning用于部署自适应对抗攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有Agentic AI系统面临新的安全挑战，传统的LLM漏洞评估方法不足以应对自主决策系统带来的攻击向量。现有的安全评估往往绑定于特定实现或领域，限制了异构系统间的统一比较。
AI.method: 提出基于层次化图表示的评估方法，包含两个自动化阶段：1) Discovery阶段提取系统结构；2) Scanning阶段部署自适应对抗攻击并生成评估报告。该方法支持跨多种攻击向量和目标的动态适应性探测。
AI.result: 在45个不同实现的Agentic系统上验证了方法的有效性，证明该方法能够有效推广到异构代理架构。此外，RIFT-Bench还支持直接评估缓解策略。
AI.conclusion: RIFT-Bench为Agentic AI系统的安全评估提供了一个可扩展的基础，能够支持对不同架构的代理系统进行统一评估，并可评估缓解策略的有效性。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant - this paper is about security evaluation/red-teaming for Agentic AI systems, which is in the field of AI Safety/Security, NOT Computer Graphics or 3D Human Motion Generation. While VLM is mentioned in the research profile methods, this paper uses VLM concepts for a completely different application domain (security assessment of autonomous agents). There is no connection to video generation, motion extraction, cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion, or any computer graphics task. The application domain is entirely different - security evaluation vs. text-to-motion generation.

title: Age of LLM: A Strategic 1v1 Benchmark for Reasoning, Diplomacy and Reliability of Large Language Models under Fog of War
comment: 25 pages including appendices, 8 figures, 4 tables; appendices include verbatim system prompt and engine resolution pseudocode. All correlations reported with p-values, 95% bootstrap confidence intervals and Spearman's rho; includes a Steiger test and Bradley-Terry fit
summary: We introduce Age of LLM, a turn-based 1v1 benchmark in which two LLMs face off on a 13x7 grid to destroy the enemy base. Three stressors are deliberate: fog of war, full diplomacy (messages, ceasefires, ultimatums; uranium kept secret), and a reliability dimension where every turn must follow a strict JSON schema and an illegal action is silently discarded. The engine is private and each match uses a fresh random map seed and opponent, mitigating the data contamination that affects public benchmarks. Models receive a (near) rule-only prompt with no build-order advice (two tactical seed phrases were present during data collection; see Section 2.7). We benchmark 15 reasoning models across 54 matches and 5,258 actions. Findings: (1) the nuclear rush dominates (78% on the rules-coherent v0.11+ sub-corpus; 85% corpus-wide) with a sole-launcher signature that is largely mechanical under secret-simultaneous launch rules, not a cognitive deterrence failure; (2) military conquest is rare but faster (12.3 vs 18.9 turns); (3) diplomacy is prolific yet almost never consummated; (4) ~58% of illegal actions are fog/state errors, making the illegal-action rate a measure of belief-tracking; (5) -- the least established, and the only one we label exploratory -- a weak link associates reliability with winning. The corpus is small, unbalanced and not side-swapped, so the ranking is a preliminary descriptive view, not a contribution. Beyond ranking, the turn-by-turn traces of actions and messages make the corpus a lens on how LLMs reason under adversarial uncertainty -- their belief-tracking, spontaneous deception, and per-model cognitive "personas" -- which we frame as a future research direction. We release the replay format, an isometric viewer and all replays; engine source on request.

AI.tldr: Age of LLM是一个13x7网格上的1v1策略对战基准测试，评估15个推理模型在54场比赛中的表现，涉及战争迷雾、外交和可靠性三个压力维度。
AI.motivation: 解决现有公开基准测试存在的数据污染问题，创建一个更真实、更具挑战性的LLM对战评估环境。
AI.method: 设计私有引擎、使用随机地图种子、对战双方无build-order建议的纯规则提示，benchmark 15个推理模型。
AI.result: 核突击策略占主导(78-85%)，军事征服罕见但更快，外交频繁但很少成功，约58%非法动作是信念追踪错误，可靠性与获胜存在弱关联。
AI.conclusion: 该基准测试揭示了LLM在对抗性不确定性下的推理方式、信念追踪和认知"人格"特征，为未来研究提供方向。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about evaluating LLMs in strategic 1v1 war game scenarios (game theory/AI reasoning), not Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion 3D human motion generation. The application domain is entirely different - it's game AI evaluation focused on reasoning, diplomacy and reliability under "fog of war" in a strategy game, with no connection to video-to-motion extraction, visual-guided feature extraction, or motion synthesis. Even though both profiles mention "LLM" or "diffusion," the domains are completely unrelated (strategy game AI vs 3D motion generation).

title: Sol Video Inference Engine: Agent-Native Full-Stack Acceleration Framework for Efficient Video Generation
summary: Modern video diffusion models achieve higher generation quality through scaling, but this also increases inference cost. Although many acceleration methods have been proposed, a central challenge is that the most effective acceleration strategy is highly instance-specific: a recipe that works well for one combination of model, hardware, and inference configuration often does not transfer to another. Different models vary in architecture, numerical sensitivity, and attention concentration patterns. Inference settings differ in spatial and temporal resolution and video duration, while hardware platforms differ in memory hierarchy, supported numerical formats, and kernel throughput. These factors create a large tuning space, making manual performance engineering costly. We present Sol Video Inference Engine, an agentic, native, training-free acceleration framework for video diffusion models. It organizes five broadly applicable techniques, cache, sparse attention, token pruning, quantization, and kernel fusion, into an agentic acceleration stack for instance-specific optimization. For a concrete deployment target defined by a model, hardware platform, and serving configuration, parallel skill agents optimize the implementation of each technique, an agent integrator composes them into a global acceleration stack, and a human validator provides feedback on generation quality. We instantiate this workflow on three video models with different sizes and architectures: 64B Cosmos3-Super, 22B LTX-2.3, and 2B SANA-Video. With little human effort, the full stack achieves more than 2x end-to-end acceleration while maintaining near-lossless VBench quality, demonstrating the effectiveness of the agent framework for video diffusion acceleration.

AI.tldr: 提出Sol Video Inference Engine，一个用于视频扩散模型的代理化、本地化、免训练的加速框架，组织缓存、稀疏注意力、标记剪枝、量化、核融合5种技术为实例特定优化。
AI.motivation: 现代视频扩散模型通过扩展实现更高生成质量，但也增加推理成本；最有效加速策略高度实例特定（模型、硬件、推理配置组合），手动性能工程代价高。
AI.method: 将5种广泛适用技术组织成代理加速栈：并行技能优化各技术实现、代理集成器组合成全局加速栈、人类验证器提供生成质量反馈。在3个视频模型(Cosmos3-Super 64B、LTX-2.3 22B、SANA-Video 2B)上实例化。
AI.result: 全栈实现超过2倍端到端加速，同时保持近无损VBench质量。
AI.conclusion: 代理框架对视频扩散加速有效，只需少量人力即可实现高效加速。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper addresses video generation (2D visual content creation) using diffusion models, while the research profile requires 3D human motion generation (generating skeletal motion sequences for human characters). Although both use diffusion techniques, they operate in fundamentally different output spaces: 2D video frames vs 3D motion trajectories. The pain points are also unrelated - this paper focuses on inference acceleration for video generation models, not on 3D motion extraction, cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion, or visual-guided feature extraction for motion synthesis.

title: Neuro-Symbolic Drive: Rule-Grounded Faithful Reasoning for Driving VLAs
summary: Driving VLA models incorporating Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning are attractive because they leverage pretrained VLM representations and expose intermediate decisions in natural language, yet current rationales often lack the step-by-step decision semantics needed to keep the rationale causally connected to the planned motion. We introduce Neuro-Symbolic Drive, a neuro-symbolic driving framework that supervises a driving VLA with rule-grounded reasoning traces extracted directly from classical rule-based planners. Our key observation is that rule-based planners are symbolic AI systems that already function as executable reasoning engines: they reason about active safety constraints, search over candidate maneuvers, and select a final trajectory. We instrument these planners in simulation to capture both the executed trajectory and the internal decision trace at each rule-evaluation step. Each trace is serialized into structured rule-grounded reasoning and paired with the trajectory to fine-tune Qwen3.5-4B as a driving VLA. Because these traces are derived directly from the planner states that determine the action, they ensure reasoning is structurally coupled to motion generation by construction, rather than by post-hoc alignment. On our simulator-generated benchmark, detailed rule-grounded reasoning reduces ADE@3s from 0.47 to 0.26 and miss rate from 8.30% to 6.40% under three-camera perception, and from 0.54 to 0.26 and 10.13% to 5.99% under eight-camera perception. Neuro-Symbolic Drive thus converts neuro-symbolic planning logic into structured supervision. Code base: https://github.com/XiangboGaoBarry/Neural-Symbolic-Drive.

AI.tldr: Neuro-Symbolic Drive是一种神经符号驾驶框架，通过从经典基于规则的 planners 提取规则接地推理轨迹来监督驾驶VLA模型。核心创新在于将符号 planners 的决策状态直接用于微调 Qwen3.5-4B，使推理在结构上与运动生成耦合。
AI.motivation: 当前驾驶VLA模型结合CoT推理缺乏逐步决策语义，无法保持推理与规划运动的因果连接。现有方法的推理是后验对齐，而非结构耦合。
AI.method: 在模拟器中 instruments 规则-based planners 捕获决策轨迹：将每步规则评估的决策跟踪序列化为结构化规则接地推理，与轨迹配对后微调 Qwen3.5-4B 作为驾驶VLA。这些轨迹直接从决定动作的 planner 状态提取。
AI.result: 三摄像头感知下：ADE@3s 从0.47降至0.26，miss rate从8.30%降至6.40%；八摄像头感知下：ADE@3s 从0.54降至0.26，miss rate从10.13%降至5.99%。
AI.conclusion: 将神经符号规划逻辑转换为结构化监督可显著提升驾驶VLA性能，证明推理与运动的结构耦合是关键。

The subject matter is vehicle driving vs human body motion generation - these are entirely different fields with no meaningful overlap despite both using VLMs.

title: Listening makes Vision Clear for VLMs
summary: Recent work typically assesses vision--language consistency using attention distributions of answer-side tokens. However, we observe that highest attention regions are not always consistent with the intended semantic token. This probably stems from decoding drift, where language priors from previously generated answer tokens accumulate and mismatch with visual attention. Besides the priors from previous answer tokens, we find that structural tokens, e.g., modality boundary markers, may encompass the entire context and generate high attention to areas unrelated to the target. To avoid these distortions and provide consistency evaluation for large VLMs, we adopt prompt-side semantics and propose Prompt-Vision Token Activation Map (PV-TAM). PV-TAM further incorporates a filter to remove systematic bias induced by modality boundary markers. Unlike traditional methods that evaluate overlap solely through masks while ignoring activation intensity, our metrics leverage the peak distribution of attention to measure the alignment between prompts and visual regions. In experiments, PV-TAM consistently improves both attention-based and IoU-style localization metrics over answer-side baselines on various datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PV-TAM方法，通过提示侧语义和过滤器来评估大型视觉语言模型中视觉与语言的一致性，解决了解码漂移和模态边界标记带来的注意力失真问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法使用答案侧令牌的注意力分布评估视觉-语言一致性，但最高注意力区域与目标语义令牌不一致。原因包括：1)解码漂移导致先前生成的答案令牌语言先验累积并与视觉注意力不匹配；2)模态边界标记等结构令牌可能覆盖整个上下文并产生与目标无关的高注意力。
AI.method: 提出提示-视觉令牌激活图(PV-TAM)：1)采用提示侧语义而非答案侧令牌；2)加入过滤器消除模态边界标记引起的系统性偏差；3)利用注意力的峰值分布而非传统仅评估掩码重叠来衡量提示与视觉区域的对齐。
AI.result: 在各种数据集上，PV-TAM始终比答案侧基线方法更有效地改善了基于注意力和IoU风格的定位指标。
AI.conclusion: PV-TAM能够避免传统方法的注意力失真问题，为大型视觉语言模型提供更准确的视觉-语言一致性评估。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Visual Language Model (VLM) alignment evaluation for text-to-image/video tasks, not 3D human motion generation. While it mentions VLMs (one of the methods in the profile), it addresses a completely different application domain - evaluating attention consistency in VLMs for visual understanding tasks, not for text-to-motion generation or cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion. The paper focuses on decoding drift and modality boundary tokens in text-to-image VLMs, which is unrelated to computer graphics motion synthesis.

title: From Spatial to Spectral: An Efficient, Frequency-Guided Feature Representation Learner for Small Object Detection
summary: Efficient small object detection is bottlenecked by the inherent feature scarcity of tiny targets, which is further aggravated by operations of spatial-domain detectors that indiscriminately discard critical high-frequency details. Recovering these fragile cues within the spatial domain is notoriously difficult, as it often requires computationally expensive architectural upscaling that inadvertently amplifies background noise. To bridge this gap, we propose a paradigm \textbf{shift from spatial to spectral} feature processing, introducing a holistic solution with the following novelty: (1) A versatile \textbf{Frequency-Guided Feature Representation framework} that generalizes across diverse detector architectures (both CNN and Transformer-based), offering a robust alternative to spatial-only feature extraction; (2) The unified \textbf{Decompose--Enhance--Reconstruct (DER)} operator, instantiated via three \textbf{lightweight, plug-and-play} modules -- Wavelet-Difference Gate (WDG), Log-Gabor Enhancer (LGE), and Frequency-Driven Head (FDHead) -- to systematically inject frequency-aware modulation into the backbone, neck, and head. This mechanism decouples feature modeling from resolution reduction, capturing discriminative high-frequency components to enable accurate localization with significantly reduced parameter redundancy; (3) Extensive validation on multi-domain benchmarks (VisDrone2019, UAVDT, TinyPerson, DOTAv1) demonstrating consistent gains. Notably, our proposed \textbf{DERNet} series outperforms YOLOv11 models under the same scale while requiring \textbf{only 1/6 of the parameters}, backed by rigorous spectral diagnostics and error decomposition analysis.

AI.tldr: 提出一种从空间域到频谱域的特征处理范式转变，通过频率引导特征表示框架（Frequency-Guided Feature Representation）和小目标检测器DERNet，在显著减少参数的情况下提升小目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 小目标检测受限于特征稀缺性，空间域检测器会不可避免地丢弃关键的高频细节，而在空间域中恢复这些细节通常需要计算昂贵的架构上采样，反而放大背景噪声。
AI.method: 提出频率引导特征表示框架（Frequency-Guided Feature Representation），包含统一的分解-增强-重建（DER）算子，由三个轻量即插即用模块组成：Wavelet-Difference Gate（WDG）、Log-Gabor Enhancer（LGE）和Frequency-Driven Head（FDHead），分别作用于骨干网络、颈部和头部，以注入频率感知调制。
AI.result: 在VisDrone2019、UAVDT、TinyPerson、DOTAv1等多域基准数据集上验证，DERNet系列模型在相同规模下优于YOLOv11，且参数量仅为其1/6。
AI.conclusion: 通过频谱域特征处理替代传统空间域方法，能够以更少的参数实现更优的小目标检测性能，为小目标检测提供了一种有效的范式转变思路。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper addresses small object detection in drone/aerial imagery (computer vision for surveillance), not 3D human motion generation. Although it uses frequency-guided feature extraction, the application domain is entirely different - detecting small objects in static images vs generating human motion from text/video. The methods (wavelet-based frequency analysis for object detection) do not transfer to the motion generation domain. The datasets (VisDrone, UAVDT, TinyPerson) are unrelated to any motion-related tasks.

title: Safe and Generalizable Hierarchical Multi-Agent RL via Constraint Manifold Control
summary: Multi-agent systems are widely used in safety-critical applications that require coordinated behavior under strict safety constraints. Existing approaches face a fundamental trade-off: learning-based methods achieve strong empirical performance but lack theoretical safety guarantees, while control-theoretic methods enforce safety but often lead to overly conservative and inefficient behaviors. We propose a hierarchical multi-agent reinforcement learning framework that enforces hard safety constraints under mild assumptions at low level via a constraint manifold, while enabling effective coordination through high-level policy learning. Our approach provides theoretical safety guarantees in the multi-agent setting and yields stationary learning dynamics, thereby enabling stable and efficient training. Empirically, our method achieves competitive performance while maintaining nearly perfect safety rates, and generalizes effectively to varying numbers of agents and obstacles.

AI.tldr: 提出一种分层多智能体强化学习框架，通过约束流形在低层实现硬安全约束，在高层实现有效协调，解决安全关键应用中学习性能与安全保证之间的权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在安全关键多智能体系统中面临根本性权衡：基于学习的方法性能强但缺乏理论安全保证，控制理论方法保证安全但过于保守。需要在保证安全的同时实现高效协调。
AI.method: 提出分层多智能体强化学习框架，低层通过约束流形强制硬安全约束，高层通过策略学习实现有效协调。框架提供多智能体设置下的理论安全保证，并产生平稳学习动态。
AI.result: 方法在保持近乎完美的安全率的同时实现竞争性性能，并能有效泛化到不同数量的智能体和障碍物。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功解决了多智能体系统中安全与性能之间的权衡问题，为安全关键应用提供了一种既有理论保证又具实用价值的方案。

There is no application domain match (multi-agent RL vs 3D human motion generation), no method overlap (constraint manifold control vs diffusion models/VLM/visual-guided feature extraction), and the pain points are entirely different (safety guarantees in multi-agent systems vs 2D-to-3D motion extraction and cross-modal alignment).

title: ABACUS: Adapting Unified Foundation Model for Bridging Image Count Understanding and Generation
summary: ABACUS is a unified vision-language model that handles object counting, crowd counting, referring-expression counting, and count-faithful image generation without any benchmark-specific training required. Our model is built on existing 3B-parameter unified foundation model and is adapted for object localization tasks using three key innovations: density-aware adaptive zooming with objectness maps for spatial grounding; a boundary-aware count policy via GRPO to eliminate crop-boundary errors; and a cycle-consistent GRPO strategy where the understanding branch self-critiques generated outputs, closing the understanding-generation gap without any external annotations. ABACUS achieves state-of-the-art results across seven benchmarks, outperforming both task-specific specialists and larger generalist models.

title: Reinforcement Learning Towards Broadly and Persistently Beneficial Models
summary: As AI systems are deployed across increasingly diverse and high-stakes settings, model alignment must generalize beyond the tasks and domains seen during training. This is especially important for reinforcement learning (RL), which can introduce unexpected misalignment through reward hacking, deception, or other unintended strategies. We study whether RL on beneficial behavior, instantiated in realistic domains, can produce broad and persistent alignment generalization beyond the training distribution. We construct a dataset of realistic situations designed to measure and train beneficial traits, such as truthfulness, fairness, risk awareness, and corrigibility, spanning varied domains, including health, science, and education. We then train models with RL on this dataset and evaluate them on more than 50 independent benchmarks of alignment and beneficial behavior. Compared to a compute-matched baseline, beneficial trait RL improves performance on over 80% of these out-of-distribution benchmarks. We observe substantial out-of-distribution alignment transfer: a beneficial-behavior RL intervention entirely limited to one domain, health, produces broad improvements on non-health alignment evaluations, including reduced reward hacking, deception, and general misalignment. Finally, we study alignment persistence: whether behavior remains robustly aligned under attempts to steer models towards misalignment. Models trained with beneficial trait RL show improved persistence, including greater resistance to adversarial prompting and harmful finetuning; further work is required to isolate the sources of these effects. These results suggest that RL to reinforce beneficial behavior in realistic domains can produce models that are more robustly aligned with human flourishing.

AI.tldr: 研究如何通过强化学习训练有益行为，使AI模型能够跨领域泛化对齐，并抵抗误导和reward hacking等 misalignment问题。
AI.motivation: 随着AI系统部署到高风险场景，确保模型对齐能超越训练分布泛化尤为重要。RL可能引入意外的misalignment（如reward hacking、欺骗等），需要研究有益行为RL是否能产生广泛的跨领域对齐泛化。
AI.method: 构建包含现实情境的数据集，涵盖真实性、公平性、风险意识、可修正性等有益特质，涵盖健康、科学、教育等领域。使用RL在该数据集上训练模型，在50多个独立基准上评估对齐和有益行为。
AI.result: 有益特质RL在超过80%的分布外基准上提升性能；健康领域的有益行为RL干预产生了跨非健康领域泛化的对齐改进，包括减少reward hacking、欺骗和一般misalignment；模型对对抗性提示和有害微调表现出更强抵抗力。
AI.conclusion: 在现实领域中进行有益行为的RL训练可以产生更稳健地与人类繁荣对齐的模型，表明RL强化有益行为是实现AI对齐的可行的跨领域泛化方法。

title: HANCLIP: A Family of Hyperbolic Angular Negation Vision Language Models
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are typically pre-trained on large-scale image-text datasets to capture semantic correspondences between visual content and natural language. However, they remain surprisingly brittle to negation: models often rely on shallow word co-occurrence and are easily distracted by misleading or irrelevant textual cues, even when their overall retrieval or classification performance is strong. Moreover, directly finetuning on negation data can interfere with previously acquired knowledge, causing noticeable degradation on standard vision-language benchmarks. To tackle these issues, this work introduces HANCLIP (Hyperbolic + Angular + Negation), a family of VLMs that explicitly restructures the embedding space to encode "what an image is not" alongside "what it is." HANCLIP is trained on a compact set of 20,000 image-text quadruplets and combines a hyperbolic formulation, which models hierarchical semantic relations and asymmetries, with an angular triplet objective that drives systematic separation between negated descriptions and their corresponding positives. This geometry-aware design strengthens negation sensitivity while preserving the global structure of pretrained representations, rather than overwriting them. Extensive experiments across multiple vision-language tasks show that HANCLIP delivers consistent gains on the negation-focused NegBench benchmark, while maintaining competitive or improved performance on standard classification and image-text retrieval benchmarks. The framework is model-agnostic and can be plugged into CLIP, LongCLIP, SmartCLIP, and HiMo-CLIP without large-scale retraining, demonstrating that a carefully designed geometric objective can substantially extend the reasoning capabilities of existing VLMs using only modest additional data.

AI.tldr: HANCLIP通过结合双曲几何和角度三元组目标重构VLMs的嵌入空间，使模型能够明确编码"图像不是什么"从而增强对否定表达的敏感性同时保持原有性能。
AI.motivation: 当前VLMs对否定表达表现出脆弱性模型依赖浅层的词语共现容易受到误导性或不相关文本线索的干扰直接微调否定数据又会干扰先前获取的知识导致标准基准性能下降。
AI.method: HANCLIP在20000个图像文本四元组上进行训练结合双曲 formulation建模层次语义关系和不对称性并使用角度三元组目标驱动否定描述与其对应肯定描述之间的系统性分离。
AI.result: 在NegBench否定基准上获得一致性能提升同时在标准分类和图像文本检索基准上保持竞争力或有所改善。该框架可插入CLIP LongCLIP SmartCLIP和HiMo-CLIP无需大规模重新训练。
AI.conclusion: 精心设计的几何目标可以仅使用适度的额外数据就显著扩展现有VLMs的推理能力证明双曲几何和角度分离的组合是处理否定表达的有效方法。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about 3D human motion generation in Computer Graphics, while this paper is about Vision Language Models for handling negation expressions in image-text tasks. Despite both using VLMs, they serve entirely different purposes - one generates human motion, the other handles negation in image understanding. No connection to motion extraction, motion generation, or cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion space.

title: Can Language Model Agents be Helpful Circuit Explainers in Mechanistic Interpretability?
summary: Mechanistic interpretability has made substantial progress in automatically localizing circuits, but explaining what localized components do remains labor-intensive and difficult to standardize. In this work, we study whether language model (LM) agents can assist with this explanation problem once a circuit has already been identified. We introduce AgenticInterpBench, a benchmark for circuit explanation built from 84 semi-synthetic transformer circuits with 163 component-level annotations. We propose HyVE (Hypothesize, Validate, Explain), an agentic explainer that analyzes each component through an iterative loop of observation, hypothesis generation, and causal validation, eventually producing a component-level explanation and a circuit-level task description. Across four LM backbones, HyVE recovers useful component- and task-level explanations, but no backbone is uniformly best. Our analysis shows that strong backbones usually form observation-grounded hypotheses, while failures more often arise later in the validation loop, through incomplete validation plans, code execution errors, or unresolved hypotheses. A case study on an arithmetic circuit in Llama-3-8B shows that the same formulation can extend beyond semi-synthetic benchmarks to naturally trained models. Overall, LM agents are promising circuit explainers, but reliable validation remains the key obstacle.

AI.tldr: 本文研究语言模型代理是否能帮助解释已识别电路中的组件。提出AgenticInterpBench基准（含84个半合成transformer电路和163个组件级注释）和HyVE代理方法，通过观察、假设生成和因果验证的迭代循环来生成解释。实验表明HyVE能恢复有用的组件级和任务级解释，但可靠的验证仍是主要障碍。
AI.motivation: 可解释性研究虽然在自动定位电路方面取得进展，但解释已定位组件的功能仍然劳动密集且难以标准化。研究者希望探索语言模型代理是否能协助解决这一解释难题。
AI.method: 构建了包含84个半合成transformer电路和163个组件级注释的AgenticInterpBench基准；提出HyVE方法，通过"假设、验证、解释"的迭代循环分析每个组件：观察→假设生成→因果验证，最终生成组件级解释和电路级任务描述。在四个LM骨干网络上进行实验。
AI.result: HyVE在四个LM骨干网络上能恢复有用的组件级和任务级解释，但没有骨干网络是普遍最优的。strong的骨干网络通常形成基于观察的假设，而失败更常发生在验证循环后期（不完整的验证计划、代码执行错误或未解决的假设）。在Llama-3-8B上的算术电路案例研究表明该方法可扩展到自然训练的模型。
AI.conclusion: LM代理是有前景的电路解释器，但可靠的验证仍然是关键障碍。未来需要改进验证计划、减少代码执行错误并解决未解决的假设，以提高解释的可靠性。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about mechanistic interpretability - using language model agents to explain components in transformer neural circuits. The application domain is entirely different from Computer Graphics/Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. Zero connection to video-to-motion synthesis or 3D human motion generation.

title: Mind the Heads: Topological Representation Alignment for Multimodal LLMs
summary: Representation alignment has emerged as an effective approach to improve Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) by regularizing their internal representations toward those of an external vision encoder. However, existing methods typically align a fixed layer of the language backbone, overlooking the fine-grained structure of Transformer models. In this work, we propose Head-Wise Representation Alignment (HeRA), a method that enforces cross-modal alignment at the level of individual attention heads. Our approach is grounded in the Platonic Representation Hypothesis, focusing on preserving the topological structure of representations (i.e., their local neighborhood relationships) across modalities. Following the Mutual K-Nearest Neighbor (MKNN) alignment metric, we introduce a contrastive objective that acts as a differentiable proxy for matching local structures. HeRA applies this objective during multimodal training to specific attention heads in the LLM, selected by their alignment score according to the MKNN metric. Counterintuitively, we find that aligning the least aligned heads yields the largest gains. Extensive evaluations across multiple MLLMs and 18 benchmarks demonstrate that HeRA consistently improves performance on challenging vision-centric tasks and serves as an effective regularizer against visual hallucinations by naturally curbing the over-reliance on linguistic priors. Our code is publicly released.

AI.tldr: 提出HeRA方法,通过在单个注意力头级别进行跨模态对齐来改进多模态大语言模型,该方法基于Platonic表征假设,保留表征的拓扑结构。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常对齐语言主干网络的固定层,忽略了Transformer模型的细粒度结构。该工作旨在在注意力头级别进行细粒度的跨模态对齐,以更好地保持表征的局部邻域关系。
AI.method: 基于互K近邻(MKNN)对齐度量,引入对比目标作为匹配局部结构的可微代理,在多模态训练期间对LLM中特定注意力头应用该目标,并根据MKNN度量选择对齐分数最高的注意力头。
AI.result: 在多个MLLM和18个基准测试上的广泛评估表明,HeRA始终改善挑战性视觉中心任务的性能,并能有效防止视觉幻觉,通过自然抑制对语言先验的过度依赖。
AI.conclusion: 反直觉地发现,对齐最不对齐的注意力头能获得最大收益。该方法为改进多模态大语言模型提供了一种新的有效正则化方法。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses Multimodal LLM improvements (alignment at attention head level), which is a completely different application domain from 3D Human Motion Generation. While the profile mentions VLM for screening, this paper focuses on general vision-language tasks like reducing visual hallucinations - NOT text-to-motion or 3D motion generation. The paper uses similar concepts (multimodal alignment, visual features) but in a totally different field (general MLLM enhancement vs. computer graphics motion synthesis). title: Breaking the Filter Bubble: A Semantic Pareto-DQN Framework for Multi-Objective Recommendation
comment: IEEE International Conference on Responsible Artificial Intelligence (IRAI) - 2026
summary: Recommender systems often induce filter bubbles and semantic homogenization by monolithically optimizing for immediate user engagement. Standard single-objective models, including traditional Deep Q-Networks, are ill-equipped to navigate the trade-offs between platform retention and critical societal values like information diversity and provider fairness. To address these limitations, we introduce a multi-objective reinforcement learning framework that formalizes recommendation as a semantic multi-objective Markov decision process. By integrating high-fidelity semantic embeddings with a Pareto-DQN agent, our architecture treats engagement, diversity, and fairness as distinct, non-aggregable reward signals, avoiding the pitfalls of static reward scalarization. Empirical evaluations on the MovieLens small dataset shows that our hypervolume based action selection disrupts the feedback loops responsible for semantic collapse. By sustaining high state-trajectory variance, the Pareto-DQN effectively maps the Pareto frontier, achieving gains in auxiliary societal objectives with only marginal impacts on engagement. This work provides a path toward intrinsically aligned, responsible recommender systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于多目标强化学习的推荐系统框架，旨在解决传统推荐算法导致的"过滤气泡"和语义同质化问题。该框架将推荐任务建模为语义多目标马尔可夫决策过程，整合高保真语义嵌入与Pareto-DQN智能体，将用户参与度、多样性和公平性作为独立的奖励信号。实验表明，基于超体积的动作选择能有效打破语义崩塌的反馈循环。
AI.motivation: 传统推荐系统（包括深度Q网络）单一优化用户参与度，导致过滤气泡、语义同质化等问题，忽视信息多样性和提供者公平性等关键社会价值。现有方法难以平衡平台留存与社会责任之间的权衡。
AI.method: 提出语义多目标MDP框架，整合高保真语义嵌入与Pareto-DQN智能体，将参与度、多样性、公平性作为独立且不可聚合的奖励信号，采用基于超体积的动作选择方法。
AI.result: 在MovieLens小数据集上的实验表明，超体积动作选择破坏了语义崩塌的反馈循环，通过维持高状态轨迹方差有效绘制Pareto前沿，在仅牺牲少量参与度的情况下实现辅助社会目标的收益。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为实现内在对齐的负责任推荐系统提供了可行路径，有望在保持平台参与度的同时提升信息多样性和公平性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about recommender systems using Pareto-DQN for multi-objective recommendation (addressing filter bubbles in movie recommendations). It has NO connection to Computer Graphics, Text-to-Motion, or 3D Human Motion Generation. The research profile is about generating 3D human motion from text/video using diffusion models, VLMs, and visual-guided feature extraction - completely different application domain. Even though both papers mention "DQN" or "embeddings", the purpose and domain are entirely unrelated.

title: REALM: A Unified Red-Teaming Benchmark for Physical-World VLMs
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly used as perception-reasoning backbones for embodied intelligence in safety-critical physical systems, where perception or reasoning errors can lead to unsafe decisions or actions. Although many red-teaming methods have been developed to probe VLM vulnerabilities, their evaluation remains fragmented across datasets, metrics, and threat models, making direct comparison difficult and obscuring whether observed differences arise from stronger attacks, more vulnerable models, or incompatible evaluation settings. Existing chatbot-centric red-teaming benchmarks mainly standardize jailbreak and content-safety evaluation, but they do not systematically capture physically grounded functional failures or cover red-teaming methods that target physical-world VLMs. This raises the key challenge of comparing diverse attack methods under a unified protocol while targeting the same scenario-specific failures. We introduce REALM, to our knowledge the first unified red-teaming benchmark for physical-world VLMs. REALM integrates 12 red-teaming methods, 3 model-agnostic defenses, and 13 VLMs under a practical black-box threat model with shared datasets and metrics. To align adversarial objectives across attack families, REALM introduces an agentic target-generation pipeline that constructs shared, scenario-specific, and physically grounded attack objectives for each scene, enabling fair comparison of diverse red-teaming methods under aligned adversarial goals. Our evaluation shows that text and typographic injection attacks induce the most failures, multimodal co-optimization yields the strongest visual-perturbation transfer, single-pass attacks approach iterative methods at much lower cost, and model scale alone does not confer adversarial robustness. Code is available at https://github.com/UCF-ML-Research/REALM.

AI.tldr: REALM是首个针对物理世界视觉语言模型(VLMs)的统一红队测试基准,整合12种红队方法、3种防御策略和13个VLM模型,解决现有评估方法分散化的问题,实现不同攻击方法在统一协议下的公平比较。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM红队评估在不同数据集、指标和威胁模型间碎片化,导致难以直接比较不同攻击方法的优劣;现有以聊天机器人为中心的基准主要关注越狱和内容安全,缺乏对物理世界功能故障的系统性覆盖。
AI.method: REALM引入智能目标生成管道,针对每个场景构建共享的、场景特定的物理接地攻击目标,在实际的黑盒威胁模型下使用统一的数据集和指标,对12种红队方法、3种模型无关防御和13个VLM进行系统评估。
AI.result: 文本和字体注入攻击导致最多失败;多模态协同优化产生最强的视觉扰动迁移;单次攻击成本更低且接近迭代方法效果;模型规模 alone 不能带来对抗鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: REALM为物理世界VLMs的安全评估提供了标准化框架,揭示了当前VLM在物理场景中的脆弱性,为构建更安全的 embodied intelligence 系统奠定基础。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation, while this paper is about red-teaming/security evaluation of VLMs in physical-world scenarios. Although both mention "VLM", the use cases are entirely different: the research profile uses VLM for visual-guided feature extraction for motion generation, while this paper focuses on VLM security robustness testing. This paper does not address any of the pain points related to 3D motion generation, cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion, or diffusion-based motion synthesis.

title: Ensemble Feature Selection and Harris Hawks Optimization for Explainable Mental Health Risk Prediction in Female Sex Workers
comment: Accepted and presented at the 2026 8th IEEE Symposium on Computers & Informatics (ISCI 2026). To appear in IEEE conference proceedings
summary: One of the significant mental health issues affecting female sex workers (FSWs) is mental disorders, especially depression. Exposure to violence, stigma, and economic hardship further increases their psychological risk. Current machine learning (ML) models are typically ineffective at capturing the high-dimensional and complex risk patterns that exist in this marginalized group. This paper suggests a hybrid predictive model that merges an ensemble feature selection strategy using ANOVA and mutual information and Harris Hawks optimization-tuned logistic regression and represents a new application of swarm intelligence to predict mental health in vulnerable groups. The explainable AI (XAI) methods can be used to understand the factors of trauma associated with model predictions. When applied to a group of 3,005 FSWs, it can be seen that the proposed model is more effective than traditional classifiers, with an accuracy of 95.78%, an F1 score of 95.77%, and an AUC of 0.96, and identifying post-traumatic stress, client-related violence, and occupational factors as major contributors to depression. This work bridges the gaps between conventional and ML approaches to develop an XAI tool that enables vulnerable groups to receive early assistance, evidence-based targeted psychosocial care, and health planning.

AI.tldr: 针对女性性工作者(FSWs)抑郁症预测的混合机器学习模型，结合特征选择和Harris Hawks优化
AI.motivation: 女性性工作者面临高心理风险，现有机器学习模型难以有效捕捉高维复杂风险模式
AI.method: 提出混合预测模型，融合ANOVA和互信息的集成特征选择策略，以及Harris Hawks优化调参的逻辑回归
AI.result: 在3005名FSWs数据上，准确率95.78%，F1分数95.77%，AUC 0.96，识别出创伤后应激、客户相关暴力和职业因素是抑郁症主要贡献因素
AI.conclusion: 该研究弥合了传统方法与机器学习方法的差距，开发了可解释AI工具，有助于脆弱群体获得早期帮助和循证心理社会护理

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about mental health risk prediction in female sex workers using traditional machine learning (logistic regression, feature selection, Harris Hawks optimization). It has NO connection to Computer Graphics, Text-to-Motion, 3D Human Motion Generation, video generation, visual language models, or diffusion-based motion synthesis. The application domain is healthcare/medical prediction, which is entirely different from computer graphics and motion generation.

title: The Professor: Multi-Teacher Unsupervised Prompt Distillation for Vision-Language Models
summary: Prompt distillation compresses large vision-language models (VLMs) such as CLIP into lightweight student models by matching teacher predictions on unlabeled domain images. PromptKD (CVPR 2024) established this paradigm with a single PromptSRC-finetuned ViT-L/14 teacher and a ViT-B/16 student. We propose TheProfessor, a multi-teacher extension that distills from a fixed two-teacher ensemble: a domain-finetuned PromptSRC ViT-L/14 teacher and a zero-shot EVA-CLIP-L/14 teacher whose logits are pre-computed per dataset. We evaluate single-teacher PromptKD, equal-probability ensembling, and confidence-weighted ensembling on four base-to-novel datasets: Caltech-101, DTD, UCF101, and EuroSAT. In a 12-run single-seed sweep, confidence-weighted ensembling improves average HM from 87.52 to 89.28 (+1.77 points), while equal averaging improves average HM to 88.88 (+1.37 points). Gains are dataset dependent: they are negligible on Caltech-101 (+0.16 HM for confidence weighting), modest on UCF101 (+0.62), and largest on domain-shifted EuroSAT (+5.78). These results update our earlier Caltech-only analysis and show that multi-teacher prompt distillation is most useful when the second teacher contributes complementary supervision under domain shift.

AI.tldr: 提出多教师提示蒸馏方法TheProfessor，通过结合域微调ViT-L/14教师和零样本EVA-CLIP-L/14教师的知识，在4个基础到新数据集上提升性能。
AI.motivation: 单教师提示蒸馏PromptKD仅使用一个教师模型，文章认为多教师蒸馏可提供更丰富的监督信号，特别是在领域偏移情况下。
AI.method: 构建两教师集成：域微调PromptSRC ViT-L/14教师 + 零样本EVA-CLIP-L/14教师（logits预计算）。测试等概率集成和置信度加权集成两种融合策略。
AI.result: 置信度加权集成将平均HM从87.52提升至89.28（+1.77点），等概率集成提升至88.88（+1.37点）。在EuroSAT领域偏移数据集上提升最大（+5.78 HM）。
AI.conclusion: 多教师提示蒸馏在第二教师提供互补监督时最有效，尤其在领域偏移场景下增益显著。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about Vision-Language Models for image classification (satellite images - EuroSAT dataset) and prompt distillation for base-to-new generalization. While it mentions VLM and uses ViT/EVA-CLIP, the application domain is completely different from Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. The paper addresses image classification, not 3D motion generation, video-to-motion extraction, or cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion space. The methods (prompt distillation, knowledge distillation) are unrelated to the required methods (diffusion-based motion synthesis, visual-guided feature extraction for 3D motion).

title: Beyond Trajectory Imitation: Strategy-Guided Policy Optimization for LLM Reasoning
summary: Distilling reasoning capabilities from strong to weak language models typically involves imitating specific solution trajectories, effectively transferring what to answer rather than how to reason. This trajectory-level imitation encourages memorization of instance-specific steps rather than acquisition of transferable problem-solving skills, limiting generalization to novel problems. We propose Strategy-Guided Policy Optimization (SGPO), which replaces instance-level trajectory imitation with reusable strategy distillation. SGPO extracts structured strategy descriptions from strong-model responses and, for each problem, constructs both autonomous and strategy-guided trajectories to enable direct comparison of the model's behavior with and without strategic guidance. The framework then addresses two key questions. For how to distill, a token-level forward-KL objective selectively transfers the distributional shift induced by strategy conditioning into the unguided policy, with proximal constraints ensuring stability. For when to distill, adaptive instance-level weighting strengthens guidance when autonomous exploration falls short and reduces it as the model's own competence grows. Experiments on four mathematical benchmarks across two model families show that SGPO consistently outperforms SFT, on-policy RL, and hybrid-policy baselines, improving the average score by 2.2 points over the strongest baseline on Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct. Analysis reveals that the forward-KL objective provides an inherently selective distillation signal that outperforms direct trajectory imitation, and that strategy distillation exhibits complementary scaling with base model capability.

AI.tldr: SGPO是一种从强模型向弱模型提取可复用推理策略的新方法，通过对比有/无策略引导的轨迹进行蒸馏，而非简单模仿完整解题轨迹。
AI.motivation: 现有轨迹级模仿导致记忆特定实例步骤而非习得可迁移的解题技能，限制了对新问题的泛化能力。
AI.method: 从强模型响应中提取结构化策略描述，为每个问题构建自主和策略引导两种轨迹，采用token级前向KL目标选择性转移策略条件引发的分布变化，结合近端约束确保稳定性，并通过自适应实例级权重动态调整指导强度。
AI.result: 在四个数学基准数据集上，SGPO在两个模型家族上均一致优于SFT、在线RL和混合策略基线，在Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct上比最强基线平均提升2.2分。
AI.conclusion: 前向KL目标提供了本质上优于直接轨迹模仿的选择性蒸馏信号，策略蒸馏与基础模型能力呈互补缩放关系。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM reasoning and mathematical problem solving - completely different application domain from Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion / 3D Human Motion Generation. It has nothing to do with video-to-motion extraction, visual-guided feature extraction, 3D motion generation models, or diffusion-based motion synthesis. The pain points and methods in the research profile (VLM for video understanding, motion generation, cross-modal alignment) are entirely unrelated to this LLM strategy optimization paper.

title: Trustworthy Image Authentication using Forensic Knowledge Graphs
summary: Advances in generative AI have made image falsification highly realistic, demanding trustworthy authentication systems. Existing forensic detectors can target certain forgery types but lack interpretability, while vision-language models (VLMs) provide explanations but cannot exploit forensic traces for reliable detection. We propose Forensic Knowledge Graphs (FKGs), a unified framework that integrates forensic evidence extraction, structured reasoning, and human-interpretable explanation. Our FKG structure encodes forensic traces along with their causal dependencies and links to scene content. To generate accurate FKGs, we introduce a novel forensic authentication network and an Iterative Context Refinement strategy that guides VLMs to produce faithful, grounded explanations. We also present FKG-50K, a dataset of 50,000 realistic forgeries with ground-truth FKGs. Experiments demonstrate that FKG outperforms both forensic detectors and VLMs in detection, forgery identification and localization, and forensic justification.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为Forensic Knowledge Graphs (FKGs)的新型统一框架，用于图像伪造检测和可解释性认证。该框架整合了取证证据提取、结构化推理和人类可解释的解释。论文还提出了FKG-50K数据集，包含50,000个真实伪造图像。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI使得图像伪造高度逼真，现有检测器缺乏可解释性，而视觉语言模型虽能提供解释但无法利用取证痕迹进行可靠检测。需要一个既准确又可解释的图像伪造检测系统。
AI.method: 提出FKG结构编码取证痕迹及其因果依赖关系，链接到场景内容。引入取证认证网络和迭代上下文精炼策略(Iterative Context Refinement)来引导视觉语言模型产生忠实、可落地的解释。构建了包含50,000个真实伪造图像及对应真值FKG的数据集FKG-50K。
AI.result: FKG在检测、伪造识别和定位以及取证理由方面均优于现有取证检测器和视觉语言模型。
AI.conclusion: FKG是一个有效的图像伪造检测框架，能够同时实现高精度检测和人类可理解的理由解释，为可信的图像认证系统提供了新的研究方向。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about image forgery detection and digital forensics (using Forensic Knowledge Graphs for detecting fake/manipulated images), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - specifically Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domains are entirely different: image authentication vs. human motion synthesis. Although both mention "Visual Language Model (VLM)", using VLM for detecting forged images is fundamentally different from using VLM/VGM for generating 3D human motions from text or video. These are separate research fields with no meaningful overlap.

title: Exploring Academic Influence of Algorithms by Co-occurrence Network Based on Full-text of Academic Papers
summary: Algorithms have become central to scientific research in the era of artificial intelligence (AI). Although algorithm mentions in papers are often used to indicate popularity and influence, existing studies usually evaluate individual algorithms in isolation and pay limited attention to the collective influence formed through their interconnections. This study constructs large-scale algorithm co-occurrence networks in natural language processing (NLP) based on the full text of academic papers and investigates algorithm influence from a network perspective. Using deep learning models, we extract algorithm entities and build overall, cumulative, and annual co-occurrence networks. We analyze their structural characteristics and apply multiple centrality measures to assess the group influence of algorithms across the whole field and over time. The results show that algorithm networks display typical features of complex networks, with increasingly dense connections developing over approximately two decades. Classic, high-performing algorithms and those located at the intersections of different research periods tend to have high popularity, control, centrality, and balanced influence. When the influence of an algorithm declines, it usually loses its core network position first, followed by weaker associations with other algorithms. This study is the first large-scale analysis of algorithm co-occurrence networks. Covering more than four decades of academic publications, it provides a temporal and structural view of algorithm influence and offers a foundation for future research on networks linking algorithms, scholars, and tasks.

AI.tldr: 本研究构建了自然语言处理领域的大规模算法共现网络，从网络视角研究算法影响力。使用深度学习模型提取算法实体，构建整体、累积和年度共现网络，分析结构特征并应用多种中心性度量评估算法的群体影响力。
AI.motivation: 在人工智能时代，算法已成为科学研究的中心。现有研究通常孤立评估单个算法，未充分关注算法之间互联形成的集体影响力。算法提及虽常用于反映流行度和影响力，但缺乏从网络角度的系统分析。
AI.method: 使用深度学习模型从学术论文全文中提取算法实体，构建整体、累积和年度共现网络。分析网络结构特征，应用多种中心性度量指标评估算法在整个领域和随时间推移的群体影响力。
AI.result: 算法网络呈现复杂网络的典型特征，连接在过去约二十年中日益密集。经典高性能算法及位于不同研究时期交叉点的算法通常具有高流行度、控制力、中心性和均衡影响力。算法影响力下降时，首先失去核心网络位置，随后与其他算法的关联减弱。
AI.conclusion: 本研究是首个大规模算法共现网络分析，涵盖四十多年学术出版物，提供了算法影响力的时间维度和结构视角，为未来链接算法、学者和任务的网络研究奠定基础。

relevance_reason: This paper is about analyzing algorithm influence in NLP academic literature through co-occurrence networks - a bibliometrics/informetrics study. It has NO relevance to Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion 3D human motion generation. The application domain is completely different (NLP/academic analysis vs. computer graphics/motion synthesis), and the methods are unrelated (entity extraction from academic text vs. video-to-motion generation). This is essentially a survey paper about algorithms in literature, not a motion generation or computer graphics paper.

title: DivRL: Disentangled Self-Similarity Rewards for Diverse Subject-Driven Generation
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026. Project page: https://qianwangx.github.io/DivRL/
summary: Subject-driven image generation faces an "Identity-Diversity Paradox", where strong identity preservation often leads to rigid and low-diversity outputs. We propose a post-training framework called DivRL that jointly optimizes identity consistency and structural diversity simultaneously by leveraging disentangled visual features from a robust similarity model. Specifically, we introduce a Negative Self-Similarity Measure (nSSM) to quantify structural diversity, and Visual Semantic Matching (VSM) to evaluate identity consistency. We propose an "Explore-and-Suppress" strategy that treats VSM as a gated constraint: the model freely explores structurally diverse configurations, and only samples that violate the identity threshold are penalized via a quadratic hinge loss. This converts identity preservation from a competing objective into a feasibility constraint, allowing nSSM and VSM to improve jointly. Experiments demonstrate that our method effectively pushes the model to generate both consistent and diverse images and improves structural diversity while maintaining comparable identity consistency through a gated optimization formulation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DivRL框架，通过"探索-抑制"策略和门控优化方法，解决图像生成中的"身份-多样性悖论"，在保持身份一致性的同时提升结构多样性。
AI.motivation: 主题驱动图像生成中存在"身份-多样性悖论"：强身份保留通常导致输出单一、缺乏多样性。
AI.method: 引入负自相似性度量(nSSM)量化结构多样性，视觉语义匹配(VSM)评估身份一致性；采用"探索-抑制"策略，将VSM作为门控约束，使用二次铰链损失惩罚违规样本，实现身份保留从竞争目标到可行性约束的转换。
AI.result: 方法有效推动模型生成一致且多样的图像，在维持相当身份一致性的同时提升结构多样性。
AI.conclusion: 门控优化公式使nSSM和VSM能够联合改进，为身份-多样性平衡问题提供了有效解决方案。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant application domain. The paper is about subject-driven IMAGE generation (creating diverse images while preserving subject identity), whereas the research profile is specifically about 3D HUMAN MOTION generation (text-to-motion). Even though both may use diffusion models, the application domains are entirely different - generating images vs generating human motion are fundamentally different tasks in computer graphics. The paper addresses "identity-diversity paradox" in image space, not any of the pain points related to motion extraction, VLM-based screening, or cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion.

title: ReMMD: Realistic Multilingual Multi-Image Agentic Verification for Multimodal Misinformation Detection
comment: The project is available at https://dang-ai.github.io/ReMMD
summary: Multimodal misinformation detection is increasingly important because viral posts now combine long multilingual narratives, several images, mixed provenance, and subtle text--image framing errors. Existing benchmarks and methods remain poorly matched to this setting: they usually isolate short captions, single images, binary labels, or one manipulation source, while agentic verification remains costly under realistic evidence search. We present ReMMD, a realistic multilingual multi-image agentic verification framework for multimodal misinformation detection. ReMMD includes ReMMDBench, a real-world multimodal misinformation detection benchmark with 500 samples, 2,756 images, five monolingual languages, two cross-lingual settings, three text-length tiers, multi-image posts, five-way veracity labels, eight distortion labels, evidence provenance, and rationales. It also includes ReMMD-Agent, a persistent-memory verifier that decomposes posts into atomic points, builds a reusable evidence set, and predicts structured L1/L2/L3 outputs. Across proprietary systems, open LVLMs, MMD-Agent, and T2-Agent, ReMMD-Agent obtains the best five-way veracity performance, with 41.80% accuracy and 39.12% macro-F1 using GPT-5.2, while reducing cost by 17.5% relative to MMD-Agent and 79.9% relative to T2-Agent. The project is available at https://dang-ai.github.io/ReMMD.

AI.tldr: ReMMD是一个真实的多语言多图像智能体验证框架，用于多模态虚假信息检测，包含ReMMDBench基准数据集（500样本、2756图像、五种单语言、两种跨语言设置等）和ReMMD-Agent持久记忆验证器。该框架在五路真实性分类任务上取得最佳性能，使用GPT-5.2达到41.80%准确率和39.12%宏F1，同时比同类方法降低17.5%-79.9%的成本。
AI.motivation: 现有基准和方法与现实设置不匹配：通常只处理短字幕、单图像、二元标签或单一操作来源，而智能体验证在真实证据搜索下成本高昂。病毒帖子现在结合长多语言叙事、多张图像、混合来源和微妙的文本-图像框架错误。
AI.method: 构建ReMMD框架，包括：（1）ReMMDBench基准数据集，包含500样本、2756图像、五种单语言、两种跨语言设置、三种文本长度层级、多图像帖子、五路真实性标签、八路扭曲标签、证据来源和推理；（2）ReMMD-Agent持久记忆验证器，将帖子分解为原子点、构建可重用证据集、预测结构化L1/L2/L3输出。
AI.result: 在五路真实性分类上，ReMMD-Agent使用GPT-5.2获得最佳性能：41.80%准确率和39.12%宏F1；比MMD-Agent降低成本17.5%，比T2-Agent降低成本79.9%。
AI.conclusion: ReMMD框架为多模态虚假信息检测提供了更现实的评估基准和更高效的验证方法，推动了该领域向真实复杂场景的发展。

relevance_reason: This paper is about multimodal misinformation detection on social media (detecting fake posts with multiple images and multilingual text), which is completely unrelated to the research profile about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. While both mention VLM (Visual Language Model), the application domains are entirely different: this paper uses VLM for truth verification of social media content, whereas the research profile needs VLM for generating human motion from text/video inputs. The pain points are also completely mismatched - this paper addresses misinformation detection costs, not 3D motion extraction from 2D video or cross-modal alignment between video and motion space. This is a case of using similar AI terminology in completely different application domains.

title: Token-to-Token Alignment of Text Embeddings for Semantic Blending
summary: In modern generative models, images are specified and controlled through text prompts. In practice, images are generated from sequences of tokens derived from these prompts. However, the space of token sequences lacks a consistent accessible structure: semantically similar images may correspond to sequences that differ in wording, ordering, and placement of concepts, while similar token sequences may encode very different semantics. This apparent lack of structure makes it difficult to perform smooth transitions in this space, hindering applications such as image blending and continuous control of edits. We argue that this limitation stems not from the absence of semantic structure, but from misalignment between representations. To address this misalignment, we introduce Token-to-Token alignment, a framework that establishes explicit semantic correspondence between tokens across prompts. Our approach transforms prompts into a structured representation in which semantically corresponding concepts are mapped to consistent positions across prompts, and then aligns their token embeddings based on semantic similarity. Concretely, the method consists of two stages: a structural alignment that rephrases prompts into a shared structured form, followed by an embedding-level alignment that matches token representations across prompts. With this alignment in place, simple linear interpolation becomes a meaningful operation, producing smooth and coherent semantic transitions and enabling applications such as blending and continuous editing. Our results show that text embedding spaces in text-to-image models implicitly encode a continuous semantic structure that becomes accessible once representations are properly aligned, suggesting that semantic control can be achieved by organizing existing representations rather than modifying the generative model.

AI.tldr: 针对文本到图像模型中token序列缺乏语义结构的问题，提出Token-to-Token对齐框架，通过结构对齐和嵌入级对齐建立跨提示词的语义对应关系，使线性插值能够产生平滑的语义过渡。
AI.motivation: 图像生成中token序列缺乏一致的语义结构：语义相似的图像可能对应不同的词序，相似的token序列可能编码不同语义，导致难以进行平滑过渡、图像混合和连续编辑控制。
AI.method: 两阶段方法：(1)结构对齐将提示词重述为共享结构形式，使语义对应概念映射到一致位置；(2)嵌入级对齐基于语义相似性匹配跨提示词的token表示。
AI.result: 文本嵌入空间隐含编码连续语义结构，一旦正确对齐即可访问；简单线性插值变为有意义操作，能产生平滑连贯语义过渡，实现图像混合和连续编辑等应用。
AI.conclusion: 语义控制可通过组织现有表示实现，无需修改生成模型；文本嵌入空间本身具有连续语义结构，只是之前未正确对齐。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on TEXT-TO-IMAGE generation (text embeddings for semantic blending in image generation), completely different from the research profile's TEXT-TO-MOTION in 3D HUMAN MOTION GENERATION. Even though both involve "text-to" frameworks, the application domains are entirely different - image generation vs. 3D human motion generation. The paper does not address any of the pain points (3D motion extraction from 2D video, VLM-based quality assessment, visual-guided feature extraction, cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion space). It uses token alignment for image generation, not motion synthesis. This is a case of using similar methods in completely different application domains.

title: VeryTrace: Verifying Reasoning Traces through Compilable Formalism and Structured Verification
summary:
Multi-step reasoning with Chain-of-Thought (CoT) prompting remains fragile: logical errors or hallucinations in early steps silently propagate, producing confident but incorrect conclusions. This paper presents VeryTrace, a zero-shot verification-and-repair framework that formalizes natural-language reasoning traces into a structured, compilable representation. VeryTrace introduces a Domain-Specific Language (DSL) that (i) makes step dependencies explicit, (ii) mechanizes quantitative content as executable expressions, and (iii) structures semantic inferences via deduction schemas. Our hybrid verifier combines deterministic checks for computational correctness, dependency resolution, and constraint satisfaction with targeted LLM audits for non-mechanizable semantic judgments, enabling step-level error localization and repair.
  Across three diverse domains-competition mathematics (AIME 2025), robotics planning (LLM-BabyBench), and kinship reasoning (CLUTRR), VeryTrace improves accuracy over zero-shot baselines on state-of-the-art LLMs without requiring domain-specific training or in-context examples, demonstrating that formalized trace verification achieves both precision and generalization.

AI.tldr: VeryTrace是一个零样本验证修复框架，通过将自然语言推理轨迹形式化为结构化表示来检测和修复思维链推理中的错误。
AI.motivation: 多步推理中的思维链(CoT)提示仍然脆弱：早期步骤中的逻辑错误或幻觉会 silently 传播，产生自信但错误的结论。
AI.method: VeryTrace引入了一种领域特定语言(DSL)，使步骤依赖关系明确，将定量内容 mechanize 为可执行表达式，并通过演绎模式构建语义推理。混合验证器结合了确定性检查(计算正确性、依赖解析、约束满足)和针对非 mechanizable 语义判断的 LLM 审计，实现步骤级错误定位和修复。
AI.result: 在三个不同领域(竞赛数学AIME 2025、机器人规划LLM-BabyBench、亲属关系推理CLUTTR)中，VeryTrace在不使用领域特定训练或上下文示例的情况下，提高了最先进LLM的零样本基线准确性。
AI.conclusion: 形式化轨迹验证既实现了精确性又实现了泛化性，表明通过结构化表示和验证可以有效解决思维链推理中的错误传播问题。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about LLM reasoning verification and formal methods for Chain-of-Thought reasoning (NLP/AI field), not about Computer Graphics or 3D Human Motion Generation. While it uses VLM (Visual Language Model), the application is reasoning verification for math/robot planning problems - not for video-to-motion extraction, visual-guided feature extraction for motion synthesis, or cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion. The methods (DSL-based formal verification, deterministic checking) are unrelated to diffusion-based motion synthesis or visual-guided feature extraction used in the research profile.

title: DriveStack-VLA: Render-Teacher Alignment for BEV-Based DeepStack Vision-Language-Action Model
summary: Vision-Language-Action driving models convert a pretrained Vision-Language Model into a driving policy, allowing them to use world knowledge and follow language guidances. However, existing VLA driving models still lack driving-oriented spatial intelligence: their policies are mainly grounded on perspective image tokens and language priors, while precise motion planning requires metric geometry, top-down scene structure, and attention to safety-critical perceptual cues. This limitation makes current models vulnerable to weak visual geometry modeling and perceptual coverage in expert demonstrations. In this paper, we present DriveStack-VLA, a framework built upon a large VLM backbone. To strengthen the spatial grounding of VLA driving, we develop dual visual modeling components. We inject a Bird-Eye-View representation into the Large Language Model decoder through a DeepStack-style connection, and propose Render-Teacher Alignment to align the perceptual focus of real images with that of rasterized images. Furthermore, to bridge the gap in multimodal trajectory selection, we introduce a head-based self-critique module that ranks sampled trajectories and conditionally refines the best one. DriveStack-VLA achieves 91.6 PDMS on NAVSIMv1, 91.0 EPDMS on NAVSIMv2 (with the human penalty filter enabled), and a driving score of 79.49 with a success rate of 56.36\% on the closed-loop Bench2Drive. More visualizations are available on our project page: https://anonymous.4open.science/w/drivestack-vla/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DriveStack-VLA框架，通过双重视觉建模和自批判模块增强VLA驾驶模型的空间 grounding 能力，在NAVSim和Bench2Drive基准上取得领先性能。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA驾驶模型缺乏空间智能：策略主要基于透视图像token和语言先验，缺少精确运动规划所需的度量几何、鸟瞰视角场景结构和安全关键感知线索的关注，导致模型在弱视觉几何建模和专家演示的感知覆盖方面存在脆弱性。
AI.method: 1) 双重视觉建模：注入BEV表示到LLM解码器（DeepStack风格连接）+ Render-Teacher Alignment对齐真实图像与光栅化图像的感知焦点；2) 头部自批判模块：对采样轨迹排序并有条件优化最佳轨迹。
AI.result: NAVSIMv1: 91.6 PDMS；NAVSIMv2: 91.0 EPDMS（启用人类惩罚过滤器）；Bench2Drive闭环：79.49驾驶分数，56.36%成功率。
AI.conclusion: DriveStack-VLA通过空间 grounding 增强和多模态轨迹选择改进，显著提升了VLA驾驶模型的空间理解能力和安全关键场景的性能表现。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about autonomous driving/VLA for self-driving cars using BEV representations, while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. Although both mention VLM, they are used in entirely different contexts: vehicle motion planning vs human motion synthesis. Human motion generation and vehicle motion planning are NOT the same application domain. The paper does not address any of the pain points (3D motion extraction from 2D video, quality assessment for motion, visual-guided feature extraction for human motion, cross-modal alignment in human motion space).

title: OmniPath: A Multi-Modal Agentic Framework for Auditing Wheelchair Accessibility
comment: 10 pages, 13 figures. Submitted to IEEE COMPSAC 2026. OmniPath: A Multi-Modal Agentic Framework for Auditing Wheelchair Accessibility
summary: For a wheelchair user, a standard blue line on a map is often a broken promise. While platforms like OpenStreetMap (OSM) successfully capture where a path is, they frequently fail to convey how it physically feels to travel on it. This information barrier is problematic for wheelchair users. To solve this issue, we present OmniPath, a system that moves from passive mapping to proactive environmental auditing. Our framework fuses the network topology of OSM with the submeter precision of high-density aerial LiDAR (USGS 3DEP) to create a high-fidelity 3D model of the pedestrian environment. Rather than simply routing a user, our agent virtually traverses the network, analyzing the surface in 0.5 meter increments. It rigorously quantifies physical friction points specifically running slope, cross slope, and vertical discontinuities against ADA compliance standards, calculating a weighted severity score to categorize hazards from ``Mild'' to ``Critical.'' To ensure real world reliability, we validated the system against 200 physical ground truth field surveys across the National Mall using stratified random sampling. The framework demonstrated strong diagnostic reliability for high-severity hazards, achieving F1-scores of 0.60 for Severe and 0.58 for critical categories. By automating this micro-scale inspection, OmniPath identifies the ``invisible'' barriers that standard maps miss, effectively transforming a static dataset into accessibility data source that anticipates accessibility challenges before the user ever leaves home.

AI.tldr: OmniPath是一个将OpenStreetMap路网数据与航空LiDAR高程数据融合的系统，用于主动审核无障碍环境。它虚拟遍历路网并以0.5米间隔分析路面，量化坡度、横坡和垂直中断等物理摩擦点，根据ADA标准计算危害严重性评分，将障碍分为"轻度"到"严重"级别。
AI.motivation: 现有地图如OpenStreetMap仅能显示路径位置，但无法传达路面实际行驶感受。对于轮椅用户来说，标准蓝线地图常常是虚假承诺，无法了解路径的真实物理特性，造成出行障碍。
AI.method: 融合OSM路网拓扑与USGS 3DEP亚米精度航空LiDAR数据创建高保真3D行人环境模型。代理虚拟遍历网络，以0.5米增量分析路面，量化运行坡度、横坡和垂直中断，根据ADA合规标准计算加权严重性评分来分类危害等级。
AI.result: 在国家购物中心200个实地调查的验证中，系统对高严重性危害表现出强诊断可靠性，严重危害类别F1分数达0.60，关键危害类别F1分数达0.58。
AI.conclusion: 通过自动化微观尺度检查，OmniPath识别了标准地图遗漏的"无形"障碍，有效将静态数据集转变为无障碍数据源，使用户在家即可预判无障碍挑战。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant - This paper is about wheelchair accessibility auditing using GIS/ LiDAR data for urban planning, not Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion generation. The application domain is entirely different: geographic accessibility analysis vs. 3D human motion synthesis. No overlap in methods (no diffusion models, VLM for motion, video generation models) or application (physical wheelchair navigation vs. virtual human motion generation).

title: EPEdit: Redefining Image Editing with Generative AI and User-Centric Design
summary: The demand for image manipulation has seen a significant increase recently. Traditional tools like Photoshop and Capture One, while powerful, require considerable expertise to use effectively. Generative AI has introduced alternative platforms, such as Luminar Neo, Pixlr X, and Canva. However, many of these solutions, including resource-heavy models like Stable Diffusion, often require substantial retraining and fine-tuning, leading to high costs for users. To address these challenges, we introduce Efficient Photo Editor (EPEdit), an application that integrates a robust backend framework with a user-friendly front-end interface. EPEdit supports a wide range of creative image editing tasks, including image generation, object replacement, object removal, background modification, changes in object pose or perspective, region-specific editing, and thematic collection design, all guided by masks and prompts. Users can interact with the system through simple text commands or by marking areas for precise adjustments, making it accessible even to those without technical expertise. At its core, EPEdit leverages zero-shot image editing algorithms based on Stable Diffusion model, removing the need for additional fine-tuning. This approach enables efficient image manipulation and thematic collection creation. User evaluations for tasks of image editing, thematic design, and overall system performance demonstrate that EPEdit outperforms existing solutions, offering a user-friendly, cost-effective solution for comprehensive image editing.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了EPEdit（高效照片编辑器），一个基于Stable Diffusion零-shot图像编辑算法的图像编辑应用程序，无需额外微调即可支持图像生成、对象替换、对象删除、背景修改、姿态调整、区域编辑和主题集合设计等功能。
