AI.motivation: 传统图像编辑工具（如Photoshop）需要专业知识；现有AI解决方案（如Stable Diffusion）需要大量 retraining 和微调，成本高昂。
AI.method: EPEdit将强大的后端框架与用户友好的前端界面相结合，利用基于Stable Diffusion的零-shot图像编辑算法，支持文本命令和区域标记交互。
AI.result: 用户评估表明，EPEdit在图像编辑、主题设计和整体系统性能方面均优于现有解决方案。
AI.conclusion: EPEdit是一个用户友好、成本效益高的综合图像编辑解决方案。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about 2D image editing using Stable Diffusion (text-to-image generation), while the research profile is about 3D human motion generation (text-to-motion). Although both use diffusion models, the application domains are entirely different - image synthesis vs motion synthesis. The paper does not address any of the research pain points (3D motion extraction from 2D video, VLM-based screening, visual-guided feature extraction, or cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion). No overlap in methods or application domain.

title: T2D-Bench: Evidence-Gated Evaluation of LLM Outputs for Type 2 Diabetes Using a Multi-Layer Clinical-Lifestyle Knowledge Graph
comment: 7 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables. Accepted as a poster at AMIA 2026 Annual Symposium
summary: Large language models (LLMs) can produce clinically fluent recommendations for type 2 diabetes while failing to satisfy guideline constraints or explicitly justify lifestyle-related glycemic claims. We present T2D-Bench, a reproducible benchmark and evidence-gated evaluation framework for testing whether LLM outputs satisfy explicit, graph-checkable evidence requirements. T2D-Bench is built on a multi-layer clinical-lifestyle knowledge graph that combines a biomedical spine (UMLS, DrugBank, SIDER), computable ADA Standards of Care rules, and lifestyle knowledge connected through a mechanistic bridge to glycemic laboratory effects. Across 100 structured vignettes spanning diagnosis, medication safety, and adversarial lifestyle conflicts, baseline outputs failed benchmark-defined evidence-path checks in 35% of cases for GPT-4o-mini and 33% for GPT-4o. The evidence gate detects unsupported omissions and uses constrained revision to bring outputs into verifier-level compliance with benchmark-defined evidence requirements. These results show that computable evidence constraints can make unsupported clinical omissions explicit, measurable, and correctable in diabetes-focused LLM outputs.

AI.tldr: T2D-Bench是一个用于测试LLM在2型糖尿病临床建议中是否满足可验证证据要求的基准测试框架。该基准结合了生物医学知识图谱(UMLS、DrugBank、SIDER)、ADA护理标准规则和生活方式知识,覆盖100个结构化病例。测试结果显示GPT-4o-mini和GPT-4o分别有35%和33%的案例未能通过证据路径检查。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型能够生成临床流利的建议,但往往无法满足指南约束或明确证明生活方式相关的血糖声明。现有方法缺乏可重现的基准来系统性地测试LLM输出是否满足可 graph-checkable 的证据要求。
AI.method: 构建多层临床-生活方式知识图谱:结合生物医学脊柱(UMLS、DrugBank、SIDER)、可计算的ADA护理标准规则,以及通过机制桥接与血糖实验室效应相关的生活方式知识。跨越100个结构化病例(涵盖诊断、药物安全和对抗性生活方式冲突)进行测试,并使用证据门控检测不支持的遗漏,通过约束修正使输出达到验证器级别的合规性。
AI.result: GPT-4o-mini在35%的案例中未能通过基准定义的证据路径检查,GPT-4o为33%。证据门控能够检测不支持的遗漏,并通过约束修正使输出达到基准定义的证据要求合规性。
AI.conclusion: 可计算的证据约束可以使不支持的临床遗漏在糖尿病相关的LLM输出中变得明确、可测量和可纠正。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The paper is about medical/healthcare AI (Type 2 Diabetes clinical recommendations using knowledge graphs), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. Although both involve LLMs/VLMs, the paper addresses medical evidence verification and clinical knowledge graphs, not 3D human motion generation, visual-guided feature extraction, or cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion space. This is a medical AI paper with zero overlap with computer graphics or motion generation domains.

title: VisChronos: Revolutionizing Image Captioning Through Real-Life Events
summary: This paper aims to bridge the semantic gap between visual content and natural language understanding by leveraging historical events in the real world as a source of knowledge for caption generation. We propose VisChronos, a novel framework that utilizes large language models and dense captioning models to identify and describe real-life events from a single input image. Our framework can automatically generate detailed and context-aware event descriptions, enhancing the descriptive quality and contextual relevance of generated captions to address the limitations of traditional methods in capturing contextual narratives. Furthermore, we introduce a new dataset, EventCap (https://zenodo.org/records/14004909), specifically constructed using the proposed framework, designed to enhance the model's ability to identify and understand complex events. The user study demonstrates the efficacy of our solution in generating accurate, coherent, and event-focused descriptions, paving the way for future research in event-centric image understanding.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出VisChronos框架，利用大语言模型和密集captioning模型从单张图像中识别并描述真实历史事件，自动生成详细、上下文感知的事件描述，并构建了EventCap数据集以提升模型对复杂事件的理解能力。
AI.motivation: 传统图像caption方法难以捕捉上下文叙事，存在语义gap。该研究旨在弥合视觉内容与自然语言理解之间的鸿沟，利用历史事件作为知识源来增强生成caption的描述质量和上下文相关性。
AI.method: 提出VisChronos框架，融合大语言模型(LLM)和密集captioning模型，从单张输入图像中自动识别并描述真实世界的事件，构建了EventCap数据集。
AI.result: 框架能够生成准确、连贯且聚焦事件的描述，用户研究验证了该方案的有效性，为以事件为中心的图像理解研究提供了新途径。
AI.conclusion: VisChronos框架成功解决了传统方法在捕获上下文叙事方面的局限性，为事件-centric图像理解的未来研究奠定了基础。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile focuses on Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation (generating 3D human motions from video/text inputs), while this paper is about Image Captioning (generating text descriptions from 2D images). Although both mention "VLM" (Visual Language Model), this paper uses VLM for image-to-text captioning, not for motion-related tasks. The pain points are unrelated - this paper doesn't address 3D motion extraction from 2D video, quality assessment for motion VLM screening, visual-guided feature extraction for motion models, or cross-modal 2D video to 3D motion alignment. The application domains are fundamentally different: computer graphics/motion generation vs. image understanding/captioning.

title: The Geometry Behind Diffusion and Flow Matching: Gradient Flows and Geodesics in Wasserstein Space
summary: The space $\mathcal{P}_2(\mathbb{R}^d$) of probability measures with finite second moment carries a natural geometry: the quadratic Wasserstein distance W_2 makes it a complete metric space and, following Otto, a (formal) Riemannian manifold whose geodesics are the optimal-transport interpolations. On this manifold, the gradient flow of the free energy F(rho) = KL(rho || π) is exactly the Fokker-Planck equation, and its implicit-Euler discretization is the JKO scheme. This is the geometry underlying diffusion models: the forward process descends the free energy, and each denoising step realizes one JKO step, which recovers DDPM, DDIM, NCSN/SMLD, and Energy Matching; this is one scheme, not separate theories. The same manifold supports a second variational principle. Its geodesics - the minimum-action curves of the Benamou-Brenier formula - are precisely the optimal-transport paths that Flow Matching learns. Fixing both endpoints and following the geodesic, generation becomes a deterministic ODE along a straight line, hence far fewer sampling steps. Placing both families of models on one manifold makes their relationship exact: diffusion follows a free-energy gradient flow, an initial-value problem; optimal-transport Flow Matching follows a Wasserstein geodesic, a boundary-value problem. The two reach the same endpoints along different paths.

AI.tldr: 作者将扩散模型和流匹配模型统一在Wasserstein空间的同一黎曼流形上，揭示两者分别对应自由能梯度流（初值问题）和最优传输测地线（边值问题），虽路径不同但终点相同。
AI.motivation: 当前扩散模型（DDPM、DDIM等）和流匹配模型（Flow Matching）被视为独立理论，缺乏统一的几何解释。作者旨在建立一个统一的数学框架，阐明这两类生成模型在最优传输几何下的内在联系。
AI.method: 运用Otto的Wasserstein几何理论，基于Benamou-Brenier公式的最小作用量原理，分析扩散模型的JKO格式与流匹配模型的测地线性质。
AI.result: 扩散模型对应自由能泛函KL(ρ||π)的梯度流，其隐式欧拉离散化即JKO格式；流匹配学习的是连接两端点的最优传输路径，即Wasserstein测地线。前者是初值问题，后者是边值问题。
AI.conclusion: 将两类模型统一在同一流形上，揭示它们从不同起点沿不同路径到达相同终点：扩散模型通过梯度下降多步采样，流匹配模型沿测地线少步生成，这深化了对生成模型几何结构的理解。

relevance_reason: This is a theoretical/mathematical paper about the geometry of diffusion models in optimal transport theory (Wasserstein space). While it discusses diffusion models, it has NO connection to the Computer Graphics application domain of 3D Human Motion Generation. The paper doesn't address any of the specified pain points (3D motion extraction from 2D video, VLM quality assessment, visual-guided feature extraction, cross-modal alignment). It's purely about the mathematical foundations of diffusion models in abstract sense, not about generating, extracting, or processing human motion. The application domain is completely different - this belongs to theoretical machine learning/mathematics rather than computer graphics or text-to-motion generation.

title: Ingredient-Level Food Image Segmentation for Nutrition Awareness
summary: Food images often contain several visible ingredients, so assigning one dish label to an entire image hides important visual structure. This work studies ingredient-level semantic segmentation on FoodSeg103, where the model predicts an ingredient class for each pixel. Two SegFormer variants were fine-tuned and evaluated under a controlled setup: SegFormer-B0 as the smaller baseline model and SegFormer-B1 as the larger final model. Both models use ImageNet-pretrained MiT backbones with newly initialized 104-class output layers. On the held-out FoodSeg103 test split of 2,135 images, B0 achieved 0.7709 pixel accuracy and 0.2521 mean IoU, while B1 achieved 0.7929 pixel accuracy and 0.3204 mean IoU. B1 improved every saved test metric, including a +0.0683 absolute gain in mean IoU. The system also converts predicted masks into visible ingredient-area percentages, giving a simple visual composition summary of the predicted meal. This summary can serve as a first-pass nutrition-awareness cue by providing a visual alternative to detailed food tracking similar to plate-based meal guidance, but it is not a direct estimate of calories, macronutrients, food mass, volume, density, or true portion size.

AI.tldr: 本论文研究食物图像的食材级语义分割问题，在FoodSeg103数据集上对两种SegFormer模型（BiT-B0和BiT-B1）进行微调评估。实验表明较大的BiT-B1模型在2135张测试图像上取得更优性能，像素准确率达0.7929，平均IoU达0.3204，比B0模型提升6.68个百分点的绝对增益。
AI.motivation: 食物图像通常包含多种可见食材，为整张图像分配一个菜品标签会掩盖重要的视觉结构信息。现有方法缺乏对食材级别语义的理解，因此需要开展食材级语义分割研究，以更精细地理解食物图像内容。
AI.method: 在受控实验环境下微调两种SegFormer模型变体：较小的BiT-B0作为基线模型，较大的BiT-B1作为最终模型。两个模型均使用ImageNet预训练的MiT骨干网络，并重新初始化104类输出层。
AI.result: 在FoodSeg103测试集（2135张图像）上，B0模型达到0.7709像素准确率和0.2521平均IoU；B1模型达到0.7929像素准确率和0.3204平均IoU。B1在所有测试指标上均优于B0，平均IoU绝对增益达+0.0683。
AI.conclusion: 系统还能将预测掩膜转换为可见食材面积百分比，提供简单的视觉成分摘要。这一摘要可作为营养意识提示的初步参考，为详细食物追踪提供视觉替代方案，但并非热量、宏量营养素、食物质量、体积、密度或真实份量的直接估算。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The research profile is about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation, while this paper is about ingredient-level food image segmentation for nutrition awareness. These are entirely different application domains with no overlap - one deals with generating 3D human motion from text/video, the other deals with food/nutrition image analysis. Although both use image processing techniques, the purpose and domain are fundamentally different. The pain points, methods (SegFormer vs motion generation models), and objectives have no relation to the research profile.

title: An Introduction to Causal Reinforcement Learning
summary: Causal inference provides a set of principles and tools that allow one to combine data and knowledge about an environment to reason with questions of counterfactual nature, i.e., what would have happened had reality been different, even when no data of this unrealized reality is currently available. Reinforcement learning provides methods to learn a policy that optimizes a specific measure (e.g., reward, regret) when the agent is deployed in an environment and pursues an exploratory, trial-and-error approach. These two disciplines have evolved independently and with virtually no interaction between them. We note that they operate over different aspects of the same building block, counterfactual relations, which makes them umbilically connected. Based on these observations, novel learning opportunities arise when this connection is explicitly acknowledged and mathematized. To realize this potential, we note that any environment where the RL agent is deployed can be decomposed as a collection of autonomous mechanisms with different causal invariances, parsimoniously modeled as a structural causal model; any standard RL setting implicitly encodes such a model. This formalization allows us to put under a unifying treatment different modes of learning, including online, off-policy, and causal calculus learning, which appear unrelated in the literature. However, these modalities are not exhaustive: we introduce several natural and pervasive classes of learning settings that entail novel dimensions of analysis. Specifically, we introduce and discuss through causal lenses generalized policy learning, where to intervene, imitation learning, and counterfactual learning. These tasks lead to a broader view of counterfactual learning and suggest great potential for studying causal inference and reinforcement learning side by side, which we call causal reinforcement learning (CRL).

AI.tldr: 本文提出将因果推理与强化学习相结合，创建"因果强化学习"(CRL)新领域，通过结构因果模型(SCM)统一处理在线学习、离线策略学习和因果微积分学习等不同学习模式，并引入广义策略学习、模仿学习和反事实学习等新学习设置。
AI.motivation: 因果推理和强化学习两个领域独立发展，几乎没有交互，但它们处理的是同一对象——反事实关系，具有内在联系。文章旨在揭示这种连接并将其形式化，从而开辟新的学习机会。
AI.method: 将RL环境分解为具有不同因果不变性的自主机制，用结构因果模型(SCM)建模，将标准RL设置编码为这种模型，从而将不同学习模式置于统一框架下处理。
AI.result: 通过因果视角的形式化，发现了广义策略学习、模仿学习和反事实学习等新的自然且普遍的学习设置，这些任务扩展了反事实学习的视野。
AI.conclusion: 因果推理与强化学习的结合具有很大潜力， CRL是一个有价值且前景广阔的研究方向，值得深入探索。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Causal Reinforcement Learning - a completely different field from Computer Graphics and 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely wrong: CRL focuses on combining causal inference with RL for decision-making, not on generating or extracting 3D human motion from video. The methods (Structural Causal Models, RL) are unrelated to the research profile's methods (Video Generation Models, VLM, Diffusion-based Motion Synthesis). None of the pain points about 2D-to-3D motion extraction, visual-guided feature extraction, or cross-modal alignment are addressed.

title: ObsGraph: Hierarchical Observation Representation for Embodied Reasoning and Exploration
summary: Embodied reasoning and exploration are increasingly considered crucial abilities for robots operating in complex and unfamiliar environments. To accomplish tasks in such settings, an agent must identify and acquire the information necessary for the task through exploration. We propose ObsGraph, an observation-centric hierarchical scene graph that unifies scene representation, retrieval, and exploration. It retains visual evidence and organizes it into room-view-object layers: rooms provide coarse semantic anchors, views preserve contextual object covisibility, and objects store fine-grained details. On top of this representation, we perform coarse-to-fine hierarchical retrieval under a bounded budget, and crucially use retrieval outcomes to structure the exploration candidate space--activating room-level exploration, view refinement, or frontier exploration--thereby tightly coupling representation, retrieval, and adaptive multi-scale exploration. Experiments across embodied reasoning and exploration benchmarks demonstrate improved success and efficiency, highlighting the benefits of structured scene representation and more targeted information gathering driven by identified evidence gaps.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ObsGraph，一个观察中心化的层次化场景图，统一场景表示、检索和探索，用于机器人在复杂环境中的具身推理与探索任务。
AI.motivation: 机器人在复杂和陌生环境中完成任务需要通过探索识别和获取必要的信息，但现有方法缺乏统一的场景表示、检索和探索框架。
AI.method: 提出ObsGraph层次化场景图，包含room-view-object三层结构（房间提供粗粒度语义锚点、视图保留上下文对象共视性、对象存储细粒度细节），在此基础上进行粗到细的层次化检索，并利用检索结果指导探索候选空间的结构化。
AI.result: 在具身推理和探索基准测试中取得了更高的成功率和效率。
AI.conclusion: 结构化场景表示和基于证据缺口的目标性信息收集方法具有显著优势。

relevance_reason: This paper is about robotics and embodied AI (robot exploration and scene understanding), completely unrelated to the research profile's domain of Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. While both may deal with visual representations, the application domains are entirely different: this paper focuses on robot navigation and reasoning in complex environments, not on generating human motion from text/video. The goals, outputs, and downstream applications are fundamentally different.

title: Data Scale, Not Latency, Shapes Cross-Lingual Encoder Transfer in Streaming ASR
summary: Adapting a streaming speech recognition model to a new language requires choosing between two plausible warm starts: a multilingual (ML) encoder or an English-only (EN) encoder. The common intuition is that the multilingual encoder should help most at low data, but it is unclear how long that advantage persists, whether tight streaming latency amplifies it, and whether it survives deployment quantization. We answer these questions with a controlled sweep of a 0.6 B-parameter cache-aware FastConformer transducer across eight European languages, up to five target-language data scales (100 h to 2500 h), three streaming tiers plus offline decoding, and up to four public test sets. The main result is that multilingual initialization is a data-limited advantage, not a latency-limited one. On FLEURS at 160 ms, the mean EN-ML word error rate (WER) gap falls from +4.21 percentage points (pp) at 100 h to +0.20 pp at 2500 h; a power-law fit summarizes this decay, with each doubling of target-language data roughly halving the remaining advantage. Across the three streaming tiers, the across-language mean EN-ML gap is approximately stable at each scale from 100 to 1000 h, and is near zero by 2500 h. Finally, 4-bit weight-only encoder quantization at the matched 560 ms streaming tier reduces the encoder footprint by about 3x, with an average FLEURS WER increase of about 0.5 pp. The resulting guideline is simple: use multilingual initialization in low-data regimes, treat the choice as effectively irrelevant at large data, and make latency and quantization decisions independently.

AI.tldr: 研究对比了流式语音识别模型在不同语言适配场景下，多语言编码器与英语专用编码器的性能差异。通过在8种欧洲语言上的实验，发现多语言初始化在低数据量时有优势，但随着数据量增加优势递减，在大数据量(2500小时)时两者几乎无差异。流式延迟和量化基本不影响这一规律。
AI.motivation: 核心问题是：当将流式语音识别模型适配到新语言时，应该选择多语言编码器还是英语专用编码器作为warm start？这种选择在低数据/高延迟/量化场景下的表现尚不明确。
AI.method: 使用0.6B参数的FastConformer模型，在8种欧洲语言上开展对照实验，覆盖5个数据规模(100h-2500h)、3个流式延迟等级加离线解码、以及4个测试集。
AI.result: 主要发现：1)多语言初始化的优势是数据有限的，而非延迟有限的；2)WER差距从100h时的+4.21%降到2500h时的+0.20%，呈幂律衰减，每翻倍数据约减半优势；3)流式延迟 tiers间差异稳定；4)4-bit量化仅增加约0.5pp WER。
AI.conclusion: 实践建议：低数据场景用多语言初始化，大数据量时选择可忽略 latency和量化决策可独立进行

relevance_reason: This paper is about Speech Recognition (ASR) - specifically about cross-lingual encoder transfer for streaming speech recognition using FastConformer models. This is in the audio/speech processing domain, NOT Computer Graphics or 3D Human Motion Generation. The research profile is about text-to-motion generation in computer graphics using video generation models, VLMs, and diffusion-based motion synthesis. These are completely different application domains - one deals with speech/audio processing while the other deals with 3D human motion generation from video/text. Despite both using neural network methods, the application domains are entirely unrelated.

title: Fabric Image Demoiréing Benchmark from Synthesis to Restoration
summary: Fabric moiré is a sampling-induced aliasing artifact caused by the interaction between fine textile patterns and camera sensor grids, producing structured interference that severely degrades image quality. Unlike screen-induced moiré, which stems from strictly periodic display lattices, fabric moiré is intrinsically more challenging due to the broadband and semi-periodic nature of textile weaves. The heavy spectral overlap between intrinsic texture and aliasing components renders fabric demoiréing substantially more ill-posed. Consequently, existing models trained on screen moiré datasets generalize poorly to these complex textile patterns. Despite its practical importance, fabric image demoiréing remains underexplored and lacks standardized benchmarks. We present the first comprehensive benchmark for fabric image demoiréing. To address the difficulty of acquiring pixel-aligned real-world pairs, we develop a physically motivated synthesis framework and construct a large-scale dataset comprising 16,050 paired multi-resolution fabric images with controllable aliasing severity. Furthermore, we customize a baseline model, which establishes promising performance on the proposed benchmark dataset with strong generalization ability. Our benchmark provides a standardized platform for advancing research in fabric image demoiréing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了织物图像去摩尔纹的第一个综合基准测试。针对织物摩尔纹由于纺织品的宽带和半周期特性而难以处理的问题，作者开发了一个物理驱动的合成框架，构建了包含16,050对多分辨率织物图像的大规模数据集，并设计了一个基线模型，在基准数据集上展示了良好的性能和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 织物摩尔纹是由细纺织图案与相机传感器网格之间的相互作用引起的采样混叠 artifact，严重降低图像质量。与屏幕摩尔纹不同，织物摩尔纹由于纺织品的宽带和半周期特性本质上更具挑战性。现有的屏幕摩尔纹数据集训练的模型泛化能力差，且缺乏标准化的基准数据集。
AI.method: 开发了一个物理驱动的合成框架来生成像素对齐的成对图像，构建了包含16,050对多分辨率可控混叠严重程度的织物图像数据集，并设计了一个定制基线模型。
AI.result: 构建了第一个大规模的织物去摩尔纹基准数据集，包含16,050对多分辨率织物图像，基线模型在该基准数据集上取得了良好的性能并展示了较强的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 提供了一个标准化的平台来推动织物图像去摩尔纹研究，为该领域后续研究奠定了基础。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about fabric image demoiréing (removing moiré artifacts from textile images), which is an image restoration task in the textile domain. The research profile is about Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation - generating human body motions from text or video inputs. While both may use diffusion models, the application domains are entirely different: image restoration vs. human motion synthesis. This paper does not address any of the pain points mentioned (3D motion extraction, VLM-based screening, visual-guided feature extraction for motion, or cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion).

title: Navigating User Behavior toward Personalized Multimodal Generation
comment: 16 pages, 15 figures, 5 tables. Code is available at https://github.com/iLearn-Lab/NaviGen
summary: Modern AIGC pipelines deliver high-fidelity images and videos but presuppose a well-formed creation instruction, while end users rarely articulate visual details, leaving generators misaligned with user demand. We study personalized content generation, which turns a user's interaction history into an executable instruction for downstream synthesis, and identify two obstacles: behavior must be encoded in a form legible to language reasoning, and the model must acquire instruction-writing skill absent from both pretraining and behavior data. We propose NaviGen, which represents each item with a dual identifier coupling a collaborative code and a textual code as a behavioral substrate and a semantic bridge in one token stream. On this representation, a two-stage SFT+RL pipeline first distills preference reasoning and instruction writing from evolutionarily searched supervision, then aligns generation with user intent through hierarchical and self-consistent rewards. Experiments across product, game, and short-video domains show that NaviGen improves personalized image and video generation, strengthens next-item prediction, and yields more specific, relevant, and visually generatable instructions. Our code is anonymously released at: https://github.com/iLearn-Lab/NaviGen.

AI.tldr: NaviGen解决个性化内容生成问题，通过双标识符表示和两阶段SFT+RL pipeline将用户交互历史转化为可执行的生成指令
AI.motivation: 现代AIGC pipelines需要详细创作指令，但终端用户很少表达视觉细节，导致生成器与用户需求不对齐。需要将用户行为历史转化为语言模型可理解的指令格式
AI.method: 提出双标识符机制，将协作代码和文本代码耦合作为行为底层和语义桥梁；两阶段pipeline：1)SFT阶段从进化搜索的监督数据中提炼偏好推理和指令写作能力；2)RL阶段通过层次化和自洽奖励对齐生成与用户意图
AI.result: 在产品、游戏和短视频领域的实验表明，NaviGen提升了个性化图像和视频生成质量，增强了下一项目预测，生成了更具体、更相关、更易视觉化生成的指令
AI.conclusion: NaviGen有效解决了个性化内容生成中行为编码和指令写作技能获取的两个核心障碍，通过双标识符表示和两阶段训练pipeline实现了用户意图与生成模型的对齐

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper addresses personalized IMAGE and VIDEO generation from user behavior history, not 3D human motion generation. While both involve generation tasks conceptually, the application domains are entirely different - generating 2D images/videos is not the same as generating 3D human motion sequences. The paper's method (dual-token with SFT+RL) is also unrelated to the research profile's methods (diffusion-based motion synthesis, VLM for motion, visual-guided feature extraction). No relevance to text-to-motion or 3D motion generation.

title: End-to-End Radar and Communication Modulation Recognition with Neuromorphic Computing
summary: Although deep learning-based methods can achieve high accuracy in automatic modulation recognition (AMR) tasks, their high computational cost makes it difficult to strike a balance between accuracy and power consumption, thereby limiting their application on resource-constrained platforms. Neuromorphic architectures that perform spike-driven inference with modest energy budgets have recently been explored for vision and timeseries tasks. Motivated by these works, we propose EMRFormer, a novel end-to-end spiking nerural network (SNN) architecture that applies spike-driven transformer to the constraints of neuromorphic hardware for AMR. The model incorporates an adaptive spike encoder and Integer Leaky Integrate-and-Fire neurons to mitigate the degradation of effective information and enhance SNN representational capacity. By integrating spike-separable Convolution Neural Networks (SSCNN) into Spike-Driven Transformers (SpikeFormer), EMRFormer effectively extracts multi-scale temporal features from the raw IQ waveforms. We validate our approach across various mainstream datasets, the experimental results show that EMRFormer achieves state-of-the-art interms of accuracy, outperforming all the baselines. Furthermore, the model maintains strong performance in low signal-to-noise(SNR) environments and reduces theoretical energy consumption by over 90%. Finally, we evaluate our model on a KA200 neuromorphic chip. The results show that our model achieves up to 5 times reduction in power compared to running on a 3090 GPU or an Orin NX. This work demonstrates a promising pathway for AMR on resource-constrained devices.

AI.tldr: 提出EMRFormer，一种用于自动调制识别(AMR)的脉冲神经网络(SNN)架构，在资源受限设备上实现精度与能效的最佳平衡
AI.motivation: 深度学习方法在AMR任务中虽能实现高精度，但计算成本高，难以在精度和功耗之间取得平衡，限制了其在资源受限平台上的应用
AI.method: 采用自适应脉冲编码器和整数泄漏积分发放神经元，集成了脉冲可分离卷积神经网络的脉冲驱动Transformer，用于从原始IQ波形中提取多尺度时序特征
AI.result: 在多个主流数据集上达到最先进的精度，在低信噪比环境下保持优异性能，理论能耗降低超过90%，在KA200神经形态芯片上功耗相比3090 GPU或Orin NX降低5倍
AI.conclusion: 为资源受限设备上的AMR任务提供了一条有前景的实现路径

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about radar and communication modulation recognition using spiking neural networks (SNN), which is in the signal processing/communication engineering domain. The research profile is about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. There is zero application domain match - the paper does not address any aspect of 3D human motion generation, video-to-motion extraction, or computer graphics. The methods are also completely different (SNN/neuromorphic computing vs diffusion models, VLM, and video generation models for motion synthesis).

title: Exploring the relationship between human-centric AI and firm idiosyncratic risks
summary: Despite the extensive discussions of human-centric AI (HCAI) in Industry 5.0, its effects on firms' idiosyncratic risks (IR) remains underexplored. This is an imperative issue for firms navigate financial risks during the current technological revolution, as IR reflects investor reactions to corporate heterogeneous AI strategies and implementations by isolating firm-level stock volatility from systematic factors. Integrating situated AI theory with social-technical systems theory, we conceptualise HCAI as a situated AI strategy that reduces AI-related ethical risks and fosters AI-Human synergies in firms' business operations, ultimately reducing IR by aligning with stakeholders' diverse expectations. Moreover, socio-technical factors, namely digitalisation, operational efficiency, executive shareholding, and CEOs with IT background, may moderate the HCAI-IR relationship. Using a multi-source panel dataset of Chinese listed firms from 2015 to 2023, we find that HCAI is associated with lower firm IR. Furthermore, digitalisation and executive shareholding strengthen this risk-reducing effect, whereas operational efficiency and CEOs with IT background surprisingly attenuate it. Our findings offer theoretical contributions and practical insights for both ethical AI governance and firm financial risk management in the AI era.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了以人为中心的人工智能(HCAI)策略对企业特异风险(IR)的影响，基于2015-2023年中国上市公司面板数据发现，HCAI能够降低企业特异风险，且数字化程度和高管持股会增强这一风险降低效应。
AI.motivation: 在Industry 5.0背景下，尽管human-centric AI受到广泛讨论，但其对企业特异风险的影响尚未被充分探索。IR反映了投资者对企业异质性AI策略的反应，探究HCAI对IR的影响对于企业在AI时代管理财务风险具有重要意义。
AI.method: 整合situated AI理论与社会技术系统理论，将HCAI概念化为一种降低AI伦理风险、促进人机协同的 situated AI策略。使用2015-2023年中国上市公司多源面板数据，采用计量经济学方法进行实证检验。
AI.result: 研究发现：(1)HCAI与企业特异风险呈负相关关系；(2)数字化程度和高管持股增强了HCAI的风险降低效应；(3)运营效率和高管IT背景反而减弱了这一效应。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为AI时代的伦理AI治理和企业金融风险管理提供了理论贡献和实践启示，企业应重视HCAI策略的实施，同时注意不同社会技术因素的调节作用。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about finance/corporate governance - studying how "human-centric AI" strategies affect firm idiosyncratic risk in Chinese listed companies. The research profile is about Computer Graphics specifically focused on Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation using diffusion models, VLM, and video generation models. There is zero application domain match - finance vs computer graphics are entirely different fields. The methods (econometric panel data analysis vs motion generation diffusion models) are completely unrelated. This paper does not address any of the pain points: 3D motion extraction, quality assessment for VLM-based screening, visual-guided feature extraction, or cross-modal alignment.

title: Progressive Pixel-Neighborhood Deformable Cross-Attention for Multispectral Object Detection
summary: Effective cross-modal feature alignment and interaction are central challenges in multispectral object detection. Although global cross-attention provides strong long-range modeling ability, its quadratic complexity with respect to feature size limits deployment on resource-constrained platforms. We therefore propose Progressive Pixel-Neighborhood Deformable Cross-Attention for multispectral feature fusion, termed PNAFusion. The proposed framework is motivated by two observations: weak misalignment between visible and thermal images is usually concentrated around local neighborhoods, and semantic correspondence across modalities often follows non-linear spatial mappings that fixed receptive fields cannot model well. To address these issues, PNAFusion incorporates local spatial priors into its architectural design to concentrate feature interaction and alignment on the most relevant neighborhoods. Specifically, a Pixel-Neighborhood Cross-Attention (PNCA) module is introduced to avoid redundant global feature matching and suppress background noise. Meanwhile, an Adaptive Deformable Alignment (ADA) module captures non-linear spatial correspondences through learned pixel-wise offsets. These components are further integrated through an iterative feedback mechanism to progressively refine cross-modal feature alignment. Experiments on FLIR, M3FD, and DroneVehicle show that PNAFusion achieves 84.2, 90.5, and 85.5 mAP@0.5, respectively, under the YOLOv5 detector, and further reaches 86.8 mAP@0.5 on FLIR and 90.8 mAP@0.5 on M3FD when transferred to Co-DETR. Efficiency analysis indicates that PNAFusion reduces allocated GPU memory by 33.0\% compared with ICAFusion and reduces theoretical FLOPs from 194.8 G to 156.4 G, although the deformable sampling and iterative refinement introduce additional latency. Our code will be available at https://github.com/DanielQiuTian/PNAFusion.

AI.tldr: 提出PNAFusion方法，解决多光谱目标检测中的跨模态特征对齐问题，通过像素-邻域可变形交叉注意力模块避免全局注意力的二次复杂度问题，在FLIR、M3FD、DroneVehicle数据集上分别达到84.2、90.5、85.5 mAP@0.5
AI.motivation: 全局交叉注意力虽然建模能力强，但复杂度相对于特征尺寸是二次的，难以部署在资源受限平台上；同时可见光与热图像的对齐问题通常集中在局部邻域，且跨模态语义对应遵循固定感受野无法很好建模的非线性空间映射
AI.method: 提出渐进式像素-邻域可变形交叉注意力PNAFusion，包含两个核心模块：1)像素-邻域交叉注意力(PNCA)模块，避免冗余的全局特征匹配并抑制背景噪声；2)自适应可变形对齐(ADA)模块，通过学习的像素级偏移捕捉非线性空间对应；通过迭代反馈机制逐步细化跨模态特征对齐
AI.result: 在YOLOv5检测器下，FLIR、M3FD、DroneVehicle分别达到84.2、90.5、85.5 mAP@0.5；迁移到Co-DETR后在FLIR和M3FD上分别达到86.8和90.8 mAP@0.5；效率方面比ICAFusion减少33% GPU内存，FLOPs从194.8G降至156.4G
AI.conclusion: 通过引入局部空间先验和可变形对齐机制，有效降低了计算复杂度同时保持了高精度，为资源受限平台上的多光谱目标检测提供了可行方案

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper addresses multispectral object detection (2D visible + thermal image alignment for detection), while the research profile needs Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. Although both involve cross-modal alignment, this is 2D-to-2D alignment (visible-thermal) for object detection, not 2D video to 3D motion space alignment. The methods (cross-attention for detection) are unrelated to diffusion-based motion synthesis, VLM-guided motion generation, or text-to-motion tasks in computer graphics.

title: FlowR2A: Learning Reward-to-Action Distribution for Multimodal Driving Planning
summary: Multimodal driving planning faces a long-standing tension between two paradigms: scoring-based methods benefit from dense reward supervision but are confined to a fixed action vocabulary, while anchor-based methods generate proposals dynamically yet suffer from sparse supervision constrained to a single ground-truth trajectory. In this work, we propose FlowR2A, which resolves this tension by reframing simulation-based rewards from discriminative targets into generative conditions. By learning the reward-conditioned action distribution from dense trajectory-reward pairs with a flow-matching decoder, FlowR2A unifies the dense supervision of scoring-based methods with the proposal generation of anchor-based methods in a single generative model, forcing the model to internalize the correlation between an action and its outcomes in safety, progress, comfort, and rule compliance. To balance hard safety constraints against soft progress objectives, we introduce fine-grained per-timestep reward conditioning and reward noise augmentation. The generative formulation naturally supports controllable test-time sampling via reward guidance and anchored sampling, producing high-quality proposals. FlowR2A achieves state-of-the-art results on the NAVSIM v1 and v2 benchmarks, with multimodal proposals of substantially higher quality than prior methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FlowR2A，通过将基于仿真的奖励从判别目标重新定义为生成条件，解决多模态驾驶规划中评分方法（密集监督但动作词汇固定）与锚点方法（动态生成但监督稀疏）之间的长期矛盾。
AI.motivation: 解决多模态驾驶规划中长期存在的两难问题：评分方法虽有密集奖励监督但受限于固定动作词汇；锚点方法虽能动态生成提案但受限于单一真实轨迹的稀疏监督。
AI.method:
1. 将仿真奖励重构为生成条件，学习基于流的奖励条件动作分布
2. 使用flow-matching解码器从密集轨迹-奖励对中学习
3. 引入细粒度每时间步奖励条件和奖励噪声增强
4. 支持奖励引导和锚点采样的可控测试时采样
AI.result: 在NAVSIM v1和v2基准上实现最先进性能，多模态提案质量显著优于先前方法。
AI.conclusion: FlowR2A成功统一了评分方法的密集监督与锚点方法的提案生成，在安全、进度、舒适和规则合规之间取得平衡，产生高质量多模态驾驶提案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about autonomous driving planning using flow-matching for vehicle motion generation, which is completely different from the research profile's domain of 3D Human Motion Generation in Computer Graphics. While both may use generative methods, the application domains are entirely distinct - driving motion planning vs. human motion synthesis. The paper does not address any of the stated pain points (3D motion extraction from video, VLM-based screening, visual-guided features, cross-modal alignment) and focuses on robotics/vehicle navigation rather than human animation.

title: Universal Guideline-Driven Image Clustering via a Hybrid LLM Agent
summary: Unifying image clustering across different clustering scenarios remains challenging due to fundamental gaps among tasks. We introduce a Guideline-Driven Image Clustering Agent, the first universal framework that bridges these gaps through textual guidelines. To incorporate complex guidelines without task-specific training, we propose Generative Concept Proxy Modeling, which generates guideline-aware embeddings via concept proxy extraction. For scenarios requiring automatic cluster discovery, we introduce LLM Traversal based on Minimum Spanning Tree that selectively applies LLM reasoning for complex semantic judgments. Our method generalizes across diverse clustering scenarios spanning from general to fine-grained categorization, from global to local criteria, and from balanced to long-tail distributions. Our framework consistently outperforms specialized methods across diverse clustering tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通用的图像聚类框架（Guideline-Driven Image Clustering Agent），通过文本指导原则统一处理不同类型的图像聚类任务，包括从通用到细粒度分类、从全局到局部标准、从平衡到长尾分布等各种场景。
AI.motivation: 图像聚类在不同场景下存在根本性差异，现有方法难以跨场景统一处理。传统方法通常针对特定聚类场景设计，缺乏通用性。
AI.method: 提出两种核心技术：1) 生成概念代理建模（Generative Concept Proxy Modeling）- 通过概念代理提取生成符合指导原则的嵌入表示，无需针对特定任务训练；2) 基于最小生成树的LLM遍历（LLM Traversal）- 对需要自动发现聚类的场景，使用LLM进行复杂语义判断。
AI.result: 该方法在多种聚类任务场景中一致优于专门的聚类方法，展现了良好的跨场景泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过文本指导原则和生成概念代理建模，首次实现了能够统一处理不同聚类场景的通用图像聚类框架，为多场景图像聚类提供了新的研究方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about image clustering using LLMs - completely unrelated to the research profile. The research profile focuses on Computer Graphics - specifically Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation (e.g., generating 3D human motion from text or video), while this paper addresses general image clustering in computer vision. There is no application domain match - image clustering is a fundamentally different task than 3D motion generation. The methods (LLM-based clustering) are also not relevant to the required methods (diffusion-based motion synthesis, visual-guided feature extraction for motion models, cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion).

title: SP-Mind: An Autonomous Reasoning Agent for Spatial Proteomics Analysis
comment: 23 pages, 6 figures. Accepted to ICML 2026. Equal contribution by Yucheng Yuan and Yuanfeng Ji
summary: Spatial proteomics enables single-cell-resolution characterization of protein expression within tissue architecture, playing a critical role in understanding tumor microenvironments and guiding precision medicine. However, current analysis workflows remain fragmented, requiring expert manual orchestration of heterogeneous tools and limiting research scalability and reproducibility. We present SP-Mind, the first autonomous AI agent designed to unify the spatial proteomics analysis pipeline, from raw multiplexed tissue imaging to downstream phenotype discovery. Equipped with expert-curated biological analysis skills and specialized computational tools, SP-Mind converts natural-language queries into end-to-end analytical workflows without task-specific fine-tuning. To rigorously evaluate its capabilities, we introduce SP-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark spanning diverse tissue types, comprising 102 tasks across 18 distinct categories. Through extensive evaluation on SP-Bench and established downstream tasks, SP-Mind achieves state-of-the-art performance compared to existing open-source biomedical agent baselines.

AI.tldr: SP-Mind是首个用于空间蛋白质组学分析的统一自主AI代理，能够从原始多重组织成像数据自动执行完整的分析流程，包括从自然语言查询生成端到端分析工作流。
AI.motivation: 当前空间蛋白质组学分析工作流程分散且碎片化，需要专家手动协调异构工具，限制了研究的可扩展性和可重复性。现有工作流程难以满足精准医学对单细胞分辨率蛋白质表达表征的需求。
AI.method: SP-Mind配备专家策划的生物分析技能和专用计算工具，能够将自然语言查询转换为端到端分析工作流，无需针对特定任务进行微调。研究团队还构建了SP-Bench基准测试集，包含18个不同类别、102个任务，涵盖多种组织类型。
AI.result: SP-Mind在SP-Bench基准测试和已建立的下游任务上实现了最先进的性能，优于现有的开源生物医学代理基线。
AI.conclusion: SP-Mind代表了空间蛋白质组学分析领域的重大进展，首次实现了从原始成像数据到下游表型发现的完整自动化分析流程，为精准医学提供了更高效、可扩展的研究工具。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about spatial proteomics analysis in the biomedical domain, focusing on analyzing proteomics data from tissue imaging. The application domain is entirely different from Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. While SP-Mind uses AI agents and VLMs, these are applied to biological/biomedical image analysis, not to generating 3D human motion from text or video. The pain points, methods, and application domain have no overlap with the research profile.

title: Beyond Bayer: Task-Optimal Sensor Co-Design for Robust Autonomous-Driving Segmentation
summary: Robust perception underpins autonomous driving, and most recent progress comes from scaling the model-larger backbones, foundation models, and cooperative multi-agent fusion. We pursue a complementary, upstream question: what should the camera itself measure? Using a differentiable RAW-to-task pipeline, we decompose which sensor degrees of freedom benefit dense prediction. Learning the spectral colour-filter-array (CFA) weights is the dominant lever, improving mIoU by +0.017 (KITTI-360) and +0.023 (ACDC) over a fixed camera. In contrast, point-spread-function (optics) co-design is net-negative (-0.020 mIoU on KITTI-360) - a consequence of the data-processing inequality, which also bounds the task information that any downstream model, however large or cooperative, can recover. Noise co-optimisation is marginal, and counter to intuition enlarging the CFA tile beyond 2x2 consistently hurts, as the filters are confined to the rank three sRGB input. Because the intervention is at the sensor, the gains are model-agnostic; we validate robustness on ACDC's fog, night, rain, and snow, and conclude with a simple recipe: learn the 2x2 CFA weights and keep an identity PSF.

AI.tldr: 研究相机传感器硬件优化对自动驾驶感知的影响，发现学习2x2 CFA权重是最有效的策略。
AI.motivation: 探索在模型 scaling 之外，如何通过优化相机传感器本身来提升自动驾驶感知性能。
AI.method: 使用可微分的RAW-to-task管道，分解不同传感器自由度对密集预测的影响，包括CFA权重、PSF（光学）和噪声的协同优化。
AI.result: 学习CFA权重带来显著提升（KITTI-360 +0.017 mIoU，ACDC +0.023 mIoU），而PSF协同设计反而负面（KITTI-360 -0.020 mIoU）。噪声优化效果有限，扩大CFA tile到2x2以上反而有害。
AI.conclusion: 提出简单方案：学习2x2 CFA权重并保持恒等PSF，该干预位于传感器上游，所得收益与下游模型无关，在雾、夜、雨、雪等恶劣条件下同样有效。

relevance_reason: This paper is about autonomous driving perception and camera sensor hardware optimization (CFA/PSF design for image segmentation), which is completely unrelated to the research profile's domain of Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domains are entirely different: autonomous driving segmentation vs. 3D human motion synthesis from text/video. Despite potentially using machine learning, this paper does not address any of the specified pain points or methods relevant to text-to-motion generation.

title: Towards Federated Long-Tailed Graph Learning: An Energy-Guided Dual Decoupling Approach
summary: Federated Graph Learning facilitates collaborative graph modeling across distributed clients while preserving data privacy. However, real-world data categories frequently exhibit long-tailed distributions. Such statistical scarcity severely degrades performance in two ways: it biases the global model toward majority classes, and it structurally isolates minority nodes by submerging them in heterophilic, head-dominated neighborhoods. While existing methods attempt topology-agnostic statistical compensations, they often fail under data scarcity. Instead of recovering tail nodes, they overfit the structural noise from adjacent dominant classes, leading to representation degradation. To address these limitations, we propose FedEPD, a framework built on a dual decoupling paradigm that separates topological purification from semantic recalibration. Specifically, FedEPD utilizes distribution-aware Dirichlet energy pruning to filter spatial heterophilic edges. It then overcomes Non-IID distribution shifts by extracting robust global prototypes from topologically central nodes, which are incorporated into local representations via a spatial low-pass prototype injection. Furthermore, a two stage alternating optimization strategy strictly protects majority decision boundaries while improving minority accuracy. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FedEPD achieves state-of-the-art performance across diverse long-tailed benchmarks, yielding absolute improvements of up to 4.97% in Accuracy and 5.48% in Macro-F1.

AI.tldr: FedEPD 是一个针对长尾分布数据的联邦图学习框架，通过双重解耦范式（分布感知Dirichlet能量剪枝 + 空间低通原型注入）解决图数据中的类别不平衡问题，在准确率和Macro-F1上分别提升4.97%和5.48%。
AI.motivation: 现实世界数据呈长尾分布，导致联邦学习性能下降：全局模型偏向多数类，少数节点被淹没在异嗜性主导邻域中。现有拓扑无关方法在数据稀缺时过拟合结构噪声。
AI.method: 1) 分布感知Dirichlet能量剪枝过滤空间异嗜性边；2) 从拓扑中心节点提取鲁棒全局原型；3) 空间低通原型注入融入局部表示；4) 两阶段交替优化保护多数边界同时提升少数准确性。
AI.result: 在多样化的长尾基准数据集上达到最先进性能，准确率提升4.97%，Macro-F1提升5.48%。
AI.conclusion: FedEPD通过双重解耦范式有效解决联邦图学习中长尾分布导致的性能偏差和少数节点结构孤立问题，为非IID场景下的图学习提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about Federated Graph Learning for handling long-tailed distribution data - it has no connection to Computer Graphics, Text-to-Motion, or 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely different (graph learning/federated learning vs. computer graphics motion generation). Different field, different methods, different application domain.

title: DramaDirector: Geometry-Guided Short Drama Generation
comment: 20 pages, 17 figures, 6 tables. Code is available at https://github.com/iLearn-Lab/DramaDirector
summary: Short dramas, with their rapid shot rhythms, dialogue-driven focus shifts, and demanding cinematographic grounding, pose challenges that prompt-level or text-only video generation pipelines struggle to meet. We study plot-to-short-drama generation, where a global plot and local context are transformed into visually grounded multi-shot videos. We propose DramaDirector, a geometry-grounded framework that lets the planner borrow cinematographic geometry from a gallery of real short-drama shots indexed by depth and pose. DramaDirector decouples each shot into static visual and dynamic narrative conditions, trains the planner with schema-constrained SFT and GRPO under a learned text-visual alignment reward, and retrieves depth-pose references to guide first-frame generation and image-to-video synthesis. We also introduce DramaBoard, a benchmark built from 35 live-action dramas, 2.8K episodes, and 81K shots, with structured storyboards and multi-dimensional evaluation protocols. Experiments show that DramaDirector improves over representative multi-agent and video generation baselines on faithfulness, consistency, and controllability. Our code is released at: https://github.com/iLearn-Lab/DramaDirector

AI.tldr: 本文提出DramaDirector框架，用于解决短剧（short drama）的自动生成问题。该框架通过引入几何 grounding 技术，让规划器从真实短剧镜头库中借用电影摄影几何信息（深度和姿态），将全局情节和局部上下文转换为视觉 grounded 的多镜头视频。
AI.motivation: 短剧具有快速镜头节奏、对话驱动的焦点转换和严格的电影摄影 grounding 要求，现有基于提示或文本的视频生成 pipeline 难以满足这些挑战。需要一种能够将情节（plot）转换为视觉 grounded 多镜头视频的方法。
AI.method: 提出 DramaDirector 框架，包含以下核心组件：1）几何 grounding：利用真实短剧镜头库（按深度和姿态索引）来借用电影摄影几何；2）将每个镜头解耦为静态视觉条件和动态叙事条件；3）使用 schema-constrained SFT 和 GRPO 在学习到的文本-视觉对齐奖励下训练规划器；4）检索深度-姿态参考来引导首帧生成和图像到视频合成。同时构建 DramaBoard 基准，包含 35 部真人短剧、2.8K 集和 81K 镜头，包含结构化 storyboard 和多维评估协议。
AI.result: 实验表明 DramaDirector 在忠实度（faithfulness）、一致性（consistency）和可控性（controllability）方面优于代表性的多智能体和视频生成基线。
AI.conclusion: 本文工作首次系统性地研究了情节到短剧的生成问题，通过几何 grounding 和学习到的对齐奖励实现了高质量的短剧视频生成，为短剧自动化创作提供了新的研究方向。

relevance_reason: The paper is about short drama VIDEO GENERATION, not 3D human MOTION generation. Although it uses some related techniques (video generation, VLM, diffusion-based methods), the application domain is completely different. The research profile focuses on generating 3D human motion from text/video, while this paper focuses on generating video content (short drama clips) for film production. This is similar to using diffusion for image generation vs human motion generation - the method overlap doesn't弥补application domain的差异. The paper does not address any of the 4 pain points (3D motion extraction, quality assessment, visual-guided feature extraction for motion, cross-modal alignment for motion).

title: Probing the Misaligned Thinking Process of Language Models
summary: Large language models exhibit a growing range of misaligned behaviors such as strategic deception, sandbagging, and self-preservation. As they are increasingly deployed in high-stakes settings, it is critical to reliably detect such behaviors to ensure safe and responsible use. In this work, we propose to monitor misalignment by decomposing it into fine-grained cognitive processes -- misalignment indicators -- and detecting their presence in a model's internal activations via linear probes. We develop a taxonomy of 18 indicators spanning different misaligned behaviors, paired with an automated, meta-plan-guided pipeline that generates multi-turn training conversations. To rigorously evaluate generalization, we construct an out-of-distribution suite combining automated behavioral elicitation, established misalignment benchmarks, and natural benign conversations. Across 5 misaligned behaviors, our probes match a strong LLM judge with 0.935 AUROC on out-of-distribution benchmarks while keeping a low false positive rate on benign traffic. We further perform in-depth analysis to understand the probes and the model's internal representations of misalignment indicators.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过监控大型语言模型内部激活状态来检测模型的失调行为。具体而言，将失调行为分解为18个细粒度认知指标，并利用线性探针在模型内部表示中检测这些指标的存在。实验表明，该方法在分布外基准测试中达到0.935的AUROC，同时在良性对话中保持较低的误报率。
AI.motivation: 随着大型语言模型被部署到高风险场景中，模型表现出越来越多的失调行为（如策略性欺骗、沙袋防护、自我保护等）。可靠检测这些行为对于确保模型的安全和负责任使用至关重要，但现有方法在泛化能力上存在不足。
AI.method: 1)将失调行为分解为18个细粒度认知过程（失调指标）；2)开发自动化、元计划引导的管道生成多轮训练对话；3)训练线性探针在模型内部激活中检测这些指标；4)构建分布外测试套件，包括自动行为诱导、现有基准测试和自然良性对话。
AI.result: 在5种失调行为上，探针实现了0.935的AUROC（分布外基准测试），与强大的LLM评判者相当，同时在良性流量上保持较低的误报率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过内部激活探针有效检测LLM的失调行为，具有良好的泛化能力，可为模型安全部署提供实用工具。

relevance_reason: This paper is about detecting misaligned behaviors in Large Language Models (LLM safety/interpretability), which is completely unrelated to the research profile focused on Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely different - one deals with motion generation and video-to-3D, the other deals with LLM internal state analysis. The methods (linear probes on LLM activations) are also completely different from those needed (diffusion-based motion synthesis, video generation models, visual-guided feature extraction). This paper does not address any of the pain points related to 3D motion extraction, quality assessment for VLM screening, or cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion space.

title: A Benchmark for Hallucination Detection in VLMs for Gastrointestinal Endoscopy
comment: Accepted at the Medical Image Understanding and Analysis (MIUA) 2026 conference
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) are prone to hallucination, which remains a major barrier to their safe deployment in clinical practice. To date, most hallucination detection methods have been evaluated on radiology benchmarks such as MIMIC-CXR and VQA-RAD, while gastrointestinal (GI) endoscopy remains largely underexplored. In this paper, we benchmark nine hallucination detection methods on the Gut-VLM dataset, a GI diagnostic Visual Question Answering (VQA) dataset with 4,392 test VQA pairs, across five VLMs (MedGemma-4B, MedGemma-27B, LLaVA-Med-7B, LLaVA-v1.6-7B, and Lingshu-32B). The methods span three categories: black-box methods (RadFlag, SelfCheckGPT-NLI), gray-box methods (AvgProb, AvgEnt, MaxProb, MaxEnt, Semantic Entropy, and VASE), and a white-box method (ReXTrust). Our results show that ReXTrust, a white-box method, achieves the highest AUC across all five models, outperforming the strongest alternative method on each VLM by a statistically significant margin (paired permutation test, p < 0.001 in all cases), reaching a peak AUC of 93.0 on MedGemma-4B. White-box hidden-state access provides a consistent advantage of 19.5 AUC points on average (range: 9.5--33.5), with ReXTrust maintaining strong performance even on LLaVA-v1.6-7B (AUC 79.9), where black-box methods and clustering-based gray-box methods collapse to near-chance performance. Among non-white-box methods, token-level gray-box statistics (MaxEnt, MaxProb) are the strongest alternatives, outperforming both clustering-based gray-box methods (Semantic Entropy, VASE) and black-box approaches on average. We further identify confident confabulation, a failure mode in which models hallucinate with high inter-sample consistency or high token-level probability, as a systemic failure for both consistency and uncertainty-based methods.

AI.tldr: 本文在Gut-VLM数据集上基准测试了9种幻觉检测方法，涵盖5种视觉语言模型。ReXTrust白盒方法取得最高AUC 93.0，显著优于其他方法。白盒方法平均获得19.5 AUC优势。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型在临床实践中容易产生幻觉，阻碍安全部署。现有方法多在放射学基准上评估，胃肠道内镜领域仍属空白。需要针对GI诊断VQA数据集开发有效的幻觉检测方法。
AI.method: 在Gut-VLM数据集（4,392个测试VQA对）上基准测试9种幻觉检测方法，涵盖三类：黑盒方法（RadFlag、SelfCheckGPT-NLI）、灰盒方法（AvgProb、AvgEnt、MaxProb、MaxEnt、Semantic Entropy、VASE）和白盒方法（ReXTrust），评估于5种VLM模型。
AI.result: ReXTrust白盒方法在所有5个模型上获得最高AUC，在MedGemma-4B上达到峰值93.0 AUC，较最强替代方法有统计学显著优势（配对置换检验p<0.001）。白盒方法平均获得19.5 AUC优势（范围9.5-33.5）。非白盒方法中，token级灰盒统计（MaxEnt、MaxProb）最强。发现"自信confabulation"是系统性失败模式。
AI.conclusion: 白盒方法ReXTrust在GI内镜VQA幻觉检测中表现最优，显著优于黑盒和灰盒方法。白盒方法的隐藏状态访问提供一致性优势。自信confabulation（高样本间一致性或高token级概率的幻觉）是一致性方法和不确定性方法的系统性失败模式。未来研究需针对此 failure mode 开发应对策略。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about hallucination detection in Visual Language Models for gastrointestinal (GI) endoscopy medical diagnosis - a medical imaging application. The research profile is specifically about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. While both mention "VLMs," the application domains are entirely different: medical VQA/diagnosis vs. 3D human motion generation from text/video. The paper does not address any computer graphics, motion generation, or visual-guided feature extraction for motion synthesis - it focuses on detecting hallucinations in medical VLMs for clinical GI endoscopy.

title: Tractable Reasoning and Conjunctive Query Answering for Defeasible DL-Lite under Rational Closure
summary: In Description Logics (DLs), reasoning under Rational Closure (RC) is a well-known and widely accepted non-monotonic formalism to handle defeasible knowledge. In this paper, we study the application of RC to the core and horn variants of the DL-Lite family of lightweight description logics. We analyze both entitlement (instance checking) and Conjunctive Query (CQ) answering under RC. Our main contribution is providing a plug-in architecture that builds upon existing standard classical reasoners, establishing that reasoning and CQ answering under RC for DL-Lite can be done efficiently with minimal computational overhead.

AI.tldr: 本文研究理性闭包(Rational Closure)在DL-Lite描述逻辑家族(核心版和horn版)中的应用，提供了一种基于现有经典推理器的即插即用架构，实现高效的非单调推理和合取查询回答。
AI.motivation: 理性闭包是处理可废止知识的经典非单调形式化方法，但将其应用于轻量级描述逻辑DL-Lite家族的研究尚不充分，特别是在horn变体和查询回答方面存在研究空白。
AI.method: 1) 分析RC在DL-Lite核心版和horn版中的适用性；2) 研究 entitlement(实例检查)和合取查询(CQ)回答在RC下的计算复杂度；3) 设计基于现有标准经典推理器的即插即用架构。
AI.result: 证明DL-Lite核心版和horn版在RC下均可实现高效推理，CQ answering也保持计算 tractability；所提架构可最小化计算开销。
AI.conclusion: 为DL-Lite系列提供了支持非单调推理的实用方案，通过即插即用架构利用现有推理器，无需重新开发，为可废止知识的表示和推理提供了有效工具。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about Description Logic (DL-Lite), non-monotonic reasoning, and rational closure in knowledge representation/ontology reasoning - has nothing to do with Computer Graphics, Text-to-Motion, 3D Human Motion Generation, video generation, or any of the methods mentioned (VLM, diffusion-based motion synthesis, visual-guided feature extraction). The paper addresses logical reasoning for knowledge bases, not motion generation or video understanding.

title: An LMM for Precisely Grounding Elements in Documents
summary: Visual grounding in documents is a crucial ability for Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) in areas such as document understanding, deep research and document error detection. However, existing approaches exhibit poor grounding precision in text-rich document images, often failing to accurately locate the critical document elements needed for reliable reasoning. To address this gap, we introduce PreciseDoc, an LMM specifically designed for precise element grounding and can be further optimized for Document VQA tasks. Specifically, to enhance the basic localization capability, we construct challenging training data by two pipelines capable of mass-producing high-quality documents with paired metadata of fine-grained coordinates, including synthetic hand-filled documents with camera effects. The model develops more real-world functions beyond straightforward localization of single text, such as locating personal information from CVs. Furthermore, we introduce a training paradigm for visual grounded reasoning where the grounding and reasoning are supervised jointly with reinforcement learning to improve the contribution of the grounded evidence. A comprehensive evaluation on various benchmarks demonstrates the advantage of the proposed data and methods in document spatial grounding and document understanding.

AI.tldr: PreciseDoc是一个用于文档图像中文本元素精确视觉定位的大型多模态模型，可进一步优化用于文档VQA任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在富文本文档图像中定位精度较差，难以准确找到用于可靠推理的关键文档元素。
AI.method: 1) 构建挑战性训练数据，通过两条pipeline生成带有细粒度坐标元数据的高质量文档，包括带相机效果的合成手填文档；2) 引入视觉定位推理训练范式，使用强化学习联合监督定位和推理。
AI.result: 在各种基准测试上展示了文档空间定位和文档理解的优势。
AI.conclusion: 提出的数据和方法能有效提升文档元素的精确 grounding 能力。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about document image analysis and text element localization for Document VQA, while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - specifically 3D Human Motion Generation from text-to-motion. Although both use visual multimodal models, the application domains are entirely unrelated - document processing vs human motion generation. This paper does not address any of the specified pain points (3D motion extraction from 2D video, quality assessment for motion VLM, visual-guided feature extraction for motion models, or cross-modal video-to-motion alignment).

title: LemonHarness Technical Report
summary: As large language model (LLM) agents are applied to longer tasks, they increasingly modify workspace state across multiple rounds of iteration. However, agents typically observe only tool outputs and log fragments, while the actual state changes occur in the file system. Without explicit workspace boundaries, state-changing operations such as file writes and temporary artifact generation may scatter changes across paths. Over time, these weakly constrained changes accumulate, making states such as modified files difficult to track. This paper presents LemonHarness, an integrated execution framework for long-horizon agents. LemonHarness establishes an explicit execution boundary by constraining state-changing operations within a clearly defined workspace and bringing model invocation, tool execution, and rule knowledge within a single controlled boundary. State-changing operations, including file writes, dependency installation, and temporary artifact creation, are executed through structured tool interfaces, with execution feedback recorded as observations available to subsequent model decisions. The system also introduces a reusable rule knowledge base, which turns recurring execution rules and acceptance criteria into runtime knowledge. LemonHarness further adds a time-aware execution mechanism that exposes elapsed and remaining budget to the model, so it can rebalance exploration, implementation, and validation effort as time pressure shifts and avoid timeouts from long waits or excessive verification. On Terminal-Bench 2.0, LemonHarness_GPT-5.3-CodeX reached 84.49% accuracy over 445 trials; pairing the same framework with the stronger GPT-5.5 backbone raised the average accuracy to 86.52% across five jobs. The results suggest that a unified runtime boundary, callable rule knowledge, and time-aware execution can improve the stability of long-horizon agent execution.

AI.tldr: LemonHarness是一个用于长周期AI代理的集成执行框架，通过建立明确的工作空间边界、可调用的规则知识库和时间感知的执行机制来解决代理在长时间任务中状态管理混乱的问题。
AI.motivation: 随着大型语言模型代理被应用于更长的任务，它们在多轮迭代中不断修改工作区状态，但代理通常只能观察到工具输出和日志片段，而实际的状态变化发生在文件系统中。缺乏明确的工作空间边界导致文件写入和临时工件生成等状态变更操作分散在各个路径中，随着时间推移，这些弱约束的变更累积，使得修改文件等状态难以追踪。
AI.method: 1. 建立明确的执行边界，将状态变更操作限制在明确定义的工作空间内；2. 将模型调用、工具执行和规则知识纳入单一受控边界；3. 通过结构化工具接口执行文件写入、依赖安装和临时工件创建等状态变更操作；4. 将执行反馈记录为可供后续模型决策使用的观察；5. 创建可重用的规则知识库，将 recurring execution rules and acceptance criteria 转化为运行时知识；6. 引入时间感知执行机制，将已用时间和剩余预算暴露给模型。
AI.result: 在Terminal-Bench 2.0上，LemonHarness_GPT-5.3-CodeX在445次试验中达到84.49%的准确率；与更强的GPT-5.5主干网络配对后，在五个任务中的平均准确率提高到86.52%。
AI.conclusion: 统一的运行时边界、可调用的规则知识和时间感知执行可以提高长周期代理执行的稳定性。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant paper. LemonHarness is about AI agent execution frameworks for long-horizon code generation tasks (software engineering), completely different from Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. This paper addresses workspace management and agent orchestration for terminal/benchmark tasks, not any motion generation, video-to-motion extraction, or computer graphics domain.

title: Flood Mapping from RGB imagery using a Vision Foundation Model
summary: Timely, high-resolution maps of flood extent around settlements are essential for emergency response and damage assessment. We consider airborne RGB imagery for flood mapping as it can be collected rapidly at low cost. To produce flood maps, deep learning models for water segmentation are often used. CNN based and small vision transformer models are used. However, they need much data for adaptation to a change of scenery, i.e., another flooding event. Vision foundation models or large vision transformers are known to generalize across domains. Recently, foundation models for Earth observation became available. They are pretrained on satellite data, whose spatial resolution, viewing geometry, and radiometry differ from nadir RGB imagery. Thus, adaptation is required. We investigate how a satellite-pretrained Earth observation foundation model can be adapted to centimeter-scale floodwater mapping from RGB imagery. Specifically, we fine-tune a model we call Prithvi-2.0-UPN consisting of the Prithvi-EO-2.0-600M Vision Transformer combined with a UPerNet decoder for binary water segmentation on two RGB datasets (BlessemFlood21, NeuenahrFlood). In a first experiment we observe that Prithvi-2.0-UPN reaches state-of-the-art results on BlessemFlood21 and NeuenahrFlood, when trained on their datasets. In a second experiment we show that Prithvi-2.0-UPN performs better than state-of-the-art baseline models for transfer to a new flood event (trained on BlessemFlood21, tested on NeuenahrFlood) in a zero-shot setting. However, the performance indicates room for improvement. In this respect, we investigate in a third experiment how performance improves when further fine-tuning the models with small shares of NeuenahrFlood training data: Prithvi-2.0-UPN improves the fastest and reaches almost the performance level when fully trained on NeuenahrFlood, indicating transfer capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本研究旨在将卫星预训练的地球观测基础模型（Prithvi-EO-2.0-600M Vision Transformer）适配至厘米级洪水制图任务。研究者通过结合UPerNet解码器构建Prithvi-2.0-UPN模型，在两个RGB数据集上进行二元水分割微调实验。
AI.motivation: 实时高分辨率洪水地图对应急响应和损失评估至关重要。现有CNN和小规模视觉Transformer模型需要大量数据适应新场景，而卫星预训练模型与RGB航拍影像在空间分辨率、观测几何和辐射特征上存在差异，需要进行适配研究。
AI.method: 构建Prithvi-2.0-UPN模型（Prithvi-EO-2.0-600M Vision Transformer + UPerNet解码器），在BlessemFlood21和NeuenahrFlood两个RGB数据集上进行二元水分割任务的微调。设计三个实验：1）域内训练测试；2）跨域零样本迁移；3）小样本微调迁移。
AI.result: 实验一：Prithvi-2.0-UPN在两个数据集上均达到最优性能。实验二：零样本迁移性能优于基线模型，但仍有提升空间。实验三：使用少量NeuenahrFlood数据进行微调后，模型性能快速提升，接近全数据训练水平，展现出良好的迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: 卫星预训练的地球观测基础模型可成功适配至厘米级RGB洪水制图任务，且具有优秀的迁移能力，仅需少量目标域数据即可达到接近全数据训练的性能，为低数据成本下的洪水制图提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about flood mapping from satellite/rGB imagery using Vision Foundation Models for remote sensing - a completely different application domain from Computer Graphics and Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. While it uses Vision Transformers, the task is binary water segmentation (flood detection), not human motion generation or text-to-motion synthesis. The data (satellite imagery), task (segmentation), and domain (Earth observation) have no overlap with the research profile's needs for 3D human motion generation, VLM-based screening, or visual-guided feature extraction for motion models.

title: Prob-BBDM: a Probabilistic Brownian Bridge Diffusion Model for MRI sequence image-to-image translation
summary: AI-driven image-to-image synthesis is rapidly advancing, with growing applications in medical imaging. Multi-modal image analysis plays a crucial role in optimizing examination quality, yet acquiring multiple imaging modalities in clinical settings remains resource-intensive and time-consuming, especially for 3D imaging. To address this challenge, we propose a novel image-to-image translation model based on Brownian Bridge Diffusion Models (BBDM), which synthesizes magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) sequences from 2D axial slices. Our approach integrates a variational encoder-guided diffusion mechanism, leveraging probabilistic image distributions to enhance synthesis quality. Evaluated on the BraTS 2021 dataset, our Probabilistic-BBDM (Prob-BBDM) achieves superior performance across multiple translation tasks, reaching up to 88.46% SSIM and 26.09 dB PSNR, with consistent improvements over baselines. Notably, our diffusion process requires only 4 steps, making it computationally efficient while maintaining high-quality synthesis. To further validate generalizability, we test Prob-BBDM on an external third-party dataset, demonstrating consistent performance across domains. Additionally, we assess the clinical utility of the synthesized slices by using them as input to a pre-trained segmentation model. Tumor segmentation yields a Dice score of 88.71% and an HD95 of 3.49 mm, confirming that the synthesized slices preserve critical diagnostic information. These results highlight the potential of Prob-BBDM for high-quality, efficient, and generalizable MRI synthesis, offering a promising step toward improved medical image translation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于布朗桥扩散模型(BBDM)的新型图像到图像翻译模型(Prob-BBDM),用于从2D轴向切片合成MRI序列。该方法结合变分编码器引导的扩散机制,在BraTS 2021数据集上实现了高达88.46%的SSIM和26.09 dB的PSNR,且仅需4个扩散步骤即可完成高效合成。外部数据集验证显示良好的泛化能力,合成的切片用于肿瘤分割时Dice分数达88.71%,HD95为3.49mm。
AI.motivation: 多模态医学图像分析对优化检查质量至关重要,但获取多种成像模态在临床环境中仍需消耗大量资源和时间,尤其是3D成像。因此需要开发高效的MRI序列合成方法,以减少实际扫描需求,提高临床效率。
AI.method: 提出Prob-BBDM模型,基于布朗桥扩散模型(BBDM)进行图像到图像翻译。该方法整合了变分编码器引导的扩散机制,利用概率图像分布来增强合成质量。模型仅需4个扩散步骤即可完成高效的图像合成。
AI.result: 在BraTS 2021数据集上,Prob-BBDM在多个翻译任务中达到最优性能,SSIM最高达88.46%,PSNR达26.09 dB。外部第三方数据集验证显示一致的性能表现。使用合成切片作为预训练分割模型的输入时,肿瘤分割Dice分数为88.71%,HD95为3.49mm。
AI.conclusion: Prob-BBDM实现了高质量、高效且可泛化的MRI合成,为医学图像翻译提供了有前景的解决方案。合成切片保留了关键诊断信息,具有应用于临床诊断的潜力。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical image synthesis (MRI sequence image-to-image translation using diffusion models), which is in a completely different application domain from the research profile's focus on Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. While both use diffusion models, the paper addresses medical imaging synthesis (BraTS 2021 dataset for tumor segmentation), not human motion generation. The pain points are entirely unrelated: the paper targets reducing MRI scanning time for clinical efficiency, whereas the research profile focuses on extracting 3D motion from 2D video, VLM-based quality assessment, visual-guided feature extraction for motion models, and cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion space. The application domains are fundamentally different: medical imaging vs. human motion synthesis in computer graphics.

title: Bengal-HP_RU: A Dataset of Bengal People For Head Pose Estimation
summary: Existing head pose datasets predominantly feature subjects of Western or East Asian origin, leaving South Asian populations, particularly Bengali individuals, largely underrepresented. We introduce Bengal-HP_RU, the first publicly available head pose dataset centred on Bengali subjects, comprising 12,894 labelled head images annotated with continuous yaw, pitch, and roll values. Images were collected from Wikimedia Commons under free licences and processed through an automated pipeline followed by manual label correction. The dataset is partitioned by Wikimedia uploader identity to prevent data contamination, yielding 10,494 training and 2,400 test images across 296 unique uploaders. Bengal-HP_RU exhibits substantial diversity in subject age, gender, occlusion, illumination, and background, reflecting realistic in-the-wild conditions. The dataset is publicly available at https://doi.org/10.17632/xbw9kr37jb.2.

AI.tldr: Bengal-HP_RU是首个针对孟加拉裔人群的头部姿态数据集，包含12,894张带标注的头部图像，标注了偏航、俯仰和横滚的连续值。该数据集来自Wikimedia Commons，按上传者身份划分训练集和测试集，旨在解决现有头部姿态数据集中南亚人群代表不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有头部姿态数据集主要包含西方或东亚人群，缺乏对南亚人群、特别是孟加拉裔人群的代表性。因此需要创建首个以孟加拉裔人群为中心的公开头部姿态数据集。
AI.method: 从Wikimedia Commons获取免费许可证的图像，通过自动化处理流程后进行人工标注校正。按Wikimedia上传者身份划分数据集以防止数据污染。
AI.result: 数据集包含12,894张标注图像，分布在296个唯一上传者中，训练集10,494张，测试集2,400张。在受试者年龄、性别、遮挡、光照和背景方面具有显著多样性，反映了真实的野外条件。
AI.conclusion: Bengal-HP_RU是首个公开可用的孟加拉裔头部姿态数据集，为头部姿态估计研究中的种族多样性做出了重要贡献。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about head pose estimation (analyzing/recognizing head orientation from 2D images), which is a computer vision recognition task. The research profile is about text-to-motion generation (synthesizing 3D human motion from text/video), which is a computer graphics synthesis task. These are fundamentally different: estimation vs generation, recognition vs synthesis. While head pose estimation could be loosely related to understanding human motion, it does not address any of the pain points (3D motion extraction from video, VLM-based screening, visual-guided feature extraction, cross-modal alignment for motion generation). The paper provides only a dataset for a completely different task.

title: MVG-KAN: Multi-View Geo-Wind Guided KAN for PM$_{2.5}$ Forecasting
summary: Accurate short-term PM$_{2.5}$ forecasting is important for public health protection, air-quality early warning, and urban environmental management. However, PM$_{2.5}$ variation is driven by multiple coupled factors, including stable periodic changes induced by human activities and meteorological regularity, station-specific short-term concentration evolution, and meteorology-driven pollutant dispersion among monitoring stations. Existing spatio-temporal forecasting methods may capture station relationships to some extent, but distance-only, correlation-based, or purely adaptive graphs are often insufficient to comprehensively represent these heterogeneous factors, especially wind-direction-dependent pollutant transport. To address this problem, we propose a Multi-View Geo-Wind Guided KAN model for PM$_{2.5}$ forecasting, named \textbf{MVG-KAN}, which models station-level PM$_{2.5}$ evolution from three complementary views: local periodic regularity, station-wise residual temporal dynamics, and meteorological-environment-guided spatial dispersion. Specifically, the periodic-residual forecasting backbone first separates stable daily and weekly patterns from non-periodic residual variations. A Geo-Wind Graph is constructed by combining geographic distance decay with wind-direction- and wind-speed-aware transport, providing a lightweight physically motivated directed spatial prior for residual propagation among stations. In addition, a temporal Kolmogorov-Arnold network (TKAN) residual head is then introduced to learn station-wise nonlinear autoregressive correction from de-periodized PM$_{2.5}$ residuals and historical multi-pollutant sequences, thereby enhancing the modeling of local residual inertia and pollutant co-variation.

AI.tldr: 提出了MVG-KAN模型，用于PM2.5短期预测，通过多视图方法整合局部周期性规律、站点残差动态和气象引导的空间扩散。
AI.motivation: PM2.5变化受多种耦合因素驱动，包括人类活动引起的周期性变化、站点特定的短期演变和气象驱动的站点间传输。现有方法难以充分捕捉风向依赖的污染物传输等异质因素。
AI.method: 构建了三个互补视图：1)周期性残差预测骨干分离每日/每周模式与残差变化；2)Geo-Wind Graph结合地理距离衰减与风速/风向感知的传输；3)TKAN残差头学习站点非线性自回归校正。
AI.result: 模型综合了局部周期性规律、站点间残差动态和气象引导的空间扩散，增强了PM2.5短期预测能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过多视图融合和物理启发的空间先验，MVG-KAN能有效建模复杂PM2.5时空演变，为短期预测提供了一种有前景的方法。

relevance_reason: Completely different field and application. This paper is about PM2.5 air pollution forecasting using KANs and graph neural networks, while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domains are entirely unrelated: environmental air quality prediction vs human motion synthesis. Even though both may use neural networks, the purpose, data modalities, and downstream tasks are completely different.

title: Sat2City v2: Native 3D City Asset Generation from a Single Satellite Image
summary: Generating explicit 3D city assets from a single satellite image is important for digital twins, urban simulation, and geospatial intelligence. Unlike satellite-to-street-view synthesis, the task requires a reusable textured mesh with plausible geometry and controllable appearance rather than a 3D proxy optimized only for rendering a small set of images or videos. The ICCV Sat2City framework made a first step by conditioning cascaded sparse-voxel latent diffusion on satellite-derived height maps, but its appearance was random, its training data were synthetic, and its task-specific VAE did not scale well to noisy real-world reconstructions. We present Sat2City v2, a journal extension that adapts a pretrained native structured-latent 3D foundation model to weakly aligned satellite images and textured meshes. We build a real-world dataset with 16,241 satellite-mesh pairs across 24 regions in 9 cities. Instead of learning a 3D representation from noisy city meshes, Sat2City v2 encodes each mesh into a pretrained native 3D latent space, fine-tunes a satellite-conditioned geometry flow, and uses the decoded shape to anchor satellite-conditioned texturing. This retains Sat2City's geometry-to-appearance cascade while enabling appearance-controllable generation from the satellite input. Experiments on metric-scale DSM reconstruction and generative city-asset benchmarks for geometry and appearance show that Sat2City v2 achieves the best overall performance among evaluated baselines. Overall, Sat2City v2 advances satellite-to-city generation from rendering-oriented 3D proxies to explicit textured mesh assets, supported by, to the best of our knowledge, the first documented satellite-mesh paired dataset collected from matched geographic crops for this asset-level task. Project page: https://ai4city-hkust.github.io/Sat2City-v2/

AI.tldr: Sat2City v2是一个将从单张卫星图像生成显式3D城市资产的任务扩展到可重用纹理网格的系统，基于预训练的原生3D基础模型，使用弱对齐的卫星图像和纹理网格，在包含24个地区9个城市16,241对卫星-网格对的真实世界数据集上训练。
AI.motivation: 原始Sat2City框架存在外观随机、训练数据合成、特定任务VAE无法扩展到嘈杂的真实世界重建等问题，且生成的仅是面向渲染的3D代理而非可重用的纹理网格资产。
AI.method: 将每个网格编码到预训练的原生3D潜在空间，微调卫星条件几何流，使用解码形状锚定卫星条件纹理化，保留几何到外观的级联，同时实现外观可控生成。
AI.result: 在度量尺度DSM重建和生成城市资产基准测试（几何和外观）中，Sat2City v2在所有评估基线中取得最佳整体性能。
AI.conclusion: Sat2City v2将卫星到城市生成从面向渲染的3D代理推进到显式纹理网格资产，并提供了据我所知为该资产生成任务收集的首个已记录的卫星-网格配对数据集。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant application domain. The paper is about 3D city asset generation from satellite images (urban planning/computer vision domain), while the research profile is specifically about 3D human motion generation from text/video. Even though both may use diffusion-based methods, the application domains are entirely different - city building generation vs. human motion generation are distinct fields in computer graphics. The pain points addressed are also completely different (satellite image processing vs. video-to-motion extraction).

title: Accelerating Disaggregated RL for Visual Generative LLMs with Diffusion-Based Parallelism and Trainer-Assisted Generation
summary:
Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a dominant post-training paradigm, driving the emergence of high-performance RL systems such as veRL for autoregressive large language models (LLMs). In parallel, diffusion-oriented RL algorithms, e.g., DanceGRPO and FlowGRPO, have rapidly expanded the scope of RL from language reasoning to diffusion-based visual and flow-based generation. However, efficient RL systems for diffusion generative LLMs remain underexplored. Existing implementations, e.g., veRL-Omni, still rely on colocated execution, which simplifies synchronization but couples rollout and training resources, limits heterogeneous deployment, and constrains independent scaling.
  To this end, we introduce DigenRL, a disaggregated RL framework for diffusion-based generative LLMs that supports flexible resource allocation, accommodates heterogeneous GPUs, and facilitates efficient task scheduling. To maximally reduce the execution bubbles in the disaggregated architecture, we propose: 1) a generation-axis pipeline (GAP) and time-step parallelism (TSP) in the diffusion architecture to enable finer-grained pipelining between rollout and training; 2) an elastic trainer-assisted generation (TAG) approach to enable the trainer GPU resources to dynamically assist in executing rollout generations; and 3) a tightly one-step constrained asynchronous strategy to further utilize the tail bubble in the pipeline. Extensive experiments are conducted on three hardware testbeds with 16-32 GPUs using HunyuanVideo-13B, Wan2.1-14B, FLUX.1-12B, and QwenImage-20B generative models. Experimental results show that DigenRL achieves 1.56-2.10x throughput improvements over state-of-the-art diffusion RL systems, veRL-Omni and GenRL.

AI.tldr: DigenRL是一种针对扩散式生成式大语言模型的新型解聚式强化学习框架，通过生成轴流水线、时间步并行、弹性训练器辅助生成和单步约束异步策略等技术，显著提升了扩散式RL系统的吞吐量。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散式生成式LLM的高效RL系统研究不足。现有实现（如veRL-Omni）采用共置执行架构，将 rollout 和训练资源耦合，限制了异构部署和独立扩展能力。
AI.method: 1) 提出生成轴流水线(GAP)和时间步并行(TSP)实现更细粒度的流水线并行；2) 提出弹性训练器辅助生成(TAG)使训练器GPU资源可动态辅助执行rollout生成；3) 采用紧密单步约束异步策略进一步利用流水线尾部的气泡。
AI.result: 在3个硬件测试平台（16-32 GPU）上使用HunyuanVideo-13B、Wan2.1-14B、FLUX.1-12B和QwenImage-20B进行实验，DigenRL相比veRL-Omni和GenRL实现了1.56-2.10倍的吞吐量提升。
AI.conclusion: DigenRL通过解聚式架构和多项创新技术，为扩散式生成式LLM的强化学习训练提供了更高效的资源利用和扩展方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about reinforcement learning systems for diffusion-based IMAGE/VIDEO generation models (HunyuanVideo, Wan2.1, FLUX.1, QwenImage), not about 3D human motion generation. The application domain is completely different - it's computer vision/image generation rather than text-to-motion in computer graphics. While it uses diffusion models, the use case is image/video synthesis, not human motion synthesis. The pain points in the research profile (3D motion extraction, visual-guided feature extraction for motion, cross-modal alignment for motion) are not addressed at all.

title: Geometry-Aware Style Transfer in 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: In this paper, we present a novel geometry-aware style transfer framework for 3D Gaussian splatting (3DGS) that simultaneously transfers appearance attributes and geometric structures. Unlike prior works that primarily focus on color-based stylization and often overlook structural adaptation, our method explicitly incorporates geometry adaptation through a decoupled optimization scheme that alternately updates color and geometry parameters. This strategy alleviates potential interference between color and geometry updates, leading to stable and consistent scene-level geometry transformation. The decoupled optimization is enabled by the proposed geometry-aware contrastive feature matching (GCFM). GCFM integrates RGB, depth, and edge cues into a contrastive objective and is employed in both optimization phases to effectively transfer structural characteristics from style images to Gaussian primitives. Extensive experiments show that our approach achieves superior performance in both qualitative fidelity and quantitative metrics, significantly outperforming existing 3DGS-based stylization methods. Our code is available at \href{https://github.com/oweixx/gast}{https://github.com/oweixx/gast}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对3D高斯溅射(3DGS)的几何感知风格迁移框架，通过解耦优化方案同时迁移外观属性和几何结构。
AI.motivation: 现有3DGS风格化方法主要关注颜色风格化，忽略了结构适应性，导致几何变换不一致。
AI.method: 提出几何感知对比特征匹配(GCFM)，整合RGB、深度和边缘线索，在两个优化阶段使用，实现颜色和几何参数的交替更新。
