AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在定性和定量指标上均优于现有的3DGS风格化方法。
AI.conclusion: 解耦优化方案能够有效减轻颜色和几何更新之间的干扰，实现稳定一致的场景级几何变换。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) style transfer for scene rendering - completely different application domain from Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. The paper deals with color and geometric stylization of 3D scenes, while the research profile focuses on generating human motion from text/video inputs. Although both are in Computer Graphics, they are at opposite ends: one is about scene rendering/visualization, the other is about human motion synthesis. The methods (3DGS, GCFM) and pain points (stylization consistency vs. cross-modal alignment) are entirely unrelated.

title: When Helpfulness Overrides Causal Caution: Context-Dependent Suppression and Recovery in LLMs
comment: 43 pages, 3 figures, 5 tables. SSRN Abstract ID: 6965680
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly integrated into decision-support roles in business and policy contexts. While prior benchmark studies have primarily evaluated LLMs' causal reasoning capabilities, a more fundamental epistemic dimension has been overlooked: Causal Caution, defined as the propensity to refrain from causal judgment when empirical evidence is insufficient. This study examines the systematic suppression of Causal Caution that occurs when LLMs shift from academic to practical advisory contexts. Using an evaluation rubric inspired by Pearl's Causal Hierarchy (the PCH score), we conducted experiments on four high-performance LLMs -- Claude Sonnet 4.6, Claude Opus 4.7, GPT 5.5, and Gemini 3.1 Pro -- across 480 trials. Causal Caution maintenance rates were 91.7--100.0% in academic contexts but dropped to 6.7--18.3% in practical advisory contexts (Fisher's exact test, p < .001 across all models). Furthermore, when restricted to practical prompts requesting concrete recommendations or explanatory rationales, only 1 of 200 responses (0.5%) maintained Causal Caution. A brief self-correction prompt -- "Please reconsider this judgment from the perspective of causal relationships" -- restored the expression of Causal Caution to maintenance rates of 71.4--100.0% (McNemar's test, p < .001 across all models). These results suggest that helpfulness-oriented response patterns may suppress the expression of Causal Caution in practical advisory contexts, with important implications for organizational governance. The findings indicate that this suppression reflects context-dependent variation in expression rather than an underlying capability limitation, suggesting that multi-agent architectures that separate proposal generation from causal auditing may offer a promising governance design.

AI.tldr: 研究大型语言模型在学术与实践情境下表达"因果谨慎"(Causal Caution)的差异。测试4个LLM发现，因果谨慎维持率从学术情境的91.7-100%骤降至实践情境的6.7-18.3%，但简单自我纠正提示可恢复至71.4-100%。
AI.motivation: 现有基准研究主要评估LLM的因果推理能力，但忽视了一个更基本的认识论维度——因果谨慎(定义为当经验证据不足时克制因果判断的倾向)。实用情境中这种谨慎是否被系统性地抑制尚不清楚。
AI.method: 使用Pearl因果层级(PCH评分)评估框架，在480个trial中对4个高性能LLM(Claude Sonnet 4.6、Claude Opus 4.7、GPT 5.5、Gemini 3.1 Pro)进行实验，比较学术情境与实践咨询情境下的因果谨慎表达，并测试自我纠正提示的效果。
AI.result: 学术情境因果谨慎维持率91.7-100%，实践情境骤降至6.7-18.3%(Fisher精确检验，p<.001)。当限制为需要具体建议或解释性理由的实践提示时，200个响应中仅1个(0.5%)维持因果谨慎。使用"请从因果关系角度重新审视此判断"提示后，因果谨慎恢复至71.4-100%(McNemar检验，p<.001)。
AI.conclusion: 以帮助为导向的响应模式会抑制实践咨询情境中的因果谨慎表达，这反映的是情境依赖的表达变化而非底层能力限制。多 agent架构(分离提案生成与因果审计)可能是重要的治理设计方向。

relevance_reason: Completely different field and application domain. The paper is about LLM evaluation and causal reasoning in AI safety/alignment research, while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. Although the paper mentions "Visual Language Models", it uses them in a text-based causal reasoning context, not for visual-guided feature extraction or motion synthesis. No relevance to any of the specified pain points or application domain.

title: Autonomous Video Generation with Counterfactual Controllability for Self-Evolving World Models
summary: Existing literature claims that video generation essentially is world modelling. On the one hand, the claim is productive because it pushes generative AI beyond static images and toward temporally extended physical scenes. On the other hand, this claim dangerously relies on the belief that scaling visual prediction alone will automatically yield physical agents. We prefer a more accurate statement: video generation models learn a partial, implicit spatiotemporal world model, but not a fully grounded or controllable one. The reason is as follows: a model may generate a plausible video of a drone crossing a forest or a robot arm manipulating a cup, yet still fail to know which variables are controllable, which constraints belong to a particular body and which futures remain valid under intervention. The frontier in essence is not predictive realism alone, instead it emphasizes a self-evolving generative nature that requires the decisive criterion to be counterfactual controllability: the capability of asking what would happen under an action, to test whether the generated future can survive embodiment constraints and to feed the resulting action knowledge back into future imagination (generation). Therefore, in this paper we present a new perspective, i.e., autonomous video generation with counterfactual controllability is one promising way to realize self-evolving world models.

AI.tldr: 当前文献认为视频生成本质上就是世界建模，但这一说法不准确。视频生成模型学习的是部分隐式的时空世界模型，而非完全可落地或可控的模型。论文提出应将视频生成理解为具有反事实可控性的自主生成能力，这是实现自我进化世界模型的有前景方向。
AI.motivation: 现有文献声称"视频生成即世界建模"，这一观点虽然推动了生成式AI从静态图像向时序物理场景的发展，但也存在风险——仅依赖视觉预测的规模化无法自动产生物理智能体。作者认为需要更准确的定义来推动该领域发展。
AI.method: 论文提出将视频生成的核心标准定义为"反事实可控性"(counterfactual controllability)，即模型能够回答"在某动作下会发生什么"，检验生成的未来是否能承受具身约束，并将动作知识反馈到未来想象(生成)中。
AI.result: 作者主张：视频生成模型应学习部分隐式的时空世界模型，但需强调反事实可控性这一关键能力，使其能够理解哪些变量可控、哪些约束属于特定身体、哪些未来在干预下仍然有效。
AI.conclusion: 自主视频生成与反事实可控性的结合是实现自我进化世界模型的有前景途径。未来的前沿不在于单纯的预测真实性，而在于生成模型的自我进化能力。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses video generation (2D pixel space) while the research profile is about 3D human motion generation (skeletal joint trajectories). Although both use generative AI methods, they are in completely different application domains - video generation produces visual frames, while text-to-motion produces 3D body movements. The paper's focus on counterfactual controllability for world modeling does not directly address any of the specified pain points (2D-to-3D extraction, VLM quality assessment, visual-guided features for motion, or 2D-3D cross-modal alignment). The method and output space are fundamentally different from what's needed for computer graphics motion generation.

title: PHANTOM: A Large-Scale Dataset of Multimodal Adversarial Attacks for Vision-Language Models
comment: The dataset has been released at: https://huggingface.co/datasets/it4lia/PHANTOM
summary: We introduce a large-scale, open-source dataset of pre-generated adversarial attacks for vision-language models (VLMs). The dataset is designed to be diverse, representative, and practical, extending existing benchmarks by covering 10 high-level categories and 55 subcategories of harmful intents. Our primary goal is to make adversarial data accessible to the research community, given the computational cost and complexity of generating large numbers of attacks. The dataset comprises 47 524 adversarial samples, generated using state-of-the-art attack strategies from recent literature. Our work complements existing efforts by consolidating and extending prior benchmarks from multiple established sources, resulting in 7 826 intents, and introduce an additional category to broaden coverage. This provides realistic evaluation resources for studying model robustness and alignment. Our dataset intends to enable researchers and practitioners to systematically evaluate the robustness and safety of VLMs, fine-tune attack-generation models, and develop or stress-test defensive guardrails under diverse adversarial conditions. By releasing this resource, we aim to lower the barrier to adversarial research and foster more reproducible, comprehensive, and comparable evaluations of VLM safety.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个大规模、开源的视觉-语言模型（VLM）对抗攻击数据集，涵盖10个高级别类别和55个子类别的有害意图，包含47,524个对抗样本，旨在促进VLM安全性和鲁棒性研究。
AI.motivation: 由于生成大量对抗攻击的计算成本和复杂性较高，研究社区难以获取足够的对抗数据来进行模型安全评估。作者希望通过发布这个预生成的大规模对抗攻击数据集，降低对抗研究的门槛，促进VLM安全性和对齐研究的进展。
AI.method: 该数据集整合并扩展了多个已有基准来源，使用文献中最新的攻击策略生成对抗样本。数据集涵盖10个高级别类别和55个子类别的有害意图，共包含47,524个对抗样本和7,826个意图。
AI.result: 该数据集是目前规模最大、最全面的VLM对抗攻击开源数据集，涵盖多种有害意图类别，为研究人员和 practitioners 提供了评估VLM鲁棒性和安全性的实用资源，可用于模型安全评估、攻击生成模型微调以及防御护栏的压力测试。
AI.conclusion: 通过发布这一开源资源，作者希望降低对抗研究的门槛，促进更可复现、更全面、更可比较的VLM安全评估，推动视觉-语言模型安全研究的发展。

relevance_reason: 完全无关的应用领域。该论文是关于VLM（视觉语言模型）的对抗攻击数据集，用于模型安全性和鲁棒性研究，而研究档案是计算机图形学中的文本到3D人体运动生成。虽然两者都涉及VLM，但应用领域完全不同：该论文的VLM用于安全攻击防御，而研究档案中的VLM是用于从2D视频中提取视觉特征以进行运动生成。两者在应用目标、方法论和核心问题上都没有交集。

title: Differential Unfolding: Efficient Unfolding Reconstruction for Video Snapshot Compressive Imaging
summary: While Deep Unfolding Networks (DUNs) dominate video Snapshot Compressive Imaging (SCI), they remain constrained by a uniform design philosophy. Existing methods repeatedly stack high-complexity priors with identical structures, ignoring the fact that optimization trajectories converge toward static states. This results in representation stagnation, where high-cost computations are wasted on minimal feature updates. To address this inefficiency, we present Differential Unfolding (DU), a heterogeneous framework that replaces uniform repetition with dynamic evolution. Central to DU is the Differential Evolutionary Framework (DEF), which partitions the unfolding process into two complementary roles: structural anchoring and differential evolution. In this scheme, high-parameter general stages are sparsely deployed to generate high-fidelity feature foundations. Complementing these, lightweight differential stages employ a Differential Representation Prior (DRP) to propagate and refine these foundational features through a differential mechanism. By integrating Differential Representation Attention (DRA) for evolving attention maps and a Differential Modulated FFN (DM-FFN) for feature rectification, DRP effectively models cross-stage variations with minimal overhead. By focusing computational resources on dynamic evolution rather than static redundancy, DU achieves a superior trade-off between accuracy and efficiency. Extensive experiments verify that our method establishes new state-of-the-art results while significantly slashing computational overhead. https://github.com/Muyuan-Zhang/DU

AI.tldr: 提出微分展开(DU)框架，解决视频快照压缩成像中深度展开网络高计算成本和表征停滞问题，通过异构结构动态演化替代均匀重复设计。
AI.motivation: 现有深度展开网络(DUNs)采用统一设计哲学，反复堆叠高复杂度先验，忽视优化轨迹收敛于静态状态的事实，导致高成本计算浪费在微小特征更新上。
AI.method: 提出微分演化框架(DEF)，将展开过程分为结构锚定和微分演化两类阶段：高参数一般阶段稀疏部署生成高保真特征基础，轻量级微分阶段使用微分表征先验(DRP)通过微分机制传播和精炼特征，并集成微分表征注意力(DRA)和微分调制FFN(DM-FFN)。
AI.result: 在视频快照压缩成像任务上建立新的最先进结果，同时显著降低计算开销。
AI.conclusion: DU通过聚焦动态演化资源而非静态冗余，实现了精度和效率的卓越权衡。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about Video Snapshot Compressive Imaging (computational imaging/sensing), NOT 3D Human Motion Generation. The methods and goals are unrelated - it's about efficient video reconstruction for compressive sensing, not text-to-motion synthesis, VLM screening, or cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion space.

title: Accelerating Multimodal Large Language Models with Prior-Corrected Token Reduction
summary: Visual token reduction has emerged as an effective strategy for accelerating Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). Many existing methods prune tokens by ranking text-visual attention scores. However, we show that attention is often dominated by a model-induced prior: even without textual instruction, MLLMs tend to focus on certain task-agnostic regions. Consequently, the attention scores of instruction-conditioned tokens are suppressed, increasing the risk that these tokens are discarded during pruning. To address this issue, we propose Prior-Corrected Token Reduction (PriorTR), a training-free token reduction method that explicitly separates task-conditioned attention from the model-induced prior. PriorTR estimates the attention map of the prior, and contrasts it with the task-conditioned attention distribution to measure the additional usable information contributed by each visual token. Importantly, PriorTR computes both the model-induced prior and the task-conditioned posterior within a single forward pass by introducing a null token that serves as an instruction-agnostic probe in the attention block. This design avoids duplicated propagation. Extensive experiments across multiple multimodal benchmarks and MLLMs demonstrate that PriorTR consistently improves the trade-off between accuracy and efficiency over strong training-free baselines, particularly under aggressive token budgets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PriorTR方法,通过引入null token在单次前向传播中分离模型先验与任务相关注意力,从而解决现有方法中指令条件化token被误删的问题,实现更精准的视觉token剪枝。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉token剪枝方法依赖文本-视觉注意力分数,但发现注意力常被模型诱导的先验主导。即使无文本指令,MLLMs也会聚焦于特定任务无关区域,导致指令条件化token的注意力分数被抑制,在剪枝时被错误丢弃的风险增加。
AI.method: 提出PriorTR(先验校正token剪枝),是一种无需训练的token剪枝方法。核心创新是引入null token作为指令无关探针,在单个前向传播中同时估计模型先验和任务后验的注意力分布。通过对比先验与任务条件化注意力分布,计算每个视觉token贡献的额外可用信息。
AI.result: 在多个多模态基准测试和MLLMs上的广泛实验表明,PriorTR在激进token预算下仍能持续改善精度与效率的权衡,优于现有最强的无训练基线方法。
AI.conclusion: PriorTR通过显式分离模型先验与任务条件化注意力,有效解决了指令token被误剪的问题,为MLLMs的高效推理提供了新的思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) for general visual understanding tasks (image/video captioning, VQA), NOT about 3D human motion generation. While both involve Visual Language Models (VLMs), the application domain is completely different. The research profile targets Computer Graphics - specifically Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation, whereas this paper targets accelerating general-purpose MLLMs through visual token pruning. This is analogous to a paper about diffusion models for image generation vs. diffusion for human motion generation - same high-level method but entirely different application domain. The paper does not address any of the pain points listed (3D motion extraction, quality assessment for motion, visual-guided feature extraction for motion, cross-modal alignment for motion).

title: ATRIA: Adaptive Traceable ECG Reporting with Iterative Agents
summary: Existing ECG report generation is tightly coupled -- interpretation and reporting fused end-to-end, so errors propagate without stage-level recourse -- while agent-based systems decouple tasks but remain single-pass, never revisiting earlier outputs. Clinical ECG reporting instead unfolds iteratively, requiring progressive context integration and bidirectional editing. We present \textsc{ATRIA}, a multi-agent ECG reporting system that mirrors the clinician's iterative workflow: it binds every report claim to its supporting evidence, flags statements unsupported by that evidence, incorporates additional context mid-session, and lets clinicians verify and revise individual findings rather than accept one opaque output. Because its agents use ECG analysis models already in clinical use, the underlying findings are clinically trustworthy; and as a cloud-based web service, \textsc{ATRIA} is ready for immediate deployment. We demonstrate \textsc{ATRIA} through four interaction cases, with a live demo and video available.

AI.tldr: ATRIA是一个多智能体心电图(ECG)报告生成系统，模拟临床医生的迭代工作流程，解决现有系统紧耦合和单次通过的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有ECG报告生成存在两个关键问题：1)解释和报告端到端融合，错误会传播且无法在阶段层面纠正；2)基于智能体的系统虽解耦任务但仍为单次通过，从不回顾之前输出。临床ECG报告实际需要迭代进行，需要渐进式上下文整合和双向编辑。
AI.method: ATRIA多智能体系统通过以下机制实现迭代式ECG报告生成：1)将每个报告声明绑定到其支持证据；2)标记无证据支持的陈述；3)允许在会话中整合额外上下文；4)让临床医生验证和修改个别发现而非接受单一不透明输出。该系统使用已在临床使用的ECG分析模型，并通过云端Web服务部署。
AI.result: 通过四个交互案例演示了ATRIA的功能，并提供现场演示和视频。
AI.conclusion: ATRIA能够镜像临床医生的迭代工作流程，提供可验证、可修订的分层报告输出，同时基于已在临床验证的ECG模型确保临床可信度，并支持即时部署。

relevance_reason: This paper is about ECG medical reporting (healthcare/clinical domain), completely unrelated to Computer Graphics, 3D Human Motion Generation, or Text-to-Motion. The application domain is entirely different - medical cardiology vs. computer graphics motion synthesis. No relevance to the research profile's pain points or methods.

title: Dual-Branch Cross-Projection Debiasing through Diffusion-based Disentanglement
summary: Foundation models trained on biased datasets often rely on spurious correlations between target labels and non-causal attributes, resulting in poor generalization on minority groups. Bias mitigation remains challenging due to two fundamental issues. First, when group labels are unavailable, existing group-unsupervised methods typically infer spurious attributes implicitly from model behavior, making it difficult to identify spurious factors that are semantically aligned with real-world biases. Second, even with pseudo spurious supervision, most existing debiasing methods follow a single-branch design that operates within a single shared feature space, where target and spurious attributes are intrinsically entangled. To address the first challenge, we introduce Confidence-guided Bias Concept Mining (CBCM), which leverages diffusion-disentangled, semantically grounded concept representations to identify reliable spurious attributes without attribute annotations. To address the second challenge, we propose Dual-branch Cross-projection Debiasing (DCD), a prompt-tuning framework that separates target and spurious representations into two branches and explicitly removes spurious information through cross null-space projection while preserving target-relevant semantics. Extensive experiments on four benchmark datasets show that our method achieves state-of-the-art worst group accuracy among group-unsupervised approaches, while tuning at most 0.22% of the model parameters. The source code is available in the supplementary materials.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CBCM和DCD两种方法解决基础模型偏差问题。CBCM利用扩散解耦的语义概念表示来识别伪属性，无需属性注释；DCD采用双分支跨空间投影框架分离目标和伪表示，在保留目标语义的同时消除伪信息。实验在四个基准数据集上取得组无监督方法中最先进的最差组准确率，且仅调整0.22%的模型参数。
AI.motivation: 基础模型在有偏差数据集上训练时，往往依赖目标标签与非因果属性之间的虚假相关性，导致在少数群体上泛化性能差。偏差缓解面临两大挑战：一是当组标签不可用时，现有组无监督方法难以识别与真实世界偏差语义对齐的伪属性；二是即使有伪监督，大多数去偏方法采用单分支设计，在单一共享特征空间中操作，目标与伪属性固有纠缠。
AI.method: 为解决第一个挑战，提出置信引导偏差概念挖掘(CBCM)，利用扩散解耦的语义 grounded 概念表示来识别可靠的伪属性，无需属性注释。为解决第二个挑战，提出双分支跨投影去偏(DCD)，一个提示调优框架，将目标和伪表示分离到两个分支，并通过跨零空间投影明确消除伪信息，同时保留目标相关语义。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上的广泛实验表明，该方法在组无监督方法中实现了最先进的最差组准确率，同时仅调优最多0.22%的模型参数。
AI.conclusion: 研究成功解决了基础模型偏差 mitigation 的两大根本挑战，CBCM能自动识别语义对齐的伪属性，DCD能有效分离和消除伪信息且保持目标语义，为组无监督偏差缓解提供了有效方案。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses bias mitigation in foundation models for image classification tasks, completely outside the 3D human motion generation domain. While it uses diffusion-based disentanglement, the application is about debiasing classifiers and improving group robustness, not generating or processing human motion. The pain points are unrelated - no mention of 3D motion extraction, visual-guided feature extraction for motion models, or cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion. This is a case of using similar methods (diffusion) but in entirely wrong application domain.

title: Cycle-Consistent Neural Explanation of Formal Verification Certificates
summary: Formal verification produces machine-checkable certificates that attest to the satisfaction or violation of temporal properties, yet these certificates remain opaque to non-specialist stakeholders. We propose a cycle-consistent neural architecture that generates faithful natural language explanations of verification certificates. A forward network NN1 maps certificates to explanations, and an inverse network NN2 reconstructs certificates from explanations; a symbolic verifier closes the loop, providing a differentiable faithfulness proxy. A pointer-generator mechanism ensures lexical grounding by copying state names directly from the certificate. We evaluate on 420 test certificates spanning six verification methods (bounded proof, k-induction, inductive invariant, lasso, reachability, witness pair) in both YES and NO verdict variants, drawn from a financial compliance domain with 207 named states. Our trained architecture, combined with a hybrid inference-time routing strategy, achieves 90.0% cycle-verified soundness, surpassing a multi- LLM few-shot baseline (76.1% for the best of 16 LLM combinations across four frontier models) by 13.9 percentage points. The neural model wins on 10 of 12 verdict/kind categories, with three categories reaching 100% soundness. The architecture offers 860x faster inference (185 ms vs. 160 s per certificate for the full multi-LLM baseline), offline operation, deterministic outputs, and zero per-inference cost. These results demonstrate that trained specialization outperforms general-purpose LLM prompting for structured certificate explanation, while eliminating the deployment constraints of cloud-based inference.

AI.tldr: 提出一种循环一致的神经架构，能够为形式化验证证书生成忠实、自然的语言解释，并实现90.0%的循环验证声音性，比最佳多LLM基线高出13.9个百分点。
AI.motivation: 形式化验证产生的机器可检查证书对非专业利益相关者不透明，需要一种方法来生成可理解的自然语言解释，同时保持验证的忠实性。
AI.method: 提出一种cycle-consistent神经架构：前向网络NN1将证书映射到解释，逆向网络NN2从解释重构证书；使用符号验证器作为可微分的忠实性代理；引入pointer-generator机制直接从证书复制状态名称。评估420个测试证书，涵盖6种验证方法。
AI.result: 在420个测试证书上达到90.0%循环验证声音性，比最佳16个LLM组合（76.1%）高出13.9个百分点；神经模型在12个 verdict/kind类别中赢得10个，其中3个达到100%声音性；推理速度比LLM基线快860倍（185ms vs 160s）。
AI.conclusion: 训练有素的专业化模型在结构化证书解释任务上优于通用LLM提示方法，同时消除云端推理的部署约束，实现离线操作、确定性输出和零推理成本。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about formal verification certificate explanation using cycle-consistent neural networks, while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. The paper addresses making formal verification certificates understandable to non-experts, which has no relation to 3D motion generation, video-to-motion extraction, or cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion. None of the methods (VLM, diffusion-based motion synthesis, visual-guided feature extraction) from the research profile are present. This is a formal methods/verification paper, completely unrelated to computer graphics and motion generation.

title: Spectral Evolution-Guided Token Pruning in Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Reducing visual token redundancy is critical for accelerating Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) without degrading cross-modal reasoning performance. Existing token pruning methods typically rely on single-layer signals, such as attention scores or token similarities, which overlook the cross-layer transformation of visual representations and may exhibit positional bias in multimodal token sequences. To address this limitation, we propose a training-free token pruning framework based on Cross-Layer Spectral Evolution (CLSE). Instead of measuring token importance from single-layer feature magnitudes, CLSE quantifies how token representations evolve across Transformer layers in the frequency domain. This evolution reflects the transition from high-frequency structural details to low-frequency semantic abstractions. We observe that tokens with stronger spectral redistribution across layers are more likely to be semantically active and should therefore be preserved. By modeling cross-layer token dynamics, CLSE provides a stable importance criterion that mitigates positional bias. Extensive experiments on both image and video benchmarks demonstrate that CLSE achieves a superior trade-off between efficiency and accuracy under aggressive token reduction. Across multiple MLLMs, CLSE reduces FLOPs, KV cache memory, and latency while maintaining competitive or improved performance.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于跨层频谱演化(CLSE)的无训练token裁剪框架，通过在频域分析token表示跨Transformer层的演化来识别语义活跃的token，在图像和视频基准测试中实现效率和精度的更优权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有token裁剪方法依赖单层信号，忽略视觉表征的跨层转换，且可能在多模态token序列中表现出位置偏差，需要更稳定的重要性判据。
AI.method: CLSE在频域中量化token表示跨Transformer层的演化，测量从高频结构细节到低频语义抽象的转变，保留频谱重分布更强的token。
AI.result: 在 aggressive token reduction下实现更优的效率-精度权衡，多个MLLMs上减少FLOPs、KV cache内存和延迟，同时保持或提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模跨层token动态，CLSE提供了稳定的重要性判据，有效缓解位置偏差，为加速多模态大语言模型提供了一种有效的无训练token裁剪方案。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile focuses on Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation (Computer Graphics), while this paper addresses token pruning efficiency in Multimodal Large Language Models for image/video understanding tasks. Although both involve "video" as a modality, the paper's video understanding is for LLM inference optimization (not motion generation), and the method (token pruning via spectral analysis) has no connection to 3D motion synthesis, diffusion-based motion generation, or cross-modal 2D-to-3D alignment. These are entirely different research fields.

title: Agentic AI for Bilevel Long-Term Optimization of Policy-Driven Physical Layer Systems
summary: Network operators' changing policies, service requirements, and stringent real-time constraints render existing methods designed with fixed objectives and constraints ineffective. This paper presents Agentic long-term performance optimization (Agentic-LTPO), a nested bilevel optimization framework that can be applied to adaptive physical layer problem configuration. The key idea is to employ agentic AI to generate upper-level configurations in a bilevel optimization structure, where evolving operator policies, environment summaries, and historical experiences are translated into structured lower-level optimization problem configurations. The lower level solves the problems with updated configurations for real-time physical-layer decisions. Considering cell-free MIMO beamforming as a use case, we embody Agentic-LTPO by designing a new multi-agent decision process with retrieval-augmented experience-based verification in the upper level, together with a closed-form beamformer in the lower level. Experiments demonstrate that Agentic-LTPO exhibits strong adaptability to dynamic operator policies and effectively enhances the system's long-term performance by 57.2% compared to traditional methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Agentic-LTPO框架，将AI代理融入双层优化架构，用于自适应物理层问题配置，以应对网络运营商动态策略和实时约束。
AI.motivation: 现有方法基于固定目标和约束设计，无法适应网络运营商不断变化的政策、服务需求和严格的实时约束，导致效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出嵌套双层优化框架Agentic-LTPO：上层使用AI代理生成配置，结合检索增强的经验验证；下层使用闭式波束成形器进行实时决策。以无单元MIMO波束成形为用例实现。
AI.result: 实验表明，Agentic-LTPO对动态运营商政策表现出强适应性，的系统长期性能比传统方法提升57.2%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架成功实现了自适应物理层问题配置，为未来智能网络优化提供了新思路，具有重要的实际应用价值。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about wireless communications and MIMO beamforming optimization for network systems, not Computer Graphics or 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is telecommunications/wireless systems, which has no connection to text-to-motion generation, visual-guided feature extraction, or any computer graphics tasks. Even though both fields may use optimization techniques, the entire research context is entirely different.

title: Tri-Efficient Transfer Learning for Point Cloud Videos
summary: While point cloud foundation models have significantly advanced point cloud video understanding, existing parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) methods still suffer from two critical limitations: prohibitive annotation costs for large-scale point cloud datasets and severe memory bottlenecks. In this paper, we aim to mine richer supervision signals from existing data rather than blindly scaling datasets. A further key principle is that the memory footprint of fine-tuning must be drastically reduced compared to full fine-tuning, which remains elusive for current PEFT techniques. Driven by these challenges, we identify three core desiderata: data-, parameter-, and memory efficiency, and present PoinTriE, a unified framework that excels along all three dimensions. For pre-training, pseudo-motion trajectories are synthesized via rigid transformations, paired with text corpora and 2D projections derived from raw point clouds. We then propose a Geometric-Motion Duality Network optimized via multimodal contrastive learning, rigid rotation prediction, and motion distribution divergence to produce dense self-supervision. During fine-tuning, we freeze the pretrained backbone and only update a lightweight Spatio-temporal Side Network built with LoRA units. Equipped with a gradient flow masking strategy, PoinTriE simultaneously reduces memory consumption and parameter overhead. Extensive experiments confirm that PoinTriE establishes new state-of-the-art results on action recognition and semantic segmentation tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PoinTriE框架,针对点云视频理解中的三个核心挑战:数据效率、参数效率和内存效率。该方法通过合成伪运动轨迹、文本语料库和2D投影来生成自监督信号,采用几何-运动对偶网络进行多模态对比学习,在微调阶段使用带有LoRA单元的轻量级时空侧网络,并通过梯度流掩码策略显著降低内存消耗。实验表明该方法在动作识别和语义分割任务上达到了最先进水平。
AI.motivation: 当前点云基础模型虽已取得进展,但参数高效微调方法存在两大关键局限:1)大规模点云数据集的标注成本过高;2)严重的内存瓶颈。现有PEFT技术无法同时满足数据高效、参数高效和内存高效这三个核心需求。
AI.method: 1)预训练阶段:通过刚性变换合成伪运动轨迹,结合文本语料库和原始点云的2D投影;2)提出几何-运动对偶网络,采用多模态对比学习、刚性旋转预测和运动分布散度进行优化,生成密集自监督信号;3)微调阶段:冻结预训练 backbone,仅更新轻量级时空侧网络(内置LoRA单元),配合梯度流掩码策略同时降低内存和参数开销。
AI.result: 在动作识别和语义分割任务上建立了新的state-of-the-art结果,验证了PoinTriE在数据、参数和内存三个维度上的优越性能。
AI.conclusion: PoinTriE是一个统一的框架,能够同时满足数据高效、参数高效和内存高效三个核心需求,为点云视频理解提供了一种高效且可扩展的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses point cloud video understanding (action recognition and semantic segmentation), which is a different application domain from text-to-motion in 3D human motion generation. While both deal with motion data, the focus is on recognizing/classifying motions from point clouds rather than generating human motions from text or video. The paper uses some related techniques (LoRA, contrastive learning) but targets point cloud scene understanding rather than the cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion space that the research profile requires. It's a moderate methodological match but wrong application domain.

title: Can Aggregate Invariants Accelerate Continuous Subgraph Matching? Limits, Laws, and a Dynamic Spectral Index
summary: Spectral filtering recently delivered substantial pruning for \emph{static} subgraph matching: Laplacian interlacing rejects candidates whose neighborhoods cannot host the query. We study whether such aggregate structural tests can accelerate \emph{continuous} subgraph matching (CSM) over dynamic graphs, and answer in three parts. First, lazily maintained spectral bounds are infeasible exactly where spectral pruning has value: we characterize the tightest safe rule over a formalized perturbation relaxation and show that even it loses essentially all pruning power within four touching updates. Second, exact maintenance is affordable when selective: pruning utility and recomputation cost are anti-correlated across vertices -- hubs provably never prune -- so recomputing small-neighborhood spectra on touch sustains exact local spectra at microseconds per update, complete by construction. Third, integrated into a decoupled CSM benchmark against an identical-minus-spectra control, the tests remove up to $51\%$ of candidates or safely skip up to $47\%$ of update enumerations, yet enumeration intermediates remain unchanged -- beyond the gates' skipped first-level bindings, typically zero -- across two engines, four real graphs, two stream types, and $77$ solved queries; a constructed radius-stratified workload confirms the instrument detects the exception when one exists ($-99.9\%$ intermediates, $748\times$ faster). Aggregate tests accelerate what scales with candidate sets -- construction, list scans -- never adjacency-guided exploration. We distill an intermediate-invariance methodology for evaluating CSM filters and release a reusable dynamic local-spectra index.

The application domain is entirely different - it's about graph/database algorithms rather than video-to-motion synthesis, diffusion models for motion, or visual language models for human motion generation.

title: Zero-Shot Test-Time Canonicalization using Out-of-Distribution Scoring
summary: Pretrained vision models often misclassify inputs that are rotated, scaled, or sheared, even though these affine transformations leave the object class unchanged. Robustness is usually restored either by building equivariance into the architecture or by retraining with augmentation, both of which require changing or retraining the model. Test-time canonicalization instead leaves the classifier untouched. It undoes the transformation of each input, mapping it to a canonical form near the training distribution before classification. Existing canonicalizers, however, rely on a narrow set of logit-based energy scores and bespoke search procedures, leaving the design space of scoring functions and optimizers unexplored. We reframe canonicalization as out-of-distribution (OOD) detection, which lets any OOD score serve as the energy minimized over transformations. Across benchmarks ranging from handwritten characters and sketches to natural images and 3D point clouds, we systematically evaluate around twenty OOD scores and nine search algorithms, finding that distance-based scores paired with random search and local refinement perform best overall. Because canonicalizing an already-aligned input can hurt accuracy, we add a gated mechanism that transforms an input only when its OOD score indicates this is needed, preserving most in-distribution accuracy while retaining the robustness gains on transformed inputs. Code is available at github.com/johschm/its.

AI.tldr: 将测试时规范化重新定义为分布外检测问题，通过最小化任意OOD分数来撤销输入的仿射变换，使预训练视觉模型对旋转、缩放、剪切等变换保持鲁棒性，无需重新训练模型。
AI.motivation: 预训练的视觉模型在处理经过旋转、缩放或剪切等仿射变换的输入时经常错误分类，尽管这些变换不会改变对象类别。现有方法需要修改模型架构或使用数据增强重新训练，因此作者提出保持分类器不变，通过测试时规范化将输入映射到canonical form。
AI.method: 将规范化重新框架为OOD检测问题，使任意OOD分数可以在变换上最小化。系统评估约20种OOD分数和9种搜索算法，添加门控机制仅对需要变换的输入进行规范化处理。
AI.result: 距离分数与随机搜索和局部细化组合表现最佳。门控机制保留了大部分分布内准确性的同时，在变换输入上保持鲁棒性收益。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为预训练视觉模型的仿射变换鲁棒性提供通用框架，无需修改模型或重新训练。距离分数结合随机搜索是最优设计选择，门控机制有效平衡了分布内准确性和鲁棒性。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper addresses computer vision (making image classifiers robust to affine transformations), not 3D human motion generation or text-to-motion synthesis. The research profile focuses on Computer Graphics for text-to-motion in 3D human motion generation with methods like diffusion-based motion synthesis and VLM-guided feature extraction, while this paper is about test-time normalization for pretrained vision models to handle rotation/scale changes - a computer vision classification problem. No relevance to motion generation, text-to-motion, or cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion space.

title: ReM-MoA: Reasoning Memory Sustains Mixture-of-Agents Scaling
summary: Mixture-of-Agents (MoA) architectures improve inference-time scaling by organizing multiple LLM agents into layered reasoning pipelines. However, existing MoA variants fail to sustain gains as depth increases, exhibiting degradation, early plateauing, or saturation. We propose ReM-MoA, a memory-augmented MoA framework that sustains scaling through two mechanisms: (1) a Ranked Reasoning Memory that persistently stores and ranks reasoning traces from all layers using a comparative Reviewer Agent, and (2) a Curated Diversified Memory Routing scheme that exposes different agents to distinct combinations of successful and failed traces, preserving exploration diversity while propagating high-quality reasoning. We further introduce an optional multi-domain Reviewer distillation pipeline that improves ranking quality through frontier-model supervision. Across five reasoning benchmarks spanning math, formal logic, code, knowledge, and commonsense, ReM-MoA consistently outperforms prior MoA variants across both depth and width scaling, and its advantage widens with depth, establishing structured cross-layer reasoning memory as a key missing mechanism for scalable multi-agent inference.

AI.tldr: ReM-MoA是一种记忆增强的Mixture-of-Agents框架，通过两层机制维持推理时扩展性：(1)使用比较审稿人代理对所有层的推理痕迹进行持久化存储和排序；(2)通过策划的多样化记忆路由，让不同代理接触成功和失败推理的不同组合。实验表明该方法在五个推理基准测试上始终优于之前的MoA变体，且优势随深度增加而扩大。
AI.motivation: 现有MoA架构在深度增加时无法维持增益，出现性能退化、早期 plateau 或饱和现象。现有变体缺乏有效的跨层推理记忆机制来支持可扩展的多代理推理。
AI.method: 提出两个核心机制：(1)排序推理记忆(Ranked Reasoning Memory):使用比较审稿人代理持久化存储并排序所有层的推理痕迹；(2)策划多样化记忆路由(Curated Diversified Memory Routing):让不同代理接触成功和失败推理的不同组合，保留探索多样性同时传播高质量推理。还引入可选的多域审稿人蒸馏管道，通过前沿模型监督提高排序质量。
AI.result: 在数学、形式逻辑、代码、知识和常识五个推理基准测试上，ReM-MoA在深度和宽度扩展方面均一致优于之前的MoA变体，且其优势随深度增加而扩大。
AI.conclusion: 结构化跨层推理记忆是实现可扩展多代理推理的关键缺失机制，为MoA架构的推理时扩展性提供了新的研究方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Mixture-of-Agents (MoA) framework for scaling LLM reasoning, which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. The paper deals with multi-agent AI systems for reasoning tasks (math, logic, code), not 3D human motion generation, video-to-motion extraction, or any computer graphics domain. The application domain is entirely different - it's AI/LLM research focusing on reasoning scaling, not motion synthesis or computer graphics.

title: Deep Learning Approaches for 3D Medical Scene Completion: From Geometric Modeling to Generative Paradigms
summary: Three-dimensional scene completion has evolved as a major problem in computer vision and robotics, and its applications are diverse, including autonomous navigation and augmented reality. In this study, a systematic review has been conducted to compile the research contributions made in the last ten years, i.e., 2016 to 2026, which has revolutionized the field from the voxel semantic completion paradigm represented by SSCNet to the latest paradigm that combines generative diffusion priors with real-time rendering using a Gaussian splatting technique. The evolution in representation paradigms, such as voxel grids, point learning, implicit neural fields, transformer networks, diffusion networks, and the latest paradigm based on rendering-aware 3D Gaussian primitives, has been discussed in this study. A comprehensive analysis has been carried out on the contributions made in the last ten years, and a taxonomy has been developed to provide a clear idea about the contributions made in the field. The study has also discussed the research contributions made in the field, along with the challenges that still need to be addressed. Finally, the study has presented a research agenda that will provide a clear idea about the directions that can be followed in the development of the next-generation system

AI.tldr: 本文是一篇关于三维场景补全的综述论文，涵盖了2016-2026年间该领域从体素语义补全到扩散模型与高斯溅射结合的技术演进历程，并建立了分类体系、讨论了挑战与未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 三维场景补全在计算机视觉和机器人领域具有重要应用价值（如自动驾驶、增强现实等），但缺乏对该领域系统性综述来梳理十年来的技术演进脉络和研究方向。
AI.method: 系统性综述方法，收集并分析过去十年（2016-2026）的研究贡献，对比不同表示范式（体素网格、点学习、神经隐式场、Transformer网络、扩散网络、渲染感知3D高斯基元）的技术演变。
AI.result: 梳理了从SSCNet代表的体素语义补全范式到最新的扩散先验结合高斯溅射实时渲染的技术演进，建立了分类体系，识别了仍需解决的挑战，并提出了未来研究议程。
AI.conclusion: 该领域经历了从传统体素方法到神经渲染技术的重大变革，未来方向包括更高效的生成模型、实时渲染集成以及在机器人导航和AR中的应用拓展。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses 3D Medical Scene Completion, which is a completely different application domain from 3D Human Motion Generation. While both involve 3D and some methods like diffusion models, the target application is entirely different - medical scene completion focuses on completing anatomical/geometric structures in medical scans, not generating human motion. The pain points in the research profile (video-to-motion extraction, VLM screening, cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion) are not addressed at all. This falls under the "completely irrelevant" category as it's a different field entirely.

title: Bayesian control for coding agents
summary: Modern coding agents pair LLM generators with various tools, including cheap diagnostics and expensive verifiers. The tool-use decisions are typically governed by orchestrators that often use fixed rules and ignore uncertainty. We formulate orchestration as cost-sensitive sequential hypothesis testing: a Bayesian controller maintains a belief over candidate correctness and dynamically decides whether to gather more evidence, refine the candidate, verify it, or stop. Across six generators and nine coding benchmarks, Bayesian control proves to be most valuable when verification is costly and critics are informative but imperfect. Beyond control, the belief state yields an interpretable correctness score that outperforms token-probability and raw tool-success baselines for uncertainty quantification.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于贝叶斯控制的编码智能体编排方法，将工具使用决策建模为成本敏感的序贯假设检验问题，通过动态维护候选正确性的置信度来决策是否收集更多证据、修正候选、验证或停止。
AI.motivation: 当前编码智能体中，LLM生成器与各种工具（廉价诊断和昂贵验证器）配合使用，但编排器通常使用固定规则且忽略不确定性，因此需要一种能动态决策的工具使用策略。
AI.method: 将编排问题形式化为成本敏感的序贯假设检验：贝叶斯控制器维护对候选正确性的信念，动态决定是否收集更多证据、修正候选、验证或停止。在6个生成器和9个编码基准上进行了实验。
AI.result: 贝叶斯控制的价值在于验证成本高且批评者信息丰富但不完美时。此外，信念状态产生了一个可解释的正确性分数，在不确定性量化方面优于token概率和原始工具成功率的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 贝叶斯控制是一种有效的编码智能体编排方法，尤其适用于验证成本高、批评者信息丰富但不完美的场景。信念状态提供的正确性分数是比现有方法更好的不确定性量化指标。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about coding agents and LLM tool orchestration for software engineering tasks, while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - specifically 3D human motion generation from text-to-motion. The application domains are entirely different: coding/software engineering vs. 3D motion generation. Even though both involve LLMs, the use case and downstream application are completely unrelated.

title: Towards Fast and Effective Long Video Understanding of Multimodal Large Language Models via Adaptive Quasi-Gaussian Sampling
summary: Long video understanding remains a daunting challenge for \emph{Multimodal Large Language Models} (MLLMs) due to the excessive computation and memory footprint. Thus, \emph{keyframe selection} is often adopted to mitigate this shortcoming, which however still suffers from low flexibility and high noise due to its hard sampling principle. In this paper, we define video frame selection as a problem of \emph{Quasi-Gaussian Sampling}, and propose an adaptive and training-free approach termed \textbf{\emph{AdaQ}}. Inspired by the $3$-$σ$ rule of Gaussian distribution, the objective of AdaQ is to achieve the optimal $3$-$σ$ interval for different examples, \emph{i.e.}, a smaller $3$-$σ$ interval for the local query and a larger one for the global query, thereby facilitating robust and adaptive frame sampling. To validate AdaQ, we apply it to four MLLMs with three embedding models. The extensive experimental results not only show its obvious performance gains over the default MLLMs and the SOTA keyframe selection methods, \emph{e.g.}, helping Qwen3-VL-8B outperform GPT4o by 15.8\% on average by using only 64 frames, but also confirm its superior robustness and high efficiency for long-video understanding, \emph{e.g.}, \textbf{only 1 hyper-parameter} needs to be set. \textbf{Our code project} is given at \href{https://github.com/Zkayovo-xmu/AdaQ}{https://github.com/Zkayovo-xmu/AdaQ}.

AI.tldr: AdaQ是一种用于长视频理解的自适应无训练关键帧选择方法，基于准高斯采样和3σ规则，仅需设置一个超参数即可实现高效帧采样。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型处理长视频时面临计算和内存开销大的问题，传统关键帧选择方法基于硬采样原则，灵活性低且噪声高。
AI.method: 将视频帧选择定义为准高斯采样问题，提出AdaQ方法。利用高斯分布的3σ规则，为不同示例实现最优的3σ间隔：局部查询使用较小的3σ区间，全局查询使用较大的3σ区间，从而实现自适应鲁棒的帧采样。
AI.result: 在四个多模态大语言模型和三个嵌入模型上进行了广泛实验。结果表明，AdaQ性能显著优于默认MLLMs和SOTA关键帧选择方法。例如，仅使用64帧即可帮助Qwen3-VL-8B平均超越GPT4o达15.8%。
AI.conclusion: AdaQ方法在长视频理解任务上表现出显著的性能提升，具有优异的鲁棒性和高效率，仅需设置一个超参数即可工作，为长视频理解提供了一种有效且实用的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses video understanding for multimodal LLMs through adaptive keyframe selection (AdaQ), which is a completely different application domain from 3D Human Motion Generation. While the paper does use VLMs, it focuses on general video comprehension tasks (video Q&A, captioning) rather than extracting 3D motion information from video or generating human motion. The core goal is efficient long video processing for LLM input - not motion synthesis, motion extraction, or cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion space. The methods are also different: quasi-Gaussian sampling for keyframe selection vs. diffusion-based motion synthesis or visual-guided feature extraction for motion generation.

title: CompressKV: Semantic-Retrieval-Guided KV-Cache Compression for Resource-Efficient Long-Context LLM Inference
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2508.02401
summary: Long-context large language model (LLM) inference is increasingly constrained by the memory footprint and decoding cost of key-value (KV) caches, limiting sustainable deployment on resource-constrained hardware. Existing KV cache eviction methods typically apply heuristic token scoring over all heads in GQA-based LLMs. These methods ignore the different functionalities of attention heads, leading to the eviction of critical tokens and thus degrading the performance of LLMs. To address this issue, we propose CompressKV, a resource-efficient KV-cache compression framework for GQA-based LLMs. Instead of aggregating attention scores from all heads, CompressKV identifies Semantic Retrieval Heads (SRHs) that capture both the initial and final tokens of a prompt and semantically important mid-context evidence, and uses them to select tokens whose KV pairs should be retained. Furthermore, CompressKV allocates cache budgets across layers according to offline estimates of layer-wise eviction error. Experiments on LongBench and Needle-in-a-Haystack show that CompressKV consistently outperforms existing KV-cache eviction methods across memory budgets. Notably, it preserves over 97\% of full-cache performance using only 3\% of the KV cache on LongBench question-answering tasks and achieves 90\% accuracy with just 0.7\% KV storage on Needle-in-a-Haystack. These results demonstrate an improved resource--performance trade-off for long-context LLM inference. Our code is publicly available at: https://github.com/TUDa-HWAI/CompressKV

AI.tldr: CompressKV提出一种针对GQA架构LLM的高效KV缓存压缩框架，通过识别语义检索头来选择保留关键token，实现仅用3% KV缓存保持97%性能。
AI.motivation: 现有KV缓存驱逐方法忽略GQA模型中不同注意力头的功能差异，对所有头采用统一启发式评分，导致关键token被错误驱逐，性能下降。
AI.method: CompressKV识别语义检索头(SRHs)来捕获prompt的首尾token和语义重要的中间上下文证据，用于选择应保留KV对的token；并根据离线层间驱逐误差估计分配各层缓存预算。
AI.result: 在LongBench和Needle-in-a-Haystack上，CompressKV一致优于现有KV缓存驱逐方法。使用3% KV缓存在LongBench QA任务上保留97%以上全缓存性能；在Needle-in-a-Haystack上用0.7% KV存储达到90%准确率。
AI.conclusion: CompressKV为长上下文LLM推理提供了显著改善的资源-性能权衡，代码已公开于GitHub。

relevance_reason: This paper is about KV cache compression for efficient LLM inference in long-context scenarios - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is NLP/LLM efficiency, not motion generation or computer graphics. While both mention "semantic retrieval heads" and "token selection," these are LLM-specific concepts with no relevance to video-to-motion extraction, visual-guided feature extraction for 3D motion, or cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion space.

title: Co-occurring associated retained concepts in Diffusion Unlearning
comment: Accepted as a poster at ICLR 2026. Code available at https://github.com/damilab/CARE
summary: Unlearning has emerged as a key technique to mitigate harmful content generation in diffusion models. However, existing methods often remove not only the target concept, but also benign co-occurring concepts. As illustrated in Fig.1, unlearning nudity can unintentionally suppress the concept of person, preventing a model from generating images with person. We define these undesirably suppressed co-occurring concepts that must be preserved CARE (Co-occurring Associated REtained concepts). Then, we introduce the CARE score, a general metric that directly quantifies their preservation across unlearning tasks. With this foundation, we propose ReCARE (Robust erasure for CARE), a framework that explicitly safeguards CARE while erasing only the target concept. ReCARE automatically constructs the CARE-set, a curated vocabulary of benign co-occurring tokens extracted from target images, and leverages this vocabulary during training for stable unlearning. Extensive experiments across various target concepts (Nudity, Van Gogh style, and Tench object) demonstrate that ReCARE achieves overall state-of-the-art performance in balancing robust concept erasure, overall utility, and CARE preservation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReCARE框架，解决扩散模型中概念遗忘技术会意外删除良性共现概念的问题，通过构建CARE-set保护共现概念的同时实现目标概念的有效擦除。
AI.motivation: 现有概念遗忘方法在移除目标概念时，会不可避免地抑制与之共现的良性概念。例如去除"裸体"概念时，会同时抑制"人物"概念，导致模型无法生成包含人物的图像，损害了模型的实用性。
AI.method: 提出CARE评分作为量化指标衡量共现概念的保留程度；构建ReCARE框架，从目标图像中自动提取良性共现标记形成CARE-set词汇表，并在训练过程中利用该词汇表稳定地进行概念擦除，确保仅移除目标概念而保留共现概念。
AI.result: 在多种目标概念（裸体、梵高风格、Tench物体）上进行了广泛实验，证明ReCARE在概念擦除、模型效用和CARE保留三个维度上达到了最优平衡。
AI.conclusion: ReCARE框架能够有效解决概念遗忘中的共现概念保护问题，为扩散模型的安全应用提供了新的解决方案，具有重要的实践价值。

relevance_reason: This paper is about diffusion model "unlearning" for concept erasure in IMAGE generation (removing concepts like "nudity" while preserving co-occurring "person" concepts). The research profile specifically requires 3D HUMAN MOTION GENERATION (text-to-motion) from video inputs. Even though both use diffusion models, the application domain is completely different - image generation vs human motion generation are distinct fields in computer graphics. The paper does not address any of the profile's pain points (3D motion extraction from 2D video, VLM-based quality assessment, visual-guided feature extraction for motion models, cross-modal alignment for motion). This is a classic example of similar method (diffusion) but wrong application domain.

title: The Latent Bridge: A Continuous Slow-Fast Channel for Real-Time Game Agents
summary: A real-time agent for general computer use - with games as the most demanding case - must act within tens of milliseconds while still planning over seconds. These two regimes sit at opposite ends of the latency-quality tradeoff. A reasoning VLM (Qwen3-VL-8B-Thinking) deliberates effectively but requires ~1.5 s per response - far too slow for a 15 Hz control loop. In contrast, a reactive VLM (MiniCPM-o 4.5) acts in milliseconds but underperforms on planning-heavy tasks. We couple two frozen models of matched scale (9B reactive, 8B reasoning), leaving the communication channel as the sole trainable component. The standard coupling is a Text Bridge (T): the slow model writes a suffix the fast model reads. We introduce a learned continuous Latent Bridge (L) that projects the slow model's residuals into the fast model's input-embedding space in a LLaVA-style manner, avoiding any text round-trip; both are compared against Fast-Only (F). On 7 Atari games and a driving domain (MetaDrive), tuning the action decoder per channel on held-out seeds, the Latent Bridge matches or beats the Text Bridge in every domain: it significantly improves two games (MsPacman +57%, RoadRunner +28%) and is a safe drop-in elsewhere. Combining both channels interferes destructively (RoadRunner -96%), so only one should be used. The benefit is highly predictable: the bridge helps if and only if slow reasoning already beats fast reaction (T > F) - the Latent and Text gains over Fast-Only move together at r=0.93. MetaDrive is the controlled negative, where the Latent Bridge is demonstrably inert because the Text Bridge adds no value. We release replay recordings and reproducible pipelines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种双模型耦合架构，用于解决实时Agent在延迟与推理质量之间的权衡问题。通过将一个慢速推理VLM和一个快速反应VLM耦合，并引入可训练的潜在桥（Latent Bridge）来传递信息，在游戏和驾驶任务中实现了优于传统文本桥的性能。
AI.motivation: 实时Agent需要在毫秒级响应与秒级规划之间取得平衡。慢速推理模型效果好但延迟高（~1.5s），快速反应模型延迟低但规划能力弱。如何结合两者优势是关键挑战。
AI.method: 耦合两个冻结的等规模模型（9B反应性+8B推理），引入两种通信通道：(1)Text Bridge：慢模型写文本快模型读；(2)Latent Bridge：学习将慢模型残差投影到快模型输入嵌入空间的连续表示。在7个Atari游戏和MetaDrive驾驶域上评估，对每种通道调优动作解码器。
AI.result: Latent Bridge在所有领域匹配或优于Text Bridge：MsPacman提升+57%，RoadRunner提升+28%，其他游戏为安全替代。结合两个通道产生破坏性干扰（如RoadRunner -96%）。桥的帮助高度可预测：当T>F时有效，r=0.93。MetaDrive为对照负例，证明Latent Bridge在无增益场景下是惰性的。
AI.conclusion: 潜在桥是文本桥的有效替代或升级方案，收益可预测且高度可解释。两种通道不应同时使用。该方法为实时Agent的延迟-质量权衡提供了实用的解决方案。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper addresses real-time game agent latency issues by coupling slow/fast VLMs, while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. The paper focuses on gaming (Atari) and driving simulation, not human motion synthesis. It uses no motion generation models, no visual-guided feature extraction for motion, no diffusion-based motion synthesis, and doesn't address any of the stated pain points (3D motion extraction from 2D video, quality assessment, cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion).

title: Inclusive Interactive Collisions for Multi-View Consistent Compositional 3D Generation
summary: Recent breakthroughs in 3D generation have advanced notably with the development of text-to-image diffusion model. However, existing methods remain two practical challenges: (1) They primarily generate single 3D object, but struggle to generate multi-object compositional 3D assets due to the lack of the modeling for Gaussian primitives in reasonable interactions. (2) They often suffer from cross-view inconsistency during 3D optimization, as Score Distillation Sampling inherently performs on each single view, inevitably resulting in cross-view hallucinations. To solve above issues, we propose I2C-3D, a novel optimization-based method to generate multi-view consistent compositional 3D assets with reasonable interactions. Specifically, we propose an Inclusive Interactive Collisions strategy to guide Gaussian primitives appearing in reasonable interaction regions naturally, thereby ensuring objects in the compositional scene interact in a physically plausible and visually coherent way. Additionally, to enhance multi-view consistency, Multi-View Adaptive Score Distillation Sampling is devised to distill multi-view consistency prior and layout prior from pre-trained diffusion model by modulating attention map of instance token and spatial token across viewpoints. Benefiting from above elaborate designs, I2C-3D not only generates high-fidelity multi-view consistent compositional 3D assets but also supports 3D editing flexibly, facilitating complex scene generation. Extensive experiments demonstrate our I2C-3D outperforms existing methods in generation quality and multi-view consistency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出I2C-3D方法，用于生成多视角一致的多对象交互式3D资产。该方法解决了现有3D生成中的两个主要挑战：多对象组合生成和跨视角一致性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有3D生成方法面临两个挑战：(1) 主要生成单一3D对象，难以生成具有合理交互的多对象组合3D资产；(2) 在3D优化过程中存在跨视角不一致问题，因为分数蒸馏采样本身在每个单独视角上执行，导致跨视角幻觉。
AI.method: 提出两种核心策略：1) 包含式交互碰撞策略(Inclusive Interactive Collisions)，引导高斯原语出现在合理的交互区域中，确保组合场景中的对象以物理上可信且视觉上连贯的方式交互；2) 多视角自适应分数蒸馏采样(Multi-View Adaptive Score Distillation Sampling)，通过调制实例标记和空间标记的注意力图，从预训练扩散模型中提取多视角一致性和布局先验。
AI.result: I2C-3D不仅能够生成高保真的多视角一致性组合3D资产，还支持灵活的3D编辑，促进复杂场景生成。广泛实验表明，该方法在生成质量和多视角一致性方面优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过Inclusive Interactive Collisions和Multi-View Adaptive Score Distillation Sampling的精心设计，I2C-3D成功解决了多对象3D生成和跨视角一致性的双重挑战，为复杂3D场景生成提供了有效解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on 3D object/scene generation (multi-object compositional 3D assets), while the research profile is specifically about Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. These are fundamentally different application domains - one generates 3D objects/scenes, the other generates human motion/animations. Although both use diffusion-based approaches, the application domain mismatch is critical. The pain points in the profile (2D video to 3D motion extraction, VLM-based screening, visual-guided feature extraction for motion) are not addressed by this paper which deals with multi-view consistency and object collision in 3D asset generation.

title: On the Smallness of the Large Language Models Scaling Exponents
summary: We discuss reasons why the scaling exponents of current Large Language Models (LLMs) applications are indicating an unsustainable regime in terms of energy resources. We further show that attributing the smallness of such exponents to a numerical bias due to the neglect of a non-zero value of the loss function in the limit of infinite data (``pedestal effect") does not remove the unsustainability issue. Finally, the effects of the smoothness (roughness) of the data on the scaling exponents is commented upon based on an analogy with phenomenological models of fluid turbulence.

title: MorVess: Morphology-Aware Pulmonary Vessel Segmentation Network
summary: Accurate pulmonary vessel segmentation remains challenging due to the sparse, tortuous, and multi-scale nature of vascular structures, where small branches are easily lost and topology integrity is difficult to preserve under voxel-wise supervision. Existing deep segmentation models primarily optimize binary masks, lacking explicit geometric constraints, thus struggling to recover continuous tubular morphology and fine vascular connectivity. In this study, we introduce MorVess, a morphology-aware segmentation framework that integrates differentiable geometric priors with large-scale foundation model adaptation to achieve fine-grained vascular parsing. MorVess jointly predicts vessel masks, distance maps, and thickness maps, providing explicit supervision for vascular boundaries, centerline consistency, and smooth diameter transitions. A lightweight 2.5D adapter bridges 3D spatial context and 2D SAM representations, while a global-local fusion block aggregates multi-level semantics and geometric cues for high-fidelity topology reconstruction. Across two challenging pulmonary CT benchmarks, MorVess delivers superior Dice, clDice, and HD95 scores, substantially improving small-vessel recovery and global connectivity. These results demonstrate that embedding geometric intelligence into pretrained vision models offers a principled and scalable pathway toward precise vessel analysis and clinically reliable structural quantification. Our source code is available at https://github.com/MaoFuyou/MorVess.

AI.tldr: MorVess是一种结合可微几何先验和大规模基础模型适配的肺血管分割框架，通过联合预测血管掩码、距离图和厚度图实现细粒度血管解析。
AI.motivation: 现有深度分割模型缺乏几何约束，难以恢复连续的管状形态和精细的血管连通性，小血管分支容易丢失，拓扑完整性难以保持。
AI.method: 1) 联合预测 vessel masks、distance maps 和 thickness maps，提供血管边界、中心线一致性和直径过渡的显式监督；2) 轻量级2.5D适配器桥接3D空间上下文和2D SAM表示；3) 全局-局部融合块聚合多级语义和几何线索进行高保真拓扑重建。
AI.result: 在两个肺CT基准数据集上，MorVess在Dice、clDice和HD95分数上均取得优异性能，显著提升了小血管恢复和全局连通性。
AI.conclusion: 将几何智能嵌入预训练视觉模型为精确血管分析和临床可靠的结构量化提供了一条原则性和可扩展的途径。

title: A specialized reasoning large language model for accelerating rare disease diagnosis: a randomized AI physician assistance trial
summary: Rare diseases affect millions of individuals worldwide, yet timely diagnosis remains a major public health challenge due to scarcity of specialized clinical expertise. While large language models (LLMs) show promise to support rare disease diagnosis, current models are constrained by insufficient clinical deployability, limited clinically grounded evidence, and scarcity of training data. Here we present RaDaR (Rare Disease navigatoR), an open-source, compact reasoning LLM (32B parameters) for rare disease diagnosis. RaDaR was trained with 49,170 publicly available free-text cases and 104,666 synthetic cases with reasoning-enhanced training. RaDaR showed the strongest performance among evaluated open-source models, including the 671B DeepSeek-R1, across public benchmarks and four external validation centers. In a retrospective cohort, RaDaR prioritized the final diagnosis before documented clinical suspicion in 61.06 percent of cases, corresponding to a potential lead time of 1.87 months and 50.18 percent of the within-center interval. In a randomized physician-assistance trial, RaDaR assistance improved physicians' rare-disease diagnostic accuracy by 21.44 percentage points compared with internet search alone. Synthetic-data ablations suggested that phenotype-anchored narratives provide useful training signal for long-tail rare diseases, with a monotonic scaling trend within the tested data range. Together, RaDaR and its development and validation framework provide a deployable rare-disease reasoning model and a reproducible development framework for diagnostic AI under data scarcity.

AI.tldr: RaDaR是一个用于罕见病诊断的开源紧凑推理大语言模型（32B参数），通过49,170个公共病例和104,666个合成病例进行训练，在公开基准测试和四个外部验证中心上表现优于DeepSeek-R1等开源模型，并在回顾性队列中将最终诊断优先于临床怀疑61.06%的病例，在随机医师辅助试验中将罕见病诊断准确率提高21.44个百分点。
AI.motivation: 罕见病影响全球数百万人，但由于专业临床知识的稀缺，及时诊断仍然是一项重大公共卫生挑战。现有大语言模型在临床部署性、临床证据和训练数据方面存在局限，需要一个专门针对罕见病诊断的可行解决方案。
AI.method: 使用49,170个公开可用自由文本病例和104,666个推理增强的合成病例进行训练，开发了一个名为RaDaR的32B参数开源紧凑推理模型，并在公开基准测试、四个外部验证中心、回顾性队列和随机医师-assistance试验中进行评估。
AI.result: RaDaR在评估的开源模型中表现最强，包括在公共基准测试和四个外部验证中心上优于671B的DeepSeek-R1。在回顾性队列中，RaDaR在61.06%的病例中将最终诊断优先于记录的临床怀疑，潜在领先时间为1.87个月，占中心内间隔的50.18%。在随机医师辅助试验中，RaDaR辅助将医师的罕见病诊断准确率比仅使用互联网搜索提高了21.44个百分点。合成数据消融表明，表型锚定叙事为长尾罕见病提供了有用的训练信号。
AI.conclusion: RaDaR及其开发和验证框架提供了一个可用于临床部署的罕见病推理模型和在数据稀缺条件下开发诊断AI的可重复开发框架。

title: Geometry-Instructed Video Editing
summary: Object-level geometric edits, including translating, rotating, scaling, duplicating, or removing an object, are routine operations in digital content creation (DCC) workflows, yet they remain unreliable in generative video editing. The key challenge lies in specifying the target object's 3D state change unambiguously across viewpoint and time, while consistently updating geometry-dependent secondary effects such as shadows and reflections. We introduce GIVE, a geometry-instructed video editing framework that represents edits through a unified object-state formulation. Two video-aligned geometry streams describe the target object before and after editing: a depth-box encoding coarse 3D placement and extent, and an orientation-box providing an appearance-agnostic orientation cue. Together, these streams provide a compact pre/post geometric specification for object-state transitions. To provide paired supervision for learning these edits, we build a scalable graphics-engine pipeline that executes object-level edit programs and renders controlled before/after pairs, isolating the intended geometric edit while keeping secondary effects consistent with the transformation. Experimental results demonstrate that GIVE produces faithful geometric edits with temporal coherence and consistent secondary effects across operators in a unified framework, and shows promising transfer to in-the-wild videos. Project page: https://geometry-instructed-video-editing.github.io/give/

AI.tldr: GIVE是一个几何指导的视频编辑框架,通过统一的物体状态表示来处理视频中的物体级几何编辑(平移、旋转、缩放、复制、删除)。该方法使用两个视频对齐的几何流(depth-box和orientation-box)来描述编辑前后的3D状态变化。
AI.motivation: 在数字内容创作工作流中,物体级几何编辑是常规操作,但在生成式视频编辑中仍然不可靠。核心挑战在于:如何在跨越视角和时间的同时明确指定目标物体的3D状态变化,并保持与几何相关的二级效果(阴影、反射)的一致性。
AI.method: 提出统一物体状态表示的编辑框架,使用两个视频对齐的几何流:1)depth-box编码粗略的3D位置和范围;2)orientation-box提供外观无关的方向线索。这两个流提供了编辑前后几何规范的紧凑表示。构建可扩展的图形引擎管道来生成成对的监督数据,执行物体级编辑程序并渲染受控的前后对比。
AI.result: 实验表明GIVE能够产生保真的几何编辑,具有时间一致性,在统一框架内保持二级效果的一致性,并显示出对野外视频的良好迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: GIVE框架通过几何指导的方式成功解决了视频编辑中物体级几何变换的难题,为生成式视频编辑提供了新的研究方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about geometry-instructed video editing for object-level geometric transformations (translation, rotation, scaling, etc.) in general videos, which is a completely different application domain from the research profile's focus on 3D Human Motion Generation (text-to-motion). While both are in computer graphics/video domain, GIVE deals with editing arbitrary objects in video to maintain geometric consistency (shadows, reflections), not generating human motion. The pain points are unrelated - this paper doesn't address 3D motion extraction from 2D video, VLM-based quality assessment, visual-guided feature extraction for motion models, or cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion space. The methods are superficially similar (video processing) but applied to entirely different problems.

title: Reinforcement Learning for Computer-Use Agents with Autonomous Evaluation
comment: Accepted to the 4th International Workshop on Generalizing from Limited Resources in the Open World (GLOW @ IJCAI 2026)
summary:
Computer-Use Agents (CUAs) execute high-level user goals by perceiving and acting directly within graphical user interfaces. However, reinforcement learning for CUAs remains difficult because open-ended desktop environments rarely provide scalable, machine-readable reward signals: task success is often visually grounded and hard to specify with handcrafted reward functions or dense manual labels.
  We propose an RL fine-tuning framework that uses autonomous vision-language evaluation as a scalable supervision signal for GUI agents. Given a final screenshot and the original instruction, a Vision-Language Model judges task completion and provides terminal feedback without task-specific heuristics or manual labels during policy optimization.
  Because autonomous evaluators are imperfect, we model their feedback as a noisy binary reward channel and derive a noise-corrected reward estimator for Proximal Policy Optimization. Experiments across macOSWorld, Windows Agent Arena, and OSWorld show that corrected evaluator rewards outperform both zero-shot baselines and raw evaluator rewards, improving success rates by an average of 12.6 percentage points over zero-shot performance and 5.1 points over raw evaluator fine-tuning. These results suggest that autonomous evaluation can serve as a practical reward signal for RL in GUI environments when evaluator noise is explicitly modeled and corrected.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自主视觉语言评估的强化学习微调框架，用于提升计算机使用代理在图形用户界面环境中的任务执行能力。
AI.motivation: 计算机使用代理在开放式的桌面环境中难以获得可扩展的机器可读奖励信号，因为任务成功通常是视觉基础的，难以用手工设计的奖励函数或密集的人工标签来指定。
AI.method: 提出一种RL微调框架，利用自主视觉语言评估作为可扩展的监督信号。具体而言，给定最终截图和原始指令，视觉语言模型判断任务完成并提供终端反馈，无需任务特定启发式方法或人工标签。由于自主评估器存在不完美性，将评估器反馈建模为噪声二进制奖励通道，并推导出针对近端策略优化的噪声校正奖励估计器。
AI.result: 在macOSWorld、Windows Agent Arena和OSWorld三个基准测试上的实验表明，校正后的评估器奖励优于零样本基线和原始评估器奖励，零样本性能平均提升12.6个百分点，原始评估器微调提升5.1个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明，当评估器噪声被明确建模和校正时，自主评估可以作为GUI环境中强化学习的实用奖励信号。

It does not address any of the pain points: 3D motion extraction from 2D video, quality assessment for motion generation, visual-guided feature extraction for motion models, or cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion. This is a case of "similar method (VLM) but wrong application domain" - should get low score per evaluation criteria.

title: FiCA: Feed-forward instant Gaussian Codec Avatars from a Single Portrait Image
summary: We introduce FiCA, a Feed-forward, instant Gaussian Codec Avatar generation pipeline that creates lifelike avatars from a single portrait image. Generating a photorealistic and drivable avatar from just a single image is significantly challenging due to the limited visual information available to accurately infer the 3D appearance and geometry of human heads. To address this, we develop a novel system that combines human-centric vision foundation models with a diffusion model. This system is designed to fully exploit partial visual observations to generate lifelike human avatars. Our proposed diffusion model learns a generative mapping from these partial observations to complete and authentic 3D mesh reconstruction. Additionally, we introduce a feed-forward mesh refinement network that enhances the fidelity and identity preservation of the generated avatars, eliminating the need for person-specific test-time optimization. By leveraging a universal prior model that decodes a generated mesh into a set of 3D Gaussians, we generate a photorealistic 3D Gaussian avatar, capable of being driven with novel expressions in real-time. Our experiments demonstrate that the avatars generated by our feed-forward approach faithfully represent diverse identities and surpass the visual quality of avatars produced by recent competing methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了FiCA系统，这是一个前馈即时高斯编码头像生成管道，能够从单张肖像图像生成逼真的可驱动3D头像。该系统结合了人类中心视觉基础模型和扩散模型，利用部分视觉观察生成完整且真实的3D网格重建，并通过前馈网格细化网络增强保真度和身份保留，最后使用通用先验模型将生成的网格解码为3D高斯表示，实现实时驱动新表情的逼真3D头像。
AI.motivation: 从单张图像生成逼真且可驱动的头像具有重大挑战，因为可用的视觉信息有限，难以准确推断人头的3D外观和几何形状，这是该领域面临的核心难题。
AI.method: 提出了一种结合人类中心视觉基础模型与扩散模型的新型系统：1)利用扩散模型学习从部分观察到完整真实3D网格重建的生成映射；2)引入前馈网格细化网络增强保真度和身份保留，无需针对个人的测试时优化；3)使用通用先验模型将生成的网格解码为3D高斯集合，生成可实时驱动新表情的逼真3D高斯头像。
AI.result: 实验表明，前馈方法生成的头像忠实地代表了不同身份，超越了近期竞争方法生成头像的视觉质量。
AI.conclusion: FiCA系统能够从单张肖像图像实时生成高质量、逼真的可驱动3D头像，具有良好的身份保留效果，为单图像头像生成任务提供了有效的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D head/face avatar generation from single portrait images, which is a different application domain from the research profile's Text-to-Motion 3D Human Motion Generation. While both use diffusion models, FiCA focuses on facial animation and head avatar rendering (not full body motion), and addresses extracting 3D geometry from single images (not from video sequences). The pain points are also different - this paper doesn't address video-to-motion extraction, VLM-based screening, or cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion space. It's in the broader computer graphics field but targets a fundamentally different application (facial avatars vs. human motion synthesis).

title: Governed Shared Memory for Multi-Agent LLM Systems
summary: Multi-agent LLM environments require robust mechanisms for shared knowledge management. This paper formalizes the fleet-memory problem and identifies four foundational failure modes: unauthorized leakage, stale propagation, contradiction persistence, and provenance collapse. To address these, we define explicit systems-level primitives: scoped retrieval, temporal supersession, provenance tracking, and policy-governed memory propagation. These primitives are implemented in MemClaw, a production multi-tenant memory service, and evaluated via ArgusFleet, a reproducible harness testing four governance dimensions. Rather than a baseline comparison, this study measures a live production service, emphasizing real-world architectural insights and negative results. Key Evaluation Results Provenance: Successfully reconstructed 100% of depth-four derivation chains with correct writer identity at sub-second per-hop latency. Propagation: Demonstrated high intra-fleet visibility with zero cross-fleet leakage. Under strong write mode, write-to-visible latency was optimized to a single search round-trip. Production Architectural Issues Discovered Asymmetric Scope Enforcement: Tenant isolation held, but sub-tenant scope was initially bypassed on direct GET-by-id requests for agent-scoped credentials (disclosed and remediated during the study). Pipeline Ordering Conflict: While contradiction supersession works for admitted writes, a synchronous near-duplicate gate can prematurely reject contradictory writes before the asynchronous contradiction detector can evaluate them. Conclusion: Long-context retrieval alone is insufficient for production multi-agent memory. Governed shared memory demands explicit systems-level abstractions, and live evaluation is vital to expose enforcement and pipeline-ordering failures missed by design-only treatments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并解决了多智能体LLM环境中的fleet-memory问题，定义了四个基础失败模式及对应的系统级原语，通过MemClaw生产服务和ArgusFleet评估框架进行验证。
AI.motivation: 多智能体LLM环境需要强大的共享知识管理机制，但现有长文本检索方法不足以应对生产环境中的治理挑战。
AI.method: 定义了四个系统级原语（作用域检索、时间超继承、来源追踪、策略治理的记忆传播），在MemClaw生产多租户记忆服务中实现，通过ArgusFleet可复现测试框架评估四个治理维度。
AI.result: 来源追踪达到100%深度四推导链重建，单搜索轮次延迟；高租户内可见性，零跨租户泄漏。发现两个生产问题：非对称作用域执行（子租户作用域被绕过）和管道排序冲突（同步近重复门过早拒绝矛盾写入）。
AI.conclusion: 长文本检索不足以支撑生产多智能体记忆。治理共享记忆需要明确的系统级抽象，实物评估对暴露设计和执行中的失败至关重要。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses multi-agent LLM system memory governance (MemClaw, ArgusFleet frameworks), which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely different - this is about LLM infrastructure/memory management, not computer graphics, video-to-motion extraction, or motion synthesis. The methods (memory governance primitives) have no relevance to diffusion-based motion synthesis, visual-guided feature extraction, or cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion space.

title: Latent Visual States for Efficient Multimodal Reasoning
summary: The integration of visual evidence has significantly enhanced the capabilities of large multimodal models. However, this integration predominantly relies on generating discrete outputs (etc., code or box coordinates) to invoke external tools, a process that introduces rigid dependencies and substantial latency. To overcome these limitations, we propose {EVA} (LatEnt Visual StAtes), a novel framework that natively generates continuous latent visual representations. These internal representations manifest as an adaptive sequence of Latent\_slot tokens, serving as intermediate visual thoughts during the reasoning process. These Latent\_slot tokens are then trained end-to-end with the discrete text tokens. This co-optimization, notably, causes extreme policy deviation in the 'transition window' following the Latent\_slot tokens. We develop D-GSPO (Decouple-GSPO) to target this root cause by decoupling the optimization of latent and discrete components. To support SFT, we construct EVA-230K, a high-quality text-image interleaved CoT dataset encompassing a diverse range of real-world scenes, documents, charts and OCR tasks. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks confirm that EVA achieves significant performance gains while enhancing inference efficiency.

AI.tldr: EVA框架通过生成连续潜在视觉表示(Latent_slot tokens)来解决大视觉语言模型中依赖离散输出的局限性，并配合D-GSPO算法解决优化过程中的策略偏移问题，在多个基准测试上实现了显著的性能提升和推理效率增强。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型集成视觉证据主要依赖生成离散输出(代码或边界框坐标)来调用外部工具，这种方式存在刚性依赖和高延迟的局限性。
AI.method: 提出EVA框架生成连续潜在视觉表示，使用Latent_slot tokens作为中间视觉推理思考，并与离散文本token进行端到端联合优化。同时开发D-GSPO算法解耦潜在组件和离散组件的优化，以解决transition window中的策略偏移问题。构建EVA-230K高质量文本图像交错CoT数据集。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上实现了显著的性能提升，同时增强了推理效率。
AI.conclusion: EVA框架通过连续潜在视觉表示和创新的优化方法，为多模态模型的视觉理解提供了一种更高效、更灵活的新范式。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is specifically about Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation (Computer Graphics), while this paper is about Visual Language Models (VLMs) for general multimodal reasoning. Although both mention VLMs, this paper applies VLMs to general image-text reasoning tasks, not to motion generation, 3D human motion extraction, or any computer graphics domain. The paper does not address any of the specified pain points (3D motion extraction from 2D video, quality assessment for motion VLM screening, visual-guided feature extraction for motion models, or 2D video to 3D motion alignment).

title: GUI vs. CLI: Execution Bottlenecks in Screen-Only and Skill-Mediated Computer-Use Agents
summary: Computer-use agents can execute software tasks through either graphical interfaces or programmatic command interfaces, but existing evaluations confound interaction modality with differences in tasks, initial states, verifiers, and permitted actions. We introduce a matched execution-layer benchmark of 440 desktop tasks across 18 applications and 12 workflow categories, where screen-only GUI agents and skill-mediated CLI agents receive identical goals, states, and final-state verifiers while being restricted to modality-native actions. In this controlled setting, the strongest GUI agent reaches a 59.1% full pass rate, outperforming the strongest original-skill CLI agent at 48.2%; however, verifier-guided skill augmentation raises CLI success to 69.3%, showing that much of the CLI deficit comes from incomplete skill coverage rather than model capability alone. These results suggest that GUI and CLI expose different execution bottlenecks: GUI agents are limited by reliable grounded interaction over long-horizon workflows, whereas CLI agents are limited by the coverage and scalability of their skill interfaces.

AI.tldr: 论文引入了一个匹配的桌面任务基准测试（440任务/18应用/12类别），用于控制比较GUI代理和CLI代理的性能。研究发现：最强GUI代理（59.1%）优于原始CLI代理（48.2%），但验证器引导的技能增强后CLI达69.3%超越GUI，表明CLI劣势主要来自技能覆盖不足而非模型能力。
AI.motivation: 现有评估混淆了交互模态与任务、初始状态、验证器和允许操作的差异，无法真正比较GUI和CLI代理的能力。需要控制变量下的公平对比。
AI.method: 构建440个桌面任务的匹配执行层基准测试，涵盖18个应用和12个工作流类别。GUI代理和CLI代理接收相同目标、相同状态、相同最终状态验证器，但限制使用各自模态原生的动作集。
AI.result: 最强GUI代理达59.1%完全通过率，优于最强原始CLI代理的48.2%；但验证器引导的技能增强将CLI成功率提升至69.3%，表明CLI的大部分劣势来自技能覆盖不完整而非模型能力本身。
AI.conclusion: GUI和CLI代理暴露不同的执行瓶颈：GUI代理受限于长时序工作流中的可靠接地交互能力，CLI代理受限于技能接口的覆盖度和可扩展性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about GUI vs CLI computer-use agents, which is completely unrelated to the research profile. The research profile is focused on Computer Graphics - specifically Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation with methods like video generation models, diffusion-based motion synthesis, and cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion. The paper addresses none of the pain points and uses entirely different methods (agent systems, desktop task benchmarks) in a completely different application domain (computer use agents vs 3D human motion generation).

title: From Open Waters to Enclosed Cabins: ProteusVPR for Cross-Scene Visual Place Recognition in Maritime Perception and Cabin Inspection
summary: Autonomous robotic inspection in maritime environments presents unique challenges for Visual Place Recognition (VPR) due to cross-scene perceptual shifts. Robots navigating ship-borne environments must transition between visually distinct domains: open decks with sparse textures and severe illumination changes, and enclosed cabins with repetitive structures and high visual ambiguity. Existing VPR methods, designed primarily for urban or indoor scenes, fail to generalize reliably across these starkly different scenarios. To address this, we propose ProteusVPR, a two-stage retrieval-refinement framework. The first stage employs any standard VPR model for initial image retrieval. The second stage introduces a geometric-visual estimation network that fuses the retrieved image with two temporally preceding frames, incorporating geometric descriptors, a local affine coordinate system, and camera azimuth encoding to achieve precise localization. To support this task, we introduce the XHZ dataset, an 8K-panoramic ship-borne dataset collected from an operational vessel, featuring multi-floor cabin structures, deck transition zones, and strict query-database separation for rigorous evaluation. Extensive experiments on the XHZ dataset demonstrate that ProteusVPR consistently improves the localization accuracy across multiple VPR backbones, reducing mean localization error by over 60\% on average and that ProteusVPR offers an effective and robust solution for precise visual localization in challenging, cross-scene maritime environments.

AI.tldr: 针对海上船舶环境中视觉位置识别(VPR)的跨场景感知偏移问题,提出ProteusVPR两阶段检索-精化框架。该框架结合几何描述符、局部仿射坐标系和相机方位编码,将检索图像与时间先验帧融合,实现精确定位。实验表明该方法在XHZ数据集上平均降低定位误差超过60%。
AI.motivation: 海上船舶环境具有独特的视觉挑战:开放甲板区域纹理稀疏且光照变化剧烈,封闭舱室结构重复且视觉歧义高。现有VPR方法主要针对城市场景设计,无法在这些差异显著的场景间可靠泛化。
AI.method: 提出ProteusVPR两阶段框架:第一阶段使用标准VPR模型进行初始图像检索;第二阶段引入几何视觉估计网络,将检索图像与两个时间先验帧融合,并结合几何描述符、局部仿射坐标系和相机方位编码实现精确定位。同时构建XHZ数据集,包含8K全景船舶图像,涵盖多层舱室结构和甲板过渡区。
AI.result: 在XHZ数据集上的广泛实验表明,ProteusVPR在多种VPR backbone上一致提升定位精度,平均降低定位误差超过60%,为跨场景海上环境中的精确视觉定位提供了有效解决方案。
AI.conclusion: ProteusVPR通过两阶段检索-精化策略有效解决了船舶环境中跨场景视觉位置识别的难题,为海上无人系统精确导航提供了技术支撑。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses Visual Place Recognition (VPR) for maritime environments - a completely different application domain from 3D human motion generation. While both involve visual understanding, this paper focuses on robot localization in ship environments, not text-to-motion synthesis or human motion generation. The methods (geometric vision estimation for place recognition) and goals (visual positioning) are entirely unrelated to the research profile's pain points of extracting 3D motion from 2D video, cross-modal alignment between video and motion, or diffusion-based motion synthesis.

title: Quant Convergence: Bridging Classical Value Investing and Modern Factor Models for Systematic Equity Selection
summary: Modern finance relies heavily on complex machine learning models to find patterns in the stock market. However, as these AI models get more complicated, they often memorize short-term market noise instead of finding companies with real, lasting value. We designed this research to test if Benjamin Graham's classic value investing rules could act as a mathematical "low-pass filter" to keep these modern models in check.
