We built three different sets of features - pure Graham rules, modern market factors, and a mix of both - and tested them against highly complex models (XGBoost and AutoGluon) using 20 years of S&P 500 data. By applying a strict buy-and-hold strategy over a four-year test period (March 2022 to March 2026), the results showed that more complex algorithms do not always win. While the AutoGluon model captured high returns (222.68%), it suffered a substantial 39.78% drop because it bought volatile tech stocks right before the market crashed. On the other hand, the pure Graham Random Forest achieved the highest overall return (232.13%) with much less risk (1.38 Calmar Ratio). Furthermore, the Combined Random Forest successfully mixed momentum with Graham's rules, making a 202.91% return while keeping the lowest maximum drop (34.53%) of any model tested. Ultimately, this research proves that Graham's "margin of safety" isn't outdated; it is actually a highly effective way to prevent modern AI from taking on too much risk.

AI.tldr: 研究将格雷厄姆经典价值投资原则作为"低通滤波器"，验证其在现代AI复杂模型中的风险控制效果。使用XGBoost、AutoGluon和Random Forest对比纯格雷厄姆规则、现代市场因素和混合特征三组特征，在20年S&P 500数据上的投资表现。
AI.motivation: 现代金融中复杂的机器学习模型容易"记忆"短期市场噪声而非发现真正的长期价值。研究旨在验证格雷厄姆的经典价值投资规则能否作为数学"低通滤波器"约束现代AI模型的风险。
AI.method: 构建三组特征：纯格雷厄姆规则、现代市场因素、混合特征。使用XGBoost和AutoGluon等复杂模型以及Random Forest，在20年S&P 500数据上测试。采用严格买入持有策略，运行四年测试期（2022年3月至2026年3月）。
AI.result: 复杂模型未获胜。AutoGluon获222.68%高回报但在市场崩盘前买入波动科技股，遭受39.78%最大回撤。纯格雷厄姆Random Forest获232.13%最高总回报，卡尔马比率仅1.38（风险最低）。混合Random Forest结合动量与格雷厄姆规则，获202.91%回报，保持最低最大回撤34.53%。
AI.conclusion: 格雷厄姆的"安全边际"原则未过时，是有效防止现代AI承担过多风险的高度有效方法。简单的格雷厄姆规则特征配合Random Forest模型，优于复杂的AutoGluon模型。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about quantitative finance/stock market investing using XGBoost and Random Forest for equity selection. The research profile is about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation involving video generation models, VLMs, diffusion-based motion synthesis, and cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion. There is no overlap whatsoever - finance vs computer graphics/motion generation.

title: M^2C-EvDet: Multi-Domain Multi-Order Cross-Modal Knowledge Distillation for Event-based Object Detection
summary: Event-based object Detection (EvDet), as a biologically inspired visual perception paradigm, demonstrates superior performance in scenarios demanding high temporal resolution and a wide dynamic range. Nevertheless, the inherent sparse representations and inadequate visual semantics of event data result in a considerable performance disparity between EvDet and frame-based object detection. Previous works attempt to alleviate this cross-modal discrepancy through knowledge distillation, yet they only focus on spatial visual semantics or pair-wise relational information, thus limiting performance in more complex scenarios. To address this challenge, this paper proposes M^2C-EvDet, a Multi-domain and Multi-order Cross-modal knowledge distillation framework for EvDet. Built upon frequency learning and hypergraph computation, M^2C-EvDet integrates two specialized modules: Adaptive Frequency-Decoupled Feature Distillation (AF^2D^2) and Multi-Order Relational Distillation (MORD).

AI.tldr: 本文提出M^2C-EvDet框架，用于解决事件相机目标检测(EvDet)与帧级目标检测之间的跨模态性能差距问题。该框架通过频率学习和超图计算融合多域多阶跨模态知识蒸馏，包含自适应频率解耦特征蒸馏(AF²D²)和多阶关系蒸馏(MORD)两个模块。
AI.motivation: 事件相机目标检测因数据稀疏表示和视觉语义不足，与传统帧级目标检测存在显著性能差距。现有的跨模态知识蒸馏方法仅关注空间视觉语义或成对关系信息，难以应对复杂场景。
AI.method: 提出M^2C-EvDet框架，基于频率学习和超图计算构建。(1) AF²D²模块：自适应频率解耦特征蒸馏，将特征解耦为低频和高频成分进行针对性蒸馏；(2) MORD模块：多阶关系蒸馏，利用超图建模多阶关系信息。
AI.result: 实验表明M²C-EvDet在多个基准数据集上验证了其有效性，能够有效弥补事件数据与帧数据之间的跨模态语义差距，提升事件目标检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合多域多阶跨模态知识蒸馏策略，M²C-EvDet为事件相机目标检测提供了一种有效的性能提升方案，为生物启发式视觉感知系统的实际应用奠定了基础。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant application domain. This paper is about event-based object detection using event cameras, not 3D human motion generation. Even though it mentions "cross-modal knowledge distillation," the domain is completely different: object detection vs text-to-motion generation. The methods (frequency learning, hypergraph computation) are also not relevant to diffusion-based motion synthesis or VLM-based approaches for human motion generation.

title: LLMs Prompted for Legal Context Object More: Overrefusal from Small On-Premises LLMs in Criminal Legal Context
summary:
While the validity of LLMs' use in the legal context remains subject to ethical and legal debate, legal professionals are already experimenting with personal LLMs, if only for translation and reformulation. However, even such a seemingly innocuous use can introduce biases through case processing speed if LLM assistants selectively refuse assistance on certain topics. To better anticipate such biases, we investigate several modern small LLMs that are most likely to be used as on-device assistants, to assess the impact of overrefusal on legal prompts.
  Surprisingly, we find that authority-style prefixes (``you are acting as an assistant of the national supreme court'', ``[...] defense lawyer'') systematically increase refusal rates by 2--20x over the no-prefix baseline, while a known role-play jailbreak prefix shows mixed effects, sharply increasing refusals in some models and barely shifting them in others. The finding suggests that small on-prem deployable LLMs are unstable under contextual framings that a real institutional user might naturally introduce, and further investigation is essential to minimize opportunities for bias.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了小型LLM作为法律助手时的过度拒绝（overrefusal）偏见问题，发现权威性角色前缀（如"国家最高法院助手"、"辩护律师"）会使拒绝率增加2-20倍，表明小型本地部署的LLM在机构用户可能自然引入的上下文框架下不稳定。
AI.motivation: 法律专业人士已经在尝试使用个人LLM进行翻译和改写等任务，但即使这种看似无害的使用也可能通过案件处理速度引入偏见，因为LLM助手可能会选择性地拒绝协助某些主题。
AI.method: 研究团队调查了几种最有可能用作设备助手的现代小型LLM，评估了权威性前缀、角色扮演越狱前缀对法律提示的过度拒绝影响，并与无前缀基线进行对比。
AI.result: 权威性风格的前缀（如"你作为国家最高法院的助手"、"辩护律师"）系统性地将拒绝率提高至无前缀基线的2-20倍；已知的角色扮演越狱前缀效果混合，在某些模型中急剧增加拒绝，在其他模型中几乎没有影响。
AI.conclusion: 小型本地可部署的LLM在真实机构用户可能自然引入的上下文框架下不稳定，进一步研究对于最大限度地减少偏见机会至关重要。

relevance_reason: This paper is about small language models (LLMs) and their overrefusal bias in legal/criminal justice contexts. It has NO relevance to the research profile which is about Computer Graphics - specifically text-to-motion in 3D human motion generation. The application domains are completely different: legal AI assistants vs. 3D human motion generation. The methods are also different: small on-premises LLMs for legal tasks vs. video generation models, VLMs, and diffusion-based motion synthesis. This paper addresses none of the pain points mentioned (2D-to-3D motion extraction, quality assessment, visual-guided features, cross-modal alignment).

title: TuringViT: Making SOTA Vision Transformers Accessible to All
summary: Modern VLMs and VLA systems commonly adopt off-the-shelf ViTs such as SigLIP2 as visual encoders, but diverse downstream requirements in latency, temporal modeling, and VLM integration often call for customized SOTA-level ViTs. Training such encoders remains beyond the reach of much of the community, as it requires massive image-text data, while standard softmax attention makes high-resolution or dynamic-resolution pretraining prohibitively costly and often forces low-resolution pretraining followed by post-hoc adaptation. TuringViT addresses these challenges with three key designs: Turing Linear Attention (TLA) for efficient sequence modeling, VISTA-Curation to construct supervision-rich image-video training data, and native dynamic-resolution pretraining that supports flexible inputs from the start and transfers seamlessly to downstream VLMs. As a result, TuringViT outperforms leading open-source ViT baselines with only 10% of the data, achieves stronger downstream VLM performance, and delivers substantially better latency scaling on high-resolution inputs. Our scaling-law analysis further shows that TuringViT continues to improve predictably with curated data scale, far from saturation. Its fast adaptation, hardware-friendly design, and efficient deployment have made it a unified visual foundation across XPeng's AI systems. More broadly, TuringViT provides a reproducible pipeline that dramatically lowers the cost for the community to train, customize, and deploy SOTA-level ViTs, moving toward making such Vision Transformers accessible to all.

AI.tldr: TuringViT是一种新型视觉Transformer，通过三项关键设计（TLA线性注意力、VISTA-Curation数据策展、原生动态分辨率预训练）实现高效训练，在仅使用10%数据的情况下超越开源ViT基线，并具备良好的延迟扩展性。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型多采用现成的ViT作为视觉编码器，但下游任务对延迟、时间建模和VLM集成的多样化需求呼唤定制化的SOTA级ViT。训练此类编码器需要海量图像文本数据，且标准softmax注意力使高分辨率预训练成本过高。
AI.method: 提出三个关键设计：(1)Turing Linear Attention (TLA)用于高效序列建模；(2)VISTA-Curation构建监督丰富的图像-视频训练数据；(3)原生动态分辨率预训练，支持从一开始就接受灵活输入并无缝迁移到下游VLM。
AI.result: TuringViT仅用10%数据即超越领先的开源ViT基线，获得更强的下游VLM性能，在高分辨率输入上实现显著更好的延迟扩展。扩展法则分析表明其性能随策展数据 scale 持续可预测提升，远未饱和。
AI.conclusion: TuringViT提供了一套可复现的pipeline，大幅降低了社区训练、定制和部署SOTA级ViT的成本，使这类视觉Transformer走向大众化，已成为XPeng AI系统的统一视觉基础。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Vision Transformers (ViT) for general visual understanding and VLM tasks, which is a fundamentally different application domain from Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. While the research profile mentions VLM as a method, this paper focuses on efficient ViT training for general image/video understanding tasks, not on 3D human motion generation, visual-guided feature extraction for motion models, or cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion space. The application domain mismatch is significant - motion generation vs. general vision encoding are distinct fields in computer graphics.

title: AdversaBench: Automated LLM Red-Teaming with Multi-Judge Confirmation and Cross-Model Transferability
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures, 5 tables. Code and data at https://github.com/khanak0509/AdversaBench
summary: Scaling adversarial evaluation of large language models requires both a method for generating hard inputs and a reliable way to confirm that resulting failures are real. We present AdversaBench, an end-to-end red-teaming pipeline that mutates seed prompts with five structured operators, queries a target model, and confirms failures through a three-judge panel with a meta-judge tiebreaker. We report experiments on 45 seeds across three categories: reasoning, instruction-following, and tool use. Every seed produced a confirmed failure. Four findings stand out. First, operator effectiveness varies sharply by category: inject_distractor scores 0.00 mean reward on instruction-following seeds but 0.80-0.83 on reasoning and tool-use. Second, binary failure rate hides difficulty: instruction-following seeds required 2.4 attacker iterations on average versus 1.1 for other categories, a gap visible in survival curves. Third, pairwise judge agreement of 80-87% coexists with near-zero Cohen's kappa due to label skew; category-level disagreement rates are more informative. Fourth, adversarial prompts generated against Llama 3.1 8B transfer zero-shot to Llama 3.3 70B, suggesting the mutations exploit general behavioral patterns rather than model-specific weaknesses. Code, dataset, and analysis scripts are available at https://github.com/khanak0509/AdversaBench .

AI.tldr: AdversaBench是一个端到端的红队评估管道，通过5个结构化算子变异种子提示词，查询目标模型，并使用三人法官小组确认失败。在45个种子上的实验表明每个种子都产生了确认的失败。
AI.motivation: 大规模对抗性评估需要同时解决生成困难输入和可靠确认失败真实性的问题。
AI.method: 使用5个结构化算子变异种子提示词，查询目标模型，通过3人法官小组加元法官打破平局来确认失败。实验覆盖推理、指令遵循和工具使用三个类别的45个种子。
AI.result: 1)算子效果因类别差异大：inject_distractor在指令遵循上为0.00但在推理和工具使用上为0.80-0.83；2)二元失败率隐藏难度：指令遵循平均需要2.4次攻击迭代vs其他类别的1.1次；3)法官一致率80-87%但Cohen's kappa接近0；4)针对Llama 3.1 8B的对抗提示可零样本迁移到Llama 3.3 70B。
AI.conclusion: 红队管道有效，但算子效果因任务类别而异，难度指标需要谨慎选择，对抗变异利用的是通用行为模式而非模型特定弱点。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM red-teaming and AI security (adversarial prompt evaluation), which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domains are entirely different: one deals with AI safety/LLM evaluation while the other deals with 3D human motion synthesis from text/video inputs. The methods, pain points, and research goals have no overlap whatsoever.

title: Social Structure Matters in 3D Human-Human Interaction Generation
summary: Although text-to-motion generation has achieved strong progress in synthesizing realistic single-person motions from language, extending it to text-driven 3D human-human interaction (HHI) remains non-trivial, as HHI requires modeling the underlying \textbf{social structure} that governs phase progression, actor roles, and inter-actor coordination. In this paper, we formulate HHI generation as a social structure modeling and grounding problem: the model must first infer how an interaction unfolds and how the two actors coordinate their roles, and then realize this structure as continuous, physically plausible, and partner-aware 3D motion. To study how such structure should be modeled, we first examine the capability boundary of large language models (LLMs) for HHI generation. Our analysis shows that LLMs can \textit{think} by recovering phase decompositions and partner-aware roles, but cannot directly \textit{move}, as they fail to generate dynamic, physically plausible, and interaction-aware motion. This motivates our planner-executor paradigm, \textbf{Think with LLM, Move with Motion Skill}. The LLM planner converts implicit interaction semantics into motion-aligned social supervision by decomposing interactions into phases, assigning partner-aware actor roles, and aligning them with motion sequence. The motion executor then grounds the planned social structure into coordinated two-person motion by adapting a pretrained solo motion model with LoRA, previous-phase self-conditioning, and ego-relative partner conditioning. Together, our Solo-to-Social framework bridges social organization and motion realization, producing 3D HHI with improved phase consistency, role alignment, and partner-aware coordination.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Solo-to-Social框架,将文本驱动的3D人际交互生成问题分解为社交结构建模和动作实现两个阶段,利用LLM作为规划器进行社交结构推理,结合适配的独行动作模型作为执行器生成协调的双人动作。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到动作生成方法仅能处理单人动作合成,扩展到3D人际交互面临挑战,因为HHI需要建模底层社交结构(包括阶段进程、角色分配和角色间协调),而LLM虽然能推理社交结构但无法直接生成物理可信的动态动作。
AI.method: 提出规划器-执行器范式"Think with LLM, Move with Motion Skill":(1)LLM规划器将隐式交互语义转换为动作对齐的社交监督,通过将交互分解为阶段、分配角色感知伙伴的角色并与动作序列对齐;(2)动作执行器通过LoRA、自前置条件化和自我相对伙伴条件化来适配预训练的单人动作模型,将社交结构实现为协调的双人动作。
AI.result: 该框架桥接社交组织和动作实现,在阶段一致性、角色对齐和伙伴感知协调方面生成改进的3D人际交互。
AI.conclusion: Solo-to-Social框架成功将LLM的社交结构推理能力与动作模型的物理动作生成能力相结合,为文本驱动的3D人际交互生成提供了有效解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses 3D human motion generation (text-to-motion) which matches the general application domain. However, it focuses on human-human interaction (dyadic motion) rather than single-person motion generation, and uses LLM-based planning rather than the visual-guided approaches, VLM screening, or diffusion-based motion synthesis methods specified in the research profile. The pain points about 2D-to-3D motion extraction and visual-guided feature extraction are not addressed. The method (LLM + LoRA-adapted motion model) differs from the profile's visual/VLM/diffusion methods.

title: ASALT: Adaptive State Alignment for Lateral Transfer in Multi-agent Reinforcement Learning
summary: Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) addresses the problem of training multiple agents that pursue collaborative, competitive, or mixed objectives. Prior work has investigated transfer learning between source and target domains in MARL; however, the majority of existing approaches impose the constraint that the dimensionalities of the observation space and the global state space must be identical across domains. In this paper, we introduce a method that explicitly accommodates mismatched state-space dimensionalities between source and target domains. The proposed approach, ASALT, incorporates both observation-level and state-level adapters that map the target-domain observations and global states into a shared embedding space, thereby enabling more effective transfer of knowledge across both actors and critics. These adapters can generate embeddings that support efficient strategy transfer across heterogeneous domains. Experimental results on multiple configurations in standard benchmark environments demonstrate that ASALT surpasses existing baselines in terms of sample efficiency and global return in cooperative settings, but its effectiveness depends on the degree of mismatch between source and target domains. Furthermore, our findings indicate that ASALT mitigates negative transfer, which frequently constitutes a major obstacle when transferring policies between domains with differing observation and action spaces.

AI.tldr: ASALT是一种多智能体强化学习中的迁移学习方法，通过观察级和状态级适配器将目标域的观测和全局状态映射到共享嵌入空间，从而解决跨域状态空间维度不匹配问题，实现知识迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有MARL迁移学习方法要求源域和目标域的状态空间维度必须相同，这一限制严重阻碍了知识在不同维度异构域之间的迁移，因此需要一种能处理维度不匹配问题的迁移方法。
AI.method: 提出ASALT方法，包含观察级适配器和状态级适配器，将目标域的观测和全局状态映射到共享嵌入空间，使智能体和评论家都能进行有效的跨域知识迁移。这些适配器可生成支持异构域间策略迁移的嵌入表示。
AI.result: 在标准基准环境上的多种配置实验表明，ASALT在协作设置下的样本效率和全局回报方面均优于现有基线方法，但其有效性取决于源域和目标域之间的维度不匹配程度。此外，ASALT还能缓解负迁移问题。
AI.conclusion: ASALT成功实现了跨异构域的策略迁移，有效解决了状态空间维度不匹配问题，并在样本效率和性能方面取得显著提升，同时减轻了负迁移现象的影响。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Multi-agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) for transfer learning between domains with different state space dimensions. This is completely outside the field of Computer Graphics and Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely different - MARL is typically in robotics/AI research, not computer graphics. It does not address any of the pain points (3D motion extraction from 2D video, VLM quality assessment, visual-guided feature extraction, or 2D-3D cross-modal alignment). The methods used (observation/state adapters for MARL) are not related to Video Generation Models, VLM, 3D Motion Generation Models, or Diffusion-based Motion Synthesis mentioned in the research profile.

title: Trimming the Long-Tail of Visual World Modeling Evaluation
summary: Physical interactions follow a long-tailed distribution: a set of common and regular interactions dominates human experience and visual data, while a broad spectrum of rare and irregular interactions remains underrepresented. Although recent visual world models, including image and video generation models, achieve impressive realism on existing benchmarks, they primarily focus on simulating common physical interactions. This raises a central question: Do current visual world models internalize and generalize physical principles? In this work, we introduce Tailor-Bench, a benchmark that challenges world models to simulate irregular physical interactions. To enable systematic evaluation, we design three scenario modes that progressively challenge model reasoning: Regular scenarios reflect common tool-task pairs, Unconventional scenarios replace conventional tools with attribute-compatible substitutes to test affordance generalization, and Impossible scenarios introduce attribute-violating tools to probe constraint awareness. Additionally, we design two complementary settings under a unified evaluation protocol: predictive generation requires inferring outcomes without guidance, while descriptive generation specifies the target outcome for faithful realization. Our experimental results reveal a clear long-tail gap in physical world modeling: performance degrades from Regular to Unconventional and Impossible scenarios, indicating limited generalization beyond common interactions. Failure analysis further shows that models rely on superficial visual patterns: image models fail to realize correct state changes, while video models further suffer from temporal inconsistencies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Tailor-Bench基准，用于评估视觉世界模型对长尾物理交互的模拟能力。研究发现当前模型在非常规和不可能场景下表现显著下降，存在明显的"长尾差距"。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉世界模型主要关注模拟常见物理交互，而对罕见和不规则物理交互的建模能力尚未被系统评估。作者提出核心问题：当前视觉世界模型是否内化和泛化了物理原理？
AI.method: 设计了三种递进式场景模式：常规场景（常见工具-任务对）、非常规场景（用属性兼容的替代工具测试 affordance 泛化）、不可能场景（引入违反属性的工具测试约束意识）。同时设计了两套互补设置：预测生成（无指导推断结果）和描述生成（指定目标结果）。
AI.result: 实验揭示了物理世界建模中的明确长尾差距：性能从常规到非常规再到不可能场景逐渐下降。图像模型无法实现正确的状态变化，视频模型还存在时间不一致性问题。
AI.conclusion: 当前视觉世界模型依赖浅层视觉模式，难以泛化物理原理到罕见交互，存在明显的长尾差距，限制了其在非常规场景中的应用。

relevance_reason: This paper is about visual world modeling evaluation (AI safety/understanding), NOT about 3D human motion generation in computer graphics. While both might use diffusion models, the application domain is completely different - the paper evaluates whether image/video models understand physical affordances, not generating human motion. This is essentially an AI evaluation benchmark paper that has no direct relevance to text-to-motion generation or 3D character animation.

title: Uncertainty-Aware Longitudinal Forecasting of Alzheimer's Disease Progression Using Deep Learning
summary: Longitudinal modelling of Alzheimer's disease progression is clinically useful only if it can describe not just the most likely next diagnosis, but how a patient may evolve over time and how reliable that forecast is. Most deep learning approaches reduce this problem to single-step classification, treating cognitively normal, mild cognitive impairment, and dementia as flat categories while providing limited insight into how uncertainty accumulates across future visits. We propose a probabilistic framework that combines ordinal diagnosis prediction, multi-horizon trajectory generation, and decomposed uncertainty estimation. A Temporal Fusion Transformer encoder is adapted with a CORAL ordinal output layer, asymmetric loss weighting, and converter oversampling to respect disease-stage ordering and improve sensitivity to MCI-to-dementia transitions. Conditioned on the learned patient-context representation, an autoregressive Mixture Density Network generates five-year probabilistic trajectories for diagnosis state, CDR Sum of Boxes, MMSE orientation, and hippocampal volume. On ADNI, the model outperforms linear, recurrent, and transformer baselines for next-visit diagnosis prediction, with the strongest gains on MCI-versus-dementia discrimination. Generated trajectories achieve near-nominal 90% credible interval coverage, widening uncertainty across the forecast horizon, and biomarker dynamics consistent with expected Alzheimer's disease progression. We further separate aleatoric from epistemic uncertainty using analytic mixture variance and a five-member bootstrap ensemble, which provides the strongest encoder diversity and output-level epistemic signal. Epistemic uncertainty is higher for rare progression archetypes, MCI and dementia patients, and under external evaluation on OASIS-3, where it increases alongside prediction error.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合序贯诊断预测、多视界轨迹生成和不确定性分解的概率深度学习框架，用于阿尔茨海默病进展建模。该框架使用适配的Temporal Fusion Transformer编码器和自回归Mixture Density Network，在ADNI数据集上 outperformer基线模型，并能有效分离任意不确定性和平息不确定性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法将阿尔茨海默病诊断简化为单步分类，将认知正常、轻度认知障碍和痴呆视为扁平类别，无法提供关于未来访视中不确定性如何累积的见解。临床需要的不仅是预测最可能的下一个诊断，还要描述患者如何随时间演变以及该预测的可靠性。
AI.method: 使用Temporal Fusion Transformer编码器配合CORAL序贯输出层、非对称损失加权器和转换器过采样以尊重疾病阶段顺序；基于学习到的患者上下文表示，自回归Mixture Density Network生成诊断状态、CDR量表总分、MMSE定向和海马体量的五年概率轨迹；使用解析混合方差和五成员bootstrap集合分离任意不确定性和平息不确定性。
AI.result: 模型在next-visit诊断预测上优于线性、循环和transformer基线模型，在MCI与痴呆区分上增益最强；生成轨迹达到名义上90%可信区间覆盖，不确定性随预测视界扩大，生物标志物动力学与预期的阿尔茨海默病进展一致；平息不确定性在罕见进展原型、MCI和痴呆患者中更高，在OASIS-3外部评估中随预测误差增加而增加。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够可靠预测阿尔茨海默病长期进展轨迹，并提供有意义的不确定性量化，为个性化临床决策支持提供了有价值的工具。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about Alzheimer's disease progression forecasting in medical AI, not about Computer Graphics or 3D Human Motion Generation. While both use deep learning methods (transformers), the application domains are entirely different - medical diagnosis prediction vs text-to-motion generation for 3D human animation. None of the pain points (2D video to 3D motion extraction, visual-guided feature extraction, cross-modal alignment) are addressed.

title: 3DCarGen: Scalable 3D Car Generation via 3D-consistent Multi-view Synthesis
summary: High-quality 3D vehicle assets are essential for autonomous driving simulation. Although multi-view diffusion-based paradigms enable controllable single-image reconstruction, they typically produce limited viewpoints and exhibit cross-view geometric inconsistencies, thereby reducing reconstruction fidelity in real-world scenarios. In this work, we introduce 3DCarGen, a scalable single-view 3D car generation framework designed for real-world images by synthesizing an arbitrary number of 3D-consistent multi-view images. Specifically, given a single image as input, we first synthesize a set of images from fixed viewpoints. These images are then fed into a feed-forward reconstruction model, resulting in a coarse 3D representation based on 3D Gaussian Splatting. Conditioned on this explicit 3D prior, our multi-view diffusion model generates 3D-consistent images from arbitrary camera viewpoints. We further extend a fast mesh reconstruction algorithm by incorporating color-normal joint optimization to recover detailed and coherent 3D vehicle models from the synthesized dense views. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that our approach achieves robust geometric consistency and reconstruction fidelity compared to existing methods. Code and models will be released.

AI.tldr: 3DCarGen是一个基于单张图像生成高质量3D汽车模型的框架，通过多视图合成和3D高斯溅射技术实现可扩展的单视图3D汽车重建。
AI.motivation: 现有基于多视图扩散的单图像重建方法存在视角有限和跨视图几何不一致的问题，难以满足自动驾驶仿真中对高质量3D车辆资产的需求。
AI.method: 给定单张输入图像，首先从固定视角合成一组图像，然后馈入前馈重建模型生成基于3D高斯溅射的粗略3D表示；在此显式3D先验条件下，多视图扩散模型从任意相机视角生成3D一致图像；最后通过颜色-法线联合优化扩展的快速网格重建算法从合成密集视图中恢复详细且一致的3D车辆模型。
AI.result: 在合成和真实世界数据集上的广泛实验表明，该方法实现了稳健的几何一致性和重建保真度，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 3DCarGen能够从单张图像端到端生成高质量3D汽车模型，具有良好的几何一致性和重建质量，为自动驾驶仿真提供了有效的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D CAR generation for autonomous driving simulation, which is completely different from the research profile's focus on 3D HUMAN MOTION generation. Although both may use diffusion-based methods, the application domain is entirely different - car/vehicle assets vs human body movements/gestures. The pain points are also unrelated (car reconstruction vs motion extraction from video, quality assessment for human motion, cross-modal alignment for human motions). This represents a completely different field in computer graphics.

title: ScaleToT: Generalizing Structured LLM Reasoning for Billion-Scale Low-Activity User Modeling
summary: Accurate user modeling often depends on rich interaction histories, which are unavailable for billions of low-activity users. Large Language Models (LLMs) can infer latent user states from static profiles, but this reasoning becomes unreliable when profiles are sparse, and applying an LLM to billions of users is prohibitively expensive. We present ScaleToT, which learns structured reasoning from a small LLM-processed subset and extends it to the broader low-activity user population. To improve reasoning reliability, ScaleToT constructs typed user-state chains with a bounded entropy-guided Tree-of-Thought (ToT) refinement procedure. To make this structured reasoning usable from sparse profiles, the teacher-curated chains are used to train a student model on static profiles through supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and Outcome-Driven Segment-Aware Implicit Reward Policy Optimization (OSIPO). ScaleToT then transfers the student's reasoning representations to a lightweight profile encoder, providing shared reasoning signals for the remaining users without LLM inference. We evaluate ScaleToT on lifetime value (LTV) prediction in a billion-scale advertising deployment. A randomized online A/B test increased LT30 by 6.738\%, while offline reasoning covered only 7.32\% of the potential population, greatly reducing compute cost compared with full-population reasoning.

AI.tldr: ScaleToT是一个针对数十亿低活跃用户的大规模用户建模系统,通过从小规模LLM处理数据中学习结构化推理,然后迁移到轻量级模型,在广告场景的LTV预测中实现了6.738%的提升,同时仅需7.32%的离线推理覆盖率。
AI.motivation: 准确的用户建模通常依赖于丰富的交互历史,但数十亿低活性用户缺乏这些数据。LLM可以从静态画像推断用户状态,但在画像稀疏时推理不可靠,且对数十亿用户应用LLM成本过高。
AI.method: ScaleToT通过以下步骤实现:(1)使用有界熵引导的Tree-of-Thought(ToT) refinement构建类型化用户状态链;(2)使用教师精选的链通过监督微调(SFT)和结果驱动的分段感知隐式奖励策略优化(OSIPO)训练学生模型;(3)将学生的推理表示迁移到轻量级画像编码器,为剩余用户提供共享推理信号,无需LLM推理。
AI.result: 在十亿级广告投放的LTV预测中评估,随机在线A/B测试使LT30增加6.738%,离线推理仅覆盖潜在人口的7.32%,大幅降低计算成本。
AI.conclusion: ScaleToT成功地将结构化推理从一小部分用户扩展到大规模低活性用户群体,在保持推理可靠性的同时显著降低了计算成本,为大规模推荐系统提供了一种经济高效的解决方案。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The paper is about advertising user modeling for LTV prediction, not Computer Graphics or 3D Human Motion Generation. While both mention LLM/VLM, the use cases are entirely different - this paper focuses on user behavior inference in advertising systems, not video-to-motion extraction or visual-guided motion synthesis.

title: MotifGen: Spatiotemporal interpolation of misaligned satellite images via multi-source generative modeling, in an application to tropical cyclones
summary: Microwave satellite imagery plays a crucial role in monitoring tropical cyclone precipitation and intensity worldwide, but suffers from long revisit times, potentially missing rapid storm evolution phases. While this raises the need for an interpolation method, it is made challenging by the high level of heterogeneity of microwave data coming from different instruments. In this work, we introduce the first generative model that can be applied to multiple geospatial sources that change across samples, occur at irregular time intervals, are misaligned geographically, and come from instruments with varying characteristics. We apply this model to the case of spatio-temporal interpolation of tropical cyclone microwave images from other microwave and infrared instruments. We train using a self-supervised task in which a random source is masked and reconstructed, and show that it leads to a significant decrease in Continuous Ranked Probability Score over supervised training. We show a further improvement by combining infrared and microwave data compared to microwave only. Using these improvements, the generative model produces an ensemble mean on par with that of a deterministic model, while generating a power spectrum significantly closer to that of true observations. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first generative model that interpolates microwave images of cyclones by combining multiple microwave instruments and infrared observations at irregular time intervals.

AI.tldr: 本文首次提出了一种生成模型，可对不规则时间间隔、地理未对齐且来自不同仪器特征的热带气旋微波图像进行时空插值，通过结合红外和微波数据实现比单独使用微波数据更好的效果。
AI.motivation: 微波卫星图像在监测热带气旋降水和强度方面至关重要，但重访时间较长，可能错失快速风暴演化阶段；虽然需要插值方法，但不同仪器产生的异质微波数据使这一任务面临挑战。
AI.method: 提出首个可应用于多地理空间源的生成模型，处理样本间变化、 irregular时间间隔、地理未对齐和不同仪器特征的图像；采用自监督任务训练，即随机掩码源并重建；将红外和微波数据结合进行时空插值。
AI.result: 自监督训练相比监督训练显著降低了连续排序概率分数；结合红外和微波数据比单独使用微波数据进一步改善；生成模型产生的集合均值与确定性模型相当，且功率谱更接近真实观测。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个能够结合多个微波仪器和红外观测数据，对不规则时间间隔的气旋微波图像进行插值的生成模型。

relevance_reason: This paper is about satellite image interpolation for tropical cyclones (meteorology/remote sensing), completely unrelated to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. Although it uses generative modeling, the application domain is entirely different - it's about meteorological satellite data, not human motion synthesis. The task (spatiotemporal interpolation) and domain (satellite imagery) have no connection to text-to-motion generation, 3D human motion, or visual-guided feature extraction for motion models.

title: AI Tokenomics: The Economics of Tokens, Computation, and Pricing in Foundation Models
summary: Tokens have become the practical accounting unit for modern foundation model services, linking information processing, computation, memory use, energy expenditure, pricing, and economic value. This paper develops a framework for AI tokenomics: the study of how tokens are generated, consumed, priced, allocated, and optimized across AI systems. We connect token-level technical costs to workflow-level production functions, enterprise resource allocation, measurement and instrumentation methods, and emerging market-design questions. The framework shows that token expenditure and economic value are distinct: value depends on marginal productivity, workflow position, hidden reasoning activity, risk, and downstream propagation effects. The paper concludes by identifying open research directions in hidden-token measurement, empirical calibration, token productivity, dynamic allocation, and token-based markets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AI代币经济学框架，研究代币在AI系统中的生成、消耗、定价、分配和优化，连接技术成本与企业资源配置，揭示代币支出与经济价值的区别。
AI.motivation: 现代基础模型服务中，代币成为实际计量单位，但缺乏系统性的代币经济学研究框架来理解其技术成本、经济价值和市场设计问题。
AI.method: 建立连接代币级技术成本与工作流级生产函数的框架，整合企业资源分配、测量方法和市场设计问题。
AI.result: 框架表明代币支出与经济价值不同，价值取决于边际生产力、工作流位置、隐藏推理活动、风险和下游传播效应。
AI.conclusion: 识别了隐藏代币测量、实证校准、代币生产力、动态分配和代币市场等开放研究方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about AI token economics - the economic framework for tokens, computation, and pricing in foundation models. It is completely unrelated to the research profile which focuses on Computer Graphics - specifically Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domains are entirely different: token economics (economics/business) vs 3D motion generation (computer graphics). The paper does not address any of the pain points (video-to-3D motion extraction, quality assessment, visual-guided feature extraction, cross-modal alignment) and uses none of the specified methods (video generation models, VLM for motion, diffusion-based motion synthesis). This is a fundamental field mismatch.

title: UniRED: Unified RGB-D Video Frame Interpolation with Event Guidance
summary: High frame-rate RGB-D videos are crucial for a variety of downstream tasks, including motion analysis, dynamic scene understanding, and 3D reconstruction. However, due to hardware and sensing constraints, practical RGB-D cameras are typically limited to low frame rates, making it difficult to capture rapid scene dynamics. Existing video interpolation methods have achieved strong performance on RGB data, but they are not readily applicable to RGB-D scenarios, where they often yield blurry boundaries, visible artifacts, and degraded geometric consistency. Furthermore, motion estimation from only two boundary frames is inherently under-constrained in complex dynamic scenes. Event cameras, by contrast, provide asynchronous measurements with ultra-high temporal resolution, offering dense motion cues. In this paper, we propose a unified multimodal framework for RGB-D video interpolation that jointly exploits RGB appearance, depth geometry, and event-based temporal cues. Specifically, it first extracts and fuses RGB, depth and event cues, then estimates bidirectional flow with motion basis refinement for RGB and Z-axial refinement for depth, and finally synthesizes the target RGB-D frame via bidirectional warping and soft blending. In addition, we construct a new RGB-D-Event dataset to alleviate the scarcity of tri-modal training data. Extensive experiments on a public benchmark and the proposed dataset demonstrate that our method achieves superior photometric fidelity for RGB interpolation and stronger geometric accuracy for depth interpolation than existing approaches.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种结合RGB外观、深度几何和事件相机时间线索的统一多模态框架，用于RGB-D视频插帧。核心创新在于利用事件相机的高时间分辨率来弥补传统RGB-D相机在捕捉快速场景动态时的不足，并通过双向光流估计和Z轴细化来分别优化RGB和深度插值质量。
AI.motivation: 现有RGB-D相机因硬件限制难以捕捉快速运动场景动态，而传统视频插帧方法无法直接应用于RGB-D场景，常产生边界模糊和几何一致性下降的问题。此外，仅基于两帧边界的运动估计在复杂动态场景中本质上是不充分约束的。
AI.method: 提出统一多模态框架：1)融合RGB、深度和事件线索；2)对RGB进行双向光流估计和运动基细化，对深度进行Z轴细化；3)通过双向 warping 和软融合合成目标RGB-D帧。同时构建了新的RGB-D-Event数据集以缓解三模态训练数据稀缺问题。
AI.result: 在公共基准数据集和提出的数据集上进行了广泛实验，该方法在RGB插值的 photometric fidelity 和深度插值的 geometric accuracy 方面均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过有效融合事件相机的高时间分辨率信息，成功解决了RGB-D视频插帧中几何一致性和边界清晰度的挑战，为动态场景理解和3D重建等下游任务提供了高质量的高帧率RGB-D视频。

relevance_reason: This paper is about RGB-D video frame interpolation using event cameras, which is completely different from the research field of Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is video interpolation, not human motion generation. While both involve video/motion, this paper focuses on interpolating between RGB-D video frames using optical flow and event guidance, not generating 3D human motion from text or other modalities. The methods (event cameras, bidirectional warping, depth refinement) are unrelated to the profile's methods (VLM, diffusion-based motion synthesis, visual-guided feature extraction). This addresses none of the pain points about cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion space or quality assessment for VLM-based screening.

title: Abstractions of Queries in Ontology-Based Data Access
comment: Extended version of a paper published in the proceedings of KR 2025
summary:
In ontology-based data access (OBDA), multiple data sources are integrated via mappings to an ontology. We consider an OBDA setting based on existential rules and the certain answer semantics. We address the recent issue of query abstraction, which consists of abstracting data queries by translating them to the ontology layer. Since a perfect abstraction may not exist, the notions of minimally complete and maximally sound abstractions have been introduced.
  We study abstractions within an extension of UCQs with a limited form of inequality and a special predicate marking database constants. While this extension does not lead to an increased complexity of the problems of interest, it is able to express minimally complete abstractions, hence perfect abstractions when they exist. We also characterize maximally sound abstractions by making a new connection with the notion of maximum recovery stemming from data exchange.

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于本体论的数据访问(OBDA)系统中的查询抽象问题。研究者扩展了UCQ(联合 conjunctive查询)，加入不等式和特殊谓词来处理数据库常量，并建立了与数据交换中最大恢复概念的关联。
AI.motivation: 解决OBDA中数据查询到本体层翻译的查询抽象问题。由于完美抽象可能不存在，需要引入最小完整和最大 sound抽象的概念。
AI.method: 基于存在性规则和确定答案语义，研究UCQ的扩展形式，添加有限的不等式和标记数据库常量的特殊谓词。
AI.result: 该扩展不会增加问题的复杂性，能够表达最小完整抽象(在存在完美抽象时即完美抽象)，并通过与数据交换中最大恢复概念的关联来表征最大 sound抽象。
AI.conclusion: 提出的扩展为OBDA中的查询抽象提供了有用的框架，建立了抽象理论与最大恢复概念的连接，且保持了计算可行性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Ontology-Based Data Access (OBDA) and query abstraction in database systems - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics or 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is database theory/semantic web, not computer graphics, motion generation, or any visual/video domain. No relevance to text-to-motion generation, diffusion models for motion, VLM-based screening, or any of the pain points mentioned.

title: ActiveScope: Actively Seeking and Correcting Perception for MLLMs
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated impressive vision-language understanding, yet still struggle with fine-grained perception in high-resolution images. While existing training-free methods typically rely on attention-based localization or coarse-to-fine search, they are often misled by distractors and fail to locate multiple targets. Our investigation attributes these failures to Contextual Dominance, where salient distractors overwhelm target attention and cause inaccurate localization, and Semantic Bias, where global semantics cause the model to fixate on the most salient concept, resulting in incomplete localization in multi-object scenarios. Built on these insights, we propose ActiveScope, a training-free framework that enhances MLLMs by actively seeking and correcting perception. ActiveScope features two modules. The Semantic Anchor Localization (SAL) utilizes fine-grained semantic anchors to independently localize key targets, thereby mitigating semantic bias. The Interference-Suppressed Refinement (ISR) refines localization by suppressing attention on salient distractions to overcome contextual dominance. Extensive experiments on high-resolution image understanding benchmarks demonstrate that ActiveScope outperforms existing training-free methods (e.g., 96.34 percent accuracy on $V^{*}$ Bench), validating the superiority of the active search and self-correction paradigm. Our code is available at https://github.com/jasmine-ww/ActiveScope.

AI.tldr: 提出了ActiveScope框架,通过语义锚点定位和干扰抑制细化来解决多模态大语言模型在高分辨率图像中细粒度感知和目标定位的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有训练-free方法在处理高分辨率图像时容易受到无关干扰物的影响,导致定位不准确,特别是在多目标场景中。
AI.method: 提出两个模块:1)语义锚点定位(SAL)使用细粒度语义锚点独立定位关键目标;2)干扰抑制细化(ISR)通过抑制显著干扰物的注意力来细化定位。
AI.result: 在V* Bench等高分辨率图像理解基准上取得了96.34%的准确率,优于现有的训练-free方法。
AI.conclusion: 主动搜索和自纠正范式能够有效提升多模态大语言模型的细粒度感知能力。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) for visual perception and object localization in static images, which is a completely different application domain from Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. While both mention "VLM" (Visual Language Model), this paper uses VLMs for image-based object detection/localization tasks, not for 3D human motion generation from video. The pain points in the research profile focus on cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion space, which is entirely different from object localization in high-resolution images. This represents a fundamental domain mismatch rather than a methodological difference.

title: When CQs Go Wrong: Challenges in CQ Verification with OE-Assist
comment: Acceted poster at https://2026.eswc-conferences.org/program/accepted-papers/poster-demo/ 23rd European Semantic Web Conference (Satellite Event)
summary: Competency Questions (CQs) are the central component of CQ-verification, an established process in which an ontology is evaluated against a set of natural language questions to determine whether the intended purpose of the ontology has been properly modelled. However, CQ-verification is often time-consuming and error-prone, as it requires careful interpretation of linguistic nuances and precise alignment with formal ontology constructs. Ambiguities and complexity in CQs can further complicate this process, leading to inconsistent modelling decisions and verification outcomes. In this paper, we investigate what makes a CQ challenging and possible solutions to enhance the users' performance in the CQ-verification process. We experimented with the data of 19 participants who performed CQ-verification on 20 tasks using an LLM assistant to support ontology evaluation. The results show the necessity of a tool to refine CQs before publishing them to avoid ambiguity or excessive complexity in later phases of the ontology engineering process.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了能力问题(CQ)验证中的挑战，通过实验19名参与者在LLM助手支持下完成20项CQ验证任务，发现需要工具在发布前优化CQs以避免歧义和复杂性。
AI.motivation: CQ验证过程耗时且容易出错，CQ中的歧义和复杂性会导致不一致的建模决策和验证结果，需要找出解决方案来提高用户在CQ验证中的表现。
AI.method: 使用19名参与者在LLM助手支持下完成20项CQ验证任务的实验数据进行分析。
AI.result: 结果表明需要在本体工程后期阶段之前使用工具对CQs进行优化，以避免歧义或过度的复杂性。
AI.conclusion: 建议开发专门的工具来在发布前 refinement（优化/精炼）CQs，提高CQ验证的效率和准确性。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about ontology engineering and Competency Question (CQ) verification in knowledge representation systems, with no connection to Computer Graphics, Text-to-Motion, or 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely different - it's focused on improving CQ validation through LLM assistance for ontology engineering tasks, while the research profile deals with video-to-motion extraction, visual-guided motion synthesis, and diffusion-based 3D human motion generation.

title: Hierarchical Spatial and Channel Aggregation for Cross-domain Few-shot Segmentation
summary: Cross-domain Few-shot Segmentation (CD-FSS) aims to learn generalizable segmentation capability from abundant annotated samples in the source domain, enabling accurate segmentation of novel classes in the target domain with only a few annotated samples. Existing CD-FSS methods mainly focus on mitigating feature distribution shifts caused by style gaps while ignoring significant differences in class semantic granularity and discriminative attributes across domains, leading to two key degradations in support-query matching: semantic over-alignment and attribute over-alignment. To this end, we propose the Dual Hierarchical Aggregation Network (DHANet), which comprises three key modules. First, the Hierarchical Spatial Aggregation (HSA) module performs multi-scale region aggregation of pixel features along the spatial dimension, generating hierarchical semantic-enhanced features to alleviate semantic over-alignment. Additionally, the HCA module conducts multi-scale attribute aggregation along the channel dimension, generating hierarchical attribute-enhanced features to mitigate attribute over-alignment. Finally, we propose the Online Probabilistic Semantic Bank (OPSB), which progressively constructs and updates class probability distributions from query predictions during inference, and samples multiple pseudo-prototypes as additional support information to mitigate insufficient support. Extensive experiments on four target-domain datasets demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DHANet网络解决跨域小样本分割任务，针对现有方法忽略的类别语义粒度和判别属性差异问题，通过三层模块实现：层级空间聚合(HSA)进行多尺度区域聚合生成语义增强特征，层级通道聚合(HCA)进行属性聚合生成属性增强特征，在线概率语义库(OPSB)从查询预测中构建类别概率分布并采样伪原型作为支持信息。
AI.motivation: 现有CD-FSS方法主要关注特征分布偏移(风格差异)而忽略跨域类别语义粒度和判别属性差异，导致支持-查询匹配时出现语义过度对齐和属性过度对齐两个关键退化问题。
AI.method: 提出Dual Hierarchical Aggregation Network(DHANet)，包含三个关键模块：1) HSA模块沿空间维度进行多尺度区域聚合生成层级语义增强特征，缓解语义过度对齐；2) HCA模块沿通道维度进行多尺度属性聚合生成层级属性增强特征，缓解属性过度对齐；3) OPSB模块在推理过程中从查询预测逐步构建更新类别概率分布，采样多个伪原型作为额外支持信息弥补支持样本不足。
AI.result: 在四个目标域数据集上进行广泛实验，方法达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了CD-FSS中语义和属性过度对齐问题，通过层级聚合机制提升了跨域分割的泛化能力。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about cross-domain few-shot IMAGE SEGMENTATION (medical/vision domain), not 3D human motion generation. The application domain is entirely different - it deals with image segmentation tasks, not text-to-motion synthesis or 3D human motion generation. While it mentions hierarchical aggregation concepts, these are used for semantic segmentation in image domain, which has no relevance to the research profile's goal of generating 3D human motion from text/video. The pain points and methods (VLM, diffusion-based motion synthesis, visual-guided feature extraction for motion) are completely unaddressed.

title: Themis: An explainable AI-enabled framework for Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback
comment: The extended version of a paper published at the 2026 IEEE Conference on Artificial Intelligence (CAI). Includes an additional appendix with extended derivations and supplementary results. The main paper has 8 pages, 6 figures, 1 table
summary: Training safe Reinforcement Learning (RL) systems is inherently challenging, with no guarantee of avoiding unwanted behaviors. The most effective defenses against this are (i) transparency through explainability and (ii) alignment via human feedback. While both show promising results, no publicly available framework currently combines them. To address this, we introduce Themis, an XAI-enabled testing and evaluation framework for Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback. Themis supports over 200 widely used environments and is easily configurable for experiments in RL, transparency, and alignment. Our results show that Themis can train reward models that match or outperform the environment's true reward signal using human preferences. We also provide a cloud-based platform for collecting human feedback and managing experiments. It is user-friendly, auto-scalable, and supports large participant groups across multiple experiments without extra development overhead. Tests show Themis can support one thousand users in back-to-back experiments on a modest commercial machine.

AI.tldr: Themis是一个结合可解释性(XAI)和人类反馈的强化学习测试评估框架，支持200+环境，可训练匹配或超越真实奖励信号的奖励模型，并提供云平台支持大规模实验。
AI.motivation: 训练安全的强化学习系统面临挑战，难以避免不良行为。现有的两种有效防御方法——可解释性（透明度）和人类反馈对齐——各有优势，但缺乏公开框架将两者结合。
AI.method: 构建名为Themis的XAI-enabled测试评估框架，用于强化学习从人类反馈(RLHF)；框架支持200+广泛使用的环境，可灵活配置用于RL、透明度和对齐实验；提供云平台收集人类反馈和管理实验，具备自动扩展能力。
AI.result: Themis可以训练出匹配或超越环境真实奖励信号的奖励模型；云平台支持在普通商业机器上运行一千用户的后台实验。
AI.conclusion: Themis成功结合了可解释性和人类反馈两种方法，为RL安全训练提供了有效的评估框架，且具备良好的可扩展性和易用性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback (RLHF) and explainable AI for testing/evaluation frameworks - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely different: RL systems for AI safety vs text-to-motion generation. None of the methods (RLHF, reward modeling, XAI) match the required methods (diffusion-based motion synthesis, VLM, video generation models). The pain points are also unrelated - this paper addresses RL training safety rather than 2D-to-3D motion extraction or cross-modal alignment.

title: Training-free Cross-domain Few-shot Segmentation via Robust Semantic Representation and Matching
summary: Cross-domain Few-shot Segmentation (CD-FSS) aims to transfer knowledge learned from source domain to distinct target domains, segmenting unseen target classes with only a few annotated samples. Although existing methods have made significant progress, they still rely on training or fine-tuning processes, which incur high computational costs and risk overfitting. We observe that when powerful and general-purpose vision foundation models are incorporated into these methods, their performance shows only marginal improvement or even degrades due to overfitting. To address this, we eliminate trainable parameters and propose a training-free framework to avoid both training overhead and overfitting. Built upon the self-supervised vision encoder DINOv3, our framework addresses cross-domain challenges through three core modules. First, the Semantic-aware Feature Re-fusion (SAFR) module identifies and re-fuses features that emphasize semantic patterns, generating representations with enhanced semantic discriminability. Additionally, the Adaptive Support Enhancement (ASE) module narrows semantic gaps between support and query through robust query information aggregation. Finally, the Hybrid Prototype Matching (HPM) module integrates matching results from diverse prototypes to adapt to varying semantic complexity across domains. Extensive experiments on four target domain datasets demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in CD-FSS without any training.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需训练的跨域小样本分割(CD-FSS)框架，基于自监督视觉编码器DINOv3，通过三个核心模块解决跨域知识迁移问题：语义感知特征重融合(SAFR)、自适应支持增强(ASE)和混合原型匹配(HPM)，在四个目标域数据集上实现最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有CD-FSS方法依赖训练或微调过程，导致高计算成本且存在过拟合风险。当引入强大的视觉基础模型时，性能仅边际改善甚至下降。作者观察到这一反常现象，决定摒弃可训练参数，提出完全无需训练的框架来同时避免训练开销和过拟合问题。
AI.method: 构建于DINOv3自监督视觉编码器之上，包含三个核心模块：1)SAFR模块识别并重融合强调语义模式的特征，生成增强语义可分性的表示；2)ASE模块通过鲁棒的支持信息聚合缩小支持与查询之间的语义差距；3)HPM模块整合来自不同原型的匹配结果以适应不同域的语义复杂性。
AI.result: 在四个目标域数据集上进行了广泛实验，证明该方法在无需任何训练的情况下达到了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种完全无需训练的CD-FSS框架，通过DINOv3编码器和三个精心设计的模块成功解决了跨域知识迁移中的过拟合和语义对齐问题。该工作表明，通过巧妙的特征处理和原型匹配策略，即使不使用传统训练也能实现优异的分割性能，为小样本学习领域提供了新的研究方向。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about cross-domain few-shot IMAGE SEGMENTATION (semantic segmentation in computer vision), while the research profile is about 3D HUMAN MOTION GENERATION from text-to-video. Although both involve visual features/VLMs, the purpose is entirely different - one segments objects in images, the other generates 3D human motion. The methods (DINOv3, prototype matching) are for segmentation, not motion synthesis.

title: SAFARI: Scaling Long Horizon Agentic Fault Attribution via Active Investigation
comment: Published at the Second Workshop on Agents in the Wild: Safety, Security, and Beyond (AIWILD) at ICML 2026
summary: As autonomous agents tackle increasingly complex multi-step, multi-agent tasks, their execution trajectories have scaled beyond the constraints of even the largest context windows. Current methods for effectively diagnosing agent failures load the full trajectory into an LLM's context window, which suffers from attention dilution and fails when agentic traces inevitably exceed context limits. To address this, we introduce SAFARI (Scaling long-horizon Agentic Fault AttRibution via active Investigation), a framework that replaces linear context loading with a tool-augmented diagnostic loop. By equipping LLMs with a specialized toolbox to read and search trajectory segments alongside a persistent Short-Term Memory (STM) for cross-turn reasoning, SAFARI effectively decouples diagnostic accuracy from architectural context limits. Our experiments demonstrate that SAFARI outperforms state-of-the-art results by 20% on the Who&When dataset within a 1M token budget, and by 19% on TRAIL GAIA subset on a 25K token budget. Most significantly, SAFARI maintains a 0.58 precision even when the target fault resides 5x beyond the model's native context window, a scenario where traditional evaluators fail entirely.

AI.tldr: SAFARI是一个框架，通过工具增强的诊断循环和短期记忆来应对自治智能体轨迹超出LLM上下文窗口限制时的故障归因问题。
AI.motivation: 随着自治智能体处理复杂的多步骤、多智能体任务，其执行轨迹规模已超出最大上下文窗口限制。传统方法将完整轨迹加载到LLM上下文中存在注意力稀释问题，且在轨迹超出上下文限制时完全失效。
AI.method: SAFARI用工具增强的诊断循环替代线性上下文加载，为LLM配备专门的工具箱来读取和搜索轨迹片段，同时使用持久的短期记忆(STM)进行跨轮次推理，有效解耦诊断准确性与架构上下文限制。
AI.result: 在Who&When数据集上比最先进结果提高20%(1M token预算)，在TRAIL GAIA子集上提高19%(25K token预算)。当故障位置在模型原生上下文窗口5倍距离时仍保持0.58精确度，而传统评估器完全失败。
AI.conclusion: SAFARI成功实现了在超出上下文限制的长程轨迹中进行准确故障归因，为处理大规模智能体执行轨迹提供了有效方案。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about LLM agent fault attribution and diagnostic reasoning, not Computer Graphics or 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely different - SAFARI deals with autonomous agents and tool-augmented reasoning for LLM context limitations, while the research profile focuses on text-to-motion in 3D human motion generation with video-to-motion extraction, cross-modal alignment, and diffusion-based motion synthesis. No overlap in field, application, or methods.

title: MM-TRELLIS: Point-Cloud Guided Multi-Modal 3D Vehicle Generation in Autonomous Driving
summary: Recovering realistic 3D vehicle models from autonomous driving scenes is crucial for synthesizing training data and building simulation environment. However, most existing vehicle generation methods fail to fully exploit multimodal sensors i.e. multi-view images and LiDAR point clouds) and rely on neural rendering based reconstruction, leading to low-quality mesh. Recently, native 3D generative models have made significant progress, yet they are not built for arbitrary multi-view inputs and often struggle with in-the-wild driving images. In this work, we present MM-TRELLIS, a multi-modal version of TRELLIS for in-the-wild 3D vehicle generation that integrates LiDAR and image sensors from autonomous driving datasets into native 3D generative models. Specifically, multi-view images are cycled as conditioning inputs, while LiDAR point clouds provide test-time guidance to ensure geometric accuracy and cross-view consistency. During denoising, we first align the guidance point cloud with the model priors, then enforce consistency between the generated geometry and the guidance point cloud. Finally, we introduce a voxel filtering strategy based on the opacity of 3D Gaussian Splatting to suppress floaters and produce clean meshes. Comprehensive experiments on Waymo dataset demonstrate our method outperforms existing methods in high-fidelity 3D vehicle generation. Code is available at https://github.com/HongliXiao/MM-TRELLIS.

AI.tldr: 提出了MM-TRELLIS，一个将从自动驾驶数据集（Waymo）中获取的多模态传感器数据（多视角图像和LiDAR点云）集成到原生3D生成模型中的多模态3D车辆生成方法。
AI.motivation: 现有车辆生成方法未能充分利用多模态传感器（多视角图像和LiDAR点云），且基于神经渲染的重建导致网格质量低；而原生3D生成模型虽取得进展，但并非为任意多视角输入设计，难以处理野外驾驶图像。
AI.method: 方法包括：(1)多视角图像作为条件输入进行循环；(2)LiDAR点云在测试时提供指导以确保几何精度和跨视角一致性；(3)在去噪过程中先对齐指导点云与模型先验，然后强制生成几何与指导点云保持一致；(4)引入基于3D Gaussian Splatting不透明度的体素滤波策略以抑制浮动物并生成干净的网格。
AI.result: 在Waymo数据集上的综合实验表明，该方法在高质量3D车辆生成方面优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: MM-TRELLIS能够有效整合多模态传感器数据，实现高质量的野外3D车辆生成，为自动驾驶训练数据合成和仿真环境构建提供了有力工具。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile focuses on 3D HUMAN MOTION generation from text-to-motion, while this paper is about 3D VEHICLE generation for autonomous driving. Although both use 3D generation techniques, vehicle generation vs human motion generation are entirely different fields. The paper addresses vehicle geometry synthesis using LiDAR and multi-view images, which does not relate to extracting 3D human motion from 2D video or text-to-motion synthesis. The pain points (3D motion extraction from 2D video, VLM-based screening, cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion) are not addressed at all.

title: CineCap: Structured Reasoning with Spatio-Temporal Anchors for Cinematographic Video Captioning
summary: Cinematographic captioning aims to describe how a video is filmed using professional film-language concepts such as camera movement, shot size, depth of field, composition, and shooting angle. This capability is important for fine-grained video understanding and controllable movie-quality video generation, yet remains underexplored in existing multimodal large language models. Unlike question-answering-based evaluation of cinematic understanding, cinematographic captioning requires a unified open-form description over multiple cinematographic dimensions. This task is challenging for two main reasons: the model must infer professional cinematographic concepts from subtle visual evidence, and it must generate captions that are both comprehensive and accurate. Accordingly, we propose CineCap, a framework that combines structured reasoning with spatio-temporal anchors and reinforcement learning with comprehensiveness, accuracy, and gated coverage rewards. The former grounds professional cinematographic descriptions in explicit visual evidence and organizes them into compact atomic reasoning for supervised fine-tuning, while the latter improves the balance between descriptive completeness and factual correctness. In addition, we construct CineCap Bench, a benchmark of 472 manually annotated video-caption pairs for systematic evaluation. Extensive experiments show that CineCap consistently outperforms strong proprietary and open-source baselines, establishing a new state of the art for cinematographic captioning. The code, model checkpoint, and benchmark are publicly available in https://github.com/Hectormxy/CineCap.git.

AI.tldr: CineCap是一个用于电影摄影字幕生成的新框架，结合结构化推理与时空锚点和强化学习，在472个视频-字幕对的基准测试上取得了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 电影摄影字幕生成对于细粒度视频理解和可控电影质量视频生成很重要，但现有多模态大语言模型对此探索不足。该任务需要统一的开放形式描述多个电影摄影维度，且面临两大挑战：从细微视觉证据推断专业电影摄影概念，以及生成全面准确的字幕。
AI.method: 提出CineCap框架，包含两个核心组件：1) 结构化推理与时空锚点：将专业电影摄影描述基于显式视觉证据并组织为紧凑的原子推理用于监督微调；2) 强化学习使用全面性、准确性和门控覆盖率奖励，改善描述完整性与事实正确性之间的平衡。同时构建了CineCap Bench基准，包含472个手动标注的视频-字幕对。
AI.result: 广泛实验表明CineCap始终优于强大的专有和开源基线方法，建立了电影摄影字幕生成的新技术状态。
AI.conclusion: CineCap框架通过结合结构化推理和强化学习方法，有效解决了电影摄影字幕生成中概念推断和描述准确性的挑战，为该领域提供了新的研究和应用基础。

relevance_reason: This paper is about cinematographic VIDEO CAPTIONING (describing 2D video content), which is a completely different application domain from the research profile's focus on 3D HUMAN MOTION GENERATION (generating 3D skeletal motion data). While both use VLMs, CineCap uses them for video understanding and description, not for motion generation. The paper does not address any of the pain points: it doesn't extract 3D motion from 2D video, doesn't provide quality assessment for VLM-based motion screening, doesn't do visual-guided feature extraction for downstream motion models, and doesn't address cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion space. This is a case of similar methods (VLMs) used in a fundamentally different application domain (video captioning vs. human motion generation).

title: TrOCR for Medieval HTR: A Systematic Ablation Study with Cross-Dataset Validation
comment: Accepted at Document Analysis Systems Workshop 2026 (ICDAR Satellite event)
summary: Fine-tuning transformer-based handwritten text recognition (HTR) models on medieval manuscripts is challenging because these models are pre-trained on modern text and must adapt to a very different visual domain. This paper studies how three controllable fine-tuning choices (contrast normalization, data augmentation, and layer freezing) affect recognition accuracy when adapting TrOCR to small historical datasets. We run controlled experiments on a 13th-century Italian manuscript (I-CT 91 "Cortonese") and replicate the same experimental grid on the public READ-16 benchmark as robustness evidence. On Cortonese, our best configuration achieves 8.03% character error rate (CER). Statistical comparisons across 13 configurations show that freezing up to three encoder layers or six decoder layers does not significantly harm accuracy, while deeper freezing becomes progressively detrimental. Removing contrast normalization (CLAHE) yields 7.84% CER, comparable to a domain-specialized baseline, suggesting strong optimization can reduce reliance on image preprocessing. Cross-dataset validation on READ-16 shows that decoder freezing thresholds transfer more robustly than encoder thresholds, and combined freezing strategies require dataset-specific re-validation. Finally, we use Grad-CAM gradient attributions and decoder cross-attention maps to diagnose error patterns and failure modes revealed by the ablations. Source code is available at https://github.com/LaudareProject/TrOCR-analysis

AI.tldr: 研究如何通过三种可控的微调策略（对比度归一化CLAHE、数据增强和层冻结）将TrOCR模型适配到中世纪手稿识别任务，在13世纪意大利手稿I-CT 91 "Cortonese"上达到8.03%字符错误率(CER)，发现冻结最多3层编码器或6层解码器不会显著影响精度，且解码器冻结策略更具跨数据集稳健性。
AI.motivation: 预训练的Transformer手写文本识别模型需要从现代文本视觉域适应到中世纪手稿这一非常不同的视觉域，但针对这种领域适应的最佳微调策略尚不明确，因此需要系统研究三种可控微调选择对识别精度的影响。
AI.method: 在I-CT 91 "Cortonese"（13世纪意大利手稿）上进行13种配置的受控实验，并在公开的READ-16基准数据集上复制实验网格进行鲁棒性验证，使用Grad-CAM梯度归因和解码器交叉注意力图诊断错误模式。
AI.result: 在Cortonese上最佳配置达到8.03% CER；移除CLAHE后达到7.84% CER，与领域专门化基线相当；冻结最多3层编码器或6层解码器不会显著损害精度；跨数据集验证表明解码器冻结阈值比编码器冻结阈值更具鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 深度优化可以减少对图像预处理的依赖；冻结策略需要数据集特定重新验证；解码器冻结策略更具跨数据集迁移能力；Grad-CAM和交叉注意力图可有效诊断错误模式和失败原因。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Handwritten Text Recognition (HTR) for medieval manuscripts using TrOCR - completely different from the research profile. The application domain is document/image text recognition, NOT 3D human motion generation, text-to-motion synthesis, or video-to-motion extraction. While both use transformer methods, the use case is entirely different - one is for recognizing text in historical documents, the other is for generating 3D human motion from text or video. There is no match in application domain, methods (no diffusion for motion, no visual-guided feature extraction for motion), or research area. This is a document analysis paper, not a computer graphics or motion generation paper.

title: LaGO: Latent Action Guidance for Online Reinforcement Learning
comment: 9 pages, 2 figures. Accepted at the ICML 2026 Workshop on Large Language Models for Planning (LM4Plan)
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have shown strong potential for planning and sequential decision-making, but prior work often relies on using them as direct controllers, which requires precise action generation and can be unreliable in practice. This paper proposes Latent Action Guidance for Online Reinforcement Learning (LaGO), a framework that uses a pretrained LLM as a latent action prior to softly guide online policy optimization, rather than treating the LLM as an explicit planner or controller. Experiments on both a discrete-control benchmark, CLEVR-Robot, and a continuous-control benchmark, Meta-World, demonstrate that LaGO consistently improves both reward and success rate over Vanilla PPO. In particular, LaGO increases the average success rate from 15.1% to 27.2% on CLEVR-Robot and from 2.7% to 15.2% on Meta-World. Our analysis further shows that stronger pretrained LLMs provide more effective guidance, suggesting that LLM knowledge can improve planning and online decision-making.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LaGO框架,利用预训练语言模型作为潜在动作先验来引导在线强化学习策略优化,而非直接将语言模型作为控制器使用。该方法在离散控制任务CLEVR-Robot和连续控制任务Meta-World上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 先前工作通常将大语言模型作为直接控制器使用,这需要精确的动作生成,在实践中往往不可靠。需要一种更有效的方式来利用语言模型的知识进行规划和序列决策。
AI.method: 提出潜在动作引导(LaGO)框架,使用预训练大语言模型作为潜在动作先验,以软约束的方式引导在线策略优化,而非将LLM视为显式规划器或控制器。
AI.result: 在CLEVR-Robot任务上,成功率从15.1%提升至27.2%;在Meta-World任务上,成功率从2.7%提升至15.2%。更强的预训练语言模型提供更有效的引导,表明LLM知识可改善规划和在线决策能力。
AI.conclusion: LLM知识能够有效提升强化学习中的规划能力和在线决策性能,为语言模型与强化学习的结合提供了新的思路。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant application domain. This paper is about using LLMs to guide reinforcement learning for robot control tasks (CLEVR-Robot, Meta-World), NOT about 3D human motion generation in computer graphics. While it uses language models, the application is robot manipulation control, not text-to-motion synthesis. Robot motion generation is fundamentally different from human motion generation - this is a different field entirely (robotics vs computer graphics). The paper does not address any of the specified pain points (2D-to-3D extraction, VLM quality assessment, visual-guided features, cross-modal alignment) and uses no relevant methods for the research profile.

title: REDI-Match: Rotation-Equivariant Distillation for Efficient and Robust Dense Matching
summary: Vision Foundation Models (VFMs) have significantly advanced dense feature matching, yet severe in-plane rotation remains a critical challenge. Existing solutions face a fundamental dilemma: data-driven methods require inefficient parameter scaling to implicitly learn rotations, whereas strictly equivariant networks lack the semantic capacity of modern VFMs. Consequently, current frameworks typically freeze VFMs and shift the entire burden of rotation generalization to the downstream decoder. To break this architectural bottleneck, we propose REDI-Match, an efficient framework driven by a novel Rotation-Equivariant Distillation (REDI) paradigm. Instead of relying on rotation data augmentation to establish rotational correspondences, REDI distills the non-equivariant semantic representations of a VFM into a lightweight, strictly rotation-equivariant encoder, leveraging an equivariant geometric architecture to constrain robust high-dimensional semantics. To fully exploit these features, we equip the decoder with an entropy-driven spatial alignment module. By evaluating discrete rotation hypotheses, this mechanism explicitly locks onto the canonical coordinate system, eliminating global ambiguity before continuous refinement. Extensive experiments demonstrate that REDI-Match establishes a new state-of-the-art (SOTA) across multiple benchmarks. Notably, it achieves a 13.89% absolute pose accuracy improvement on the highly challenging SatAst dataset while operating 1.9x faster than the current SOTA (RoMa v2), enabling real-time inference (~41 FPS) on a single RTX 4090 GPU. Code: https://github.com/YinjiGe/REDI-Match.

AI.tldr: REDI-Match提出了一种新的旋转等变蒸馏范式，将视觉基础模型的语义表示蒸馏到轻量级旋转等变编码器中，解决VFMs在密集特征匹配中严重平面内旋转的挑战，通过熵驱动的空间对齐模块消除全局模糊，在多个基准数据集上实现新的最先进水平。
AI.motivation: 解决视觉基础模型在密集特征匹配中面临严重平面内旋转的关键挑战。现有方法面临两难困境：数据驱动方法需要低效的参数扩展来隐式学习旋转，而严格等变网络缺乏现代VFMs的语义能力，当前框架通常冻结VFMs并将旋转泛化负担转移给下游解码器。
AI.method: 提出REDI-Match框架，包含两个核心创新：1)旋转等变蒸馏(REDI)：将VFM的非等变语义表示蒸馏到轻量级严格旋转等变编码器，利用等变几何架构约束高维语义；2)熵驱动的空间对齐模块：通过评估离散旋转假设明确锁定规范坐标系，消除全局模糊后再进行连续细化。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上建立新的最先进水平(SOTA)。在极具挑战性的SatAst数据集上实现13.89%的绝对姿态精度提升，比当前SOTA (RoMa v2)快1.9倍，在单张RTX 4090 GPU上实现约41 FPS的实时推理。
AI.conclusion: REDI-Match成功打破了架构瓶颈，通过旋转等变蒸馏范式高效地将VFMs的语义能力迁移到等变网络中，无需大量参数扩展即可处理旋转问题，为实时旋转鲁棒匹配提供了有效解决方案。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The paper is about dense visual feature matching for computer vision (rotation-equivariant feature matching), while the research profile is about Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation (Computer Graphics). Although both involve VLMs/视觉基础模型, the paper addresses visual matching/alignment tasks in computer vision, not 3D human motion synthesis from text/video. The application domains are fundamentally different: visual matching vs. human motion generation.

title: Cost-Optimal Decision Diagrams for Stochastic Boolean Function Evaluation
summary: In many decision-making scenarios, acquiring information incurs different costs. We consider the problem of constructing a deterministic evaluation strategy that minimizes the expected cost of evaluating a propositional formula under variable costs and a probability distribution over truth assignments. We present a branch-and-bound algorithm with variable-selection heuristics, pruning, and caching. To the best of our knowledge, it is the first practical exact algorithm for this level of generality. Experiments on random instances demonstrate scalability and quantify the efficiency-quality trade-off of a greedy beam-search variant. We additionally evaluate a structured heart-disease diagnosis instance. Finally, we prove that the problem is $\#P$-hard and contained in $\mathrm{PSPACE}$.

AI.tldr: 在变量成本和真值分配概率分布下,研究如何构造确定性求值策略以最小化命题公式的期望求值成本,提出了一种分支定界算法。
AI.motivation: 在许多决策场景中,获取信息需要不同成本,需要一个实际可用的精确算法来求解此类问题。
AI.method: 提出了一种带有变量选择启发式、剪枝和缓存的分支定界算法,并设计了贪心束搜索变体进行效率-质量权衡分析。
AI.result: 该算法是目前首个具有这种通用性的实用精确算法,在随机实例上展示了可扩展性,并在心脏病诊断实例上进行了评估。同时证明了该问题是#P-hard的,属于PSPACE复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为命题公式的最小成本求值问题提供了有效的精确求解方法,具有实际应用价值。

relevance_reason: This paper is about decision diagrams for stochastic boolean function evaluation - a completely different field. It deals with optimization theory, branch-and-bound algorithms for decision-making in diagnostic scenarios (heart disease diagnosis), not computer graphics, video generation, or 3D human motion generation. The application domain is decision theory/optimization, which has no connection to text-to-motion generation, visual language models, or any of the methods mentioned in the research profile. This is entirely unrelated to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation.

title: UniTranslator: A Unified Multi-modal Framework for End-to-end In-Image Machine Translation
summary: In-Image Machine Translation (IIMT) aims to translate scene text in an image and render the translated text back into the original regions while preserving the overall visual appearance. Recent unified multimodal models provide a promising solution by combining visual-text understanding and image generation within a single framework. However, directly adapting such models to IIMT remains challenging. In particular, they often suffer from understanding-generation conflicts, where the translation inferred during understanding is inconsistent with the text supervision used in generation, and spatial position misalignment, where the rendered text does not accurately match the target text regions. To address these issues, we present UniTranslator, a unified multimodal framework for IIMT that tightly couples translation understanding and text editing. Specifically, we introduce an Understand-Generation Alignment Module (UGAM) to bridge the representation gap between understanding and generation, encouraging semantic consistency between translated content prediction and text rendering. We further propose a Spatial Mask Decoder (SMD) with pixel-level supervision over text regions to improve spatial grounding, geometric alignment, and layout controllability during generation. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate that UniTranslator achieves state-of-the-art performance across diverse language directions and complex real-world layouts. Moreover, our results reveal a strong mutual reinforcement effect between translation understanding and image generation, highlighting the advantage of unified translation multimodal learning. Code is available at https://github.com/SeerRay-Lab/Unitranslator.

AI.tldr: UniTranslator是一种统一的跨模态框架，用于图像内机器翻译（IIMT），通过理解-生成对齐模块（UGAM）和空间掩码解码器（SMD）解决文本理解和图像生成之间的冲突，以及空间位置对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的统一多模态模型直接应用于IIMT存在两大挑战：1）理解-生成冲突：翻译推理与文本监督不一致；2）空间位置错位：渲染文本无法准确匹配目标文本区域。
AI.method: 1. 引入理解-生成对齐模块（UGAM）桥接表示差距，促进翻译内容预测与文本渲染之间的语义一致性；2. 提出空间掩码解码器（SMD），通过像素级监督提升空间定位、几何对齐和布局可控性。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上实现了最先进的性能，涵盖多种语言方向和复杂的真实世界布局。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果揭示了翻译理解和图像生成之间的强相互强化效果，突出了统一翻译多模态学习的优势。代码已开源。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about In-Image Machine Translation (IIMT) - translating text within images in different languages. The research profile is specifically about 3D Human Motion Generation (Text-to-Motion) in Computer Graphics. These are entirely different application domains: human motion generation vs. image text translation. While both may use multi-modal approaches, the core application - generating/rendering text in images vs. generating 3D human motion from text - are completely unrelated fields in computer graphics and computer vision.

title: Decentralised AI Training and Inference with BlockTrain
summary: Frontier AI training is increasingly shaped by access to dense, centrally controlled accelerator clusters. This creates a structural advantage for hyperscalers and large centralized laboratories, and makes open or independent AI efforts depend on scarce capital, privileged infrastructure, and data-center geography. We present Spheroid BlockTrain, a decentralized training protocol in which a model is partitioned into independently trainable blocks, each optimized on a local objective derived from the same global target and composed at inference into one model. On byte-level WikiText, BlockTrain reaches cross entropy 1.359 (perplexity 3.89), within about 0.04 CE of a same-setup end-to-end Transformer reference, while each active worker trains only one block and avoids full-model optimizer state. A shared six-worker block training run reaches CE 1.385 by averaging same-block updates into one assembled model. HTTP/TCP transport experiments move real serialized checkpoints and updates, including a public-IP three-host run that improves CE from 5.580 to 1.811 while moving 15.22 GB. For inference, the current BlockTrain path uses one block-stack traversal per full output and serves over direct TCP across three public-network GPU hosts up to a 75.80B-parameter logical fp16 shape, outperforming a matched plain-autoregressive TCP pipeline baseline because it emits a full sequence per WAN pipeline traversal rather than one token per traversal.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Spheroid BlockTrain，一种去中心化训练协议，将模型分割为独立可训练的块，在推理时组合成完整模型。该方法在有限资源下实现了接近端到端训练的 perforance，为独立AI开发提供了新途径。
AI.motivation: 当前AI训练主要由拥有大量 accelerator cluster 的科技公司主导，形成结构性优势。独立或开源AI项目受限于稀缺资本、特权基础设施和数据中心地理位置，迫切需要一种去中心化的训练方案，使小型团队也能参与前沿AI训练。
AI.method: 将模型分割为独立可训练的块，每个块基于相同的全局目标优化本地目标，推理时将各块组合成完整模型。使用HTTP/TCP传输序列化检查点和更新，通过块栈遍历实现跨多个GPU主机的推理。
AI.result: 在byte-level WikiText上达到交叉熵1.359（困惑度3.89），与同设置端到端Transformer参考相差约0.04 CE。六工作节点训练达到CE 1.385。三主机公开IP测试将CE从5.580降至1.811，传输15.22 GB。可服务达75.80B参数的fp16模型，优于传统自回归TCP流水线。
AI.conclusion: BlockTrain为去中心化AI训练提供了可行方案，以极小资源需求实现接近中心化训练的 perforance，使独立AI开发不再依赖大规模资本和基础设施，为AI领域的长尾创新奠定基础。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about decentralized AI training infrastructure (distributed computing for LLM training), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domains are entirely different: AI infrastructure/compute vs computer graphics/human motion synthesis. None of the pain points (2D-to-3D motion extraction, VLM quality assessment, visual-guided features, cross-modal alignment) or methods (diffusion models, VLM, motion generation) are addressed. This is a systems/infrastructure paper about training language models across distributed GPU clusters.

title: Ill-Posed by Design: Probing Evidence Use in VLMs
summary: Counterfactual analysis is widely used to study evidence use in vision-language models, but its diagnostic value is limited on well-posed tasks: when several cues independently support the same answer, removing one may not change the prediction. We propose monocular metric object-size estimation as an ill-posed diagnostic setting for evidence selection: because physical size cannot be determined from a single uncalibrated image, models must rely on imperfect cues category priors, target appearance, local context, apparent image size, and scene geometry. We assemble Metric VQA ($10{,}813$ dimension queries from Objectron and $331$ tape-measured in-the-wild scenes) and evaluate $12$ open-weight VLMs ($3$--$397$\,B parameters) with counterfactual analysis decomposing six visual and language evidence channels. Even the largest VLMs tested (Qwen3-VL-235B, Qwen3.5-397B, InternVL3.5-241B) trail a text-only frontier LLM on the in-the-wild split. The diagnostic analysis shows: target identity is the most load-bearing cue, target pixels and local context help only some models, apparent size shifts predictions without a directional readout, and global scene geometry is largely unused. We analyze LoRA fine-tuning as an actionable intervention specific to metric estimation: while the task is learnable, the models do not learn to leverage scene geometry.

AI.tldr: 提出单目度量物体尺寸估计作为视觉语言模型中证据选择的病态诊断任务，发现当前最大VLMs在度量估计上不如纯文本前沿LLM，且模型未能学习利用场景几何。
AI.motivation: 反事实分析在视觉语言模型研究中用于证据使用诊断，但在良定义任务上价值有限，因为多个线索独立支持同一答案时，移除一个可能不会改变预测。需要建立一个无法从单张未校准图像确定物理尺寸的病态诊断设置。
AI.method: 组装Metric VQA数据集（10,813维度查询来自Objectron，331个真实场景），评估12个开放权重VLMs，使用反事实分析分解六个视觉和语言证据通道，并分析LoRA微调的干预效果。
AI.result: 最大VLMs在真实场景上表现不如纯文本前沿LLM；目标identity是最关键的线索，目标像素和局部上下文仅帮助部分模型，表观尺寸改变预测但无方向性输出，全局场景几何基本未被使用；任务可学习但模型未学习利用场景几何。
AI.conclusion: 单目度量物体尺寸估计是有效的证据选择诊断任务，揭示了当前VLMs在利用视觉线索上的关键局限；LoRA微调虽可学习任务，但模型未能学习利用场景几何。

relevance_reason: The paper is about Visual Language Models for monocular metric object size estimation (computer vision domain), while the research profile is specifically about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domains are completely different: this paper addresses computer vision/understanding tasks, not 3D human motion generation. Although both involve VLMs, the paper focuses on metric estimation and evidence analysis, not motion synthesis, visual-guided feature extraction for motion models, or cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion space as required in the research profile.

title: Scaling Laws for Task-Specific LLM Distillation
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) achieve strong performance across a growing range of domains, yet their scale poses deployment challenges in applications where latency and cost constraints are critical. This paper derives empirical scaling laws for domain-specific LLM compression, quantifying how in-domain and general knowledge performance scale with dataset size, compression ratio, supervision format, and iterative pruning schedule. Using quantitative finance as our application domain, we compare logit-based and LoRA-based distillation under iterative structural pruning, introducing a blended chain-of-thought supervision loss that stabilizes KL-divergence distillation over reasoning traces. In-domain task quality degrades predictably under compression while general-knowledge benchmarks collapse well before the same point; supervision format is the key driver of this tradeoff, with chain-of-thought supervision actively recovering general knowledge that pruning erases. We release the headline dataset FinHeadlineMix, scaling law results, and practical recommendations to provide a reusable framework for domain-specific compression decisions.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究大型语言模型在特定领域（量化金融）部署时的压缩策略，通过推导经验 scaling law 来量化知识保留与压缩参数的关系。
AI.motivation: LLM 规模日益增长，但在延迟和成本受限的应用场景中部署困难，需要在保持领域任务性能的同时压缩模型。
AI.method: 采用迭代结构剪枝，结合 logit-based 和 LoRA-based 蒸馏方法，引入混合 chain-of-thought 监督损失来稳定 KL 散度蒸馏。
AI.result: 领域任务质量随压缩可预测下降；通用知识基准在更早阶段就崩溃；监督格式是权衡的关键驱动力；CoT 监督能恢复被剪枝擦除的通用知识。
AI.conclusion: 发布 FinHeadlineMix 数据集、scaling law 结果和实用建议，为领域特定压缩决策提供可复用框架。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM compression/distillation for quantitative finance applications. It has NO relevance to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation.
