The application domain is completely different (quantitative finance vs. 3D human motion generation), the methods are different (LLM pruning/distillation vs. diffusion-based motion synthesis, video generation), and it addresses none of the pain points listed (3D motion extraction from 2D video, visual-guided feature extraction, cross-modal alignment). This is an entirely different field.

title: TIGER: Taming Identity, Geometry, and Generative Priors for High-Quality Face Video Restoration
summary: Face Video Restoration (FVR) aims to recover high-fidelity facial videos from degraded input while preserving identity and semantic consistency across frames. Existing methods often struggle to simultaneously address three key challenges: identity shift, viewpoint-entangled guidance, and perceptual realism. To tackle these issues, we propose TIGER, a structured tri-prior fusion framework that Tames Identity, Geometry, and gEnerative pRiors for high-quality FVR. Specifically, an Identity Prior is first established by injecting subject-discriminative embeddings into the latent space, effectively anchoring the subject's identity against severe degradations. Then, to provide temporally consistent structural guidance for dynamic videos, TIGER constructs a Geometry Prior by lifting 2D reference cues into a disentangled 3D parameter space, creating a geometric anchor through cross-source parameter fusion. Moreover, to achieve maximum efficiency without compromising realism, we harness the video generation model's Generative Prior through a one-step rectified flow. We further design a progressive three-stage training optimization strategy that refines structural fidelity, textural reconstruction, and distribution-level realism to ensure robust optimization. We also construct a large-scale FVR dataset to facilitate robust training and standardized evaluation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that TIGER achieves state-of-the-art performance in both identity fidelity and temporal stability, delivering a high-quality, efficient and identity-consistent FVR. Project page: https://yzhoulv.github.io/Tiger/.

AI.tldr: TIGER是一种用于面部视频修复的三重先验融合框架，通过整合身份先验、几何先验和生成先验，从退化输入中恢复高保真面部视频，同时保持身份和语义一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法往往难以同时解决三个关键挑战：身份偏移、视角纠缠指导和感知真实感。需要一种方法能够同时处理这三个问题。
AI.method: 首先建立身份先验，将主体判别性嵌入注入潜在空间以锚定主体身份；然后构建几何先验，将2D参考线索提升到解耦的3D参数空间，通过跨源参数融合创建几何锚点；此外利用视频生成模型的生成先验，通过一步 rectified flow实现最大效率；并设计渐进式三阶段训练优化策略。
AI.result: TIGER在身份保真度和时间稳定性方面达到最先进的性能，提供高质量、高效且身份一致的面部视频修复。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功解决了面部视频修复中的身份偏移、视角纠缠和感知真实感三大挑战，通过三重先验融合和渐进式训练优化策略，实现了卓越的修复效果。

relevance_reason: COMPLETELY DIFFERENT APPLICATION DOMAIN. The research profile is about 3D Human Motion Generation (generating 3D skeletal motion from text/video inputs), while the paper is about Face Video Restoration (enhancing 2D facial videos). Although both may use diffusion-based methods, the core applications are entirely different - face video restoration is NOT the same as human motion generation. The paper addresses 2D video enhancement, not 3D motion extraction or generation from video. This is a computer vision/video processing paper, not a computer graphics motion generation paper.

title: Can Scale Save Us From Plasticity Loss in Large Language Models?
summary: The loss of plasticity - the ability of a network to learn new information after having already learned older information - is a fundamental challenge in creating artificial neural networks capable of continual learning. Although this phenomenon has been known for decades, it has mostly been studied in older, relatively small architectures and rarely in natural-language domains. To determine whether loss of plasticity remains a problem in the modern transformer-based LLM paradigm, we study plasticity loss in GPT-style Transformer models trained on a multilingual continual learning problem. Consistent with prior work, we find evidence of plasticity loss across models ranging from 5M to 314M non-embedding parameters, as measured by deterioration on a held-out Vietnamese probing task. We further find that the onset of plasticity loss follows a predictable scaling law, growing sublinearly with model size. These results suggest that larger models may delay the measurable effects of plasticity loss, but that increasing parameter count alone is likely to be insufficient to completely prevent it. We also find evidence of plasticity loss under stationary multilingual training, challenging the view that the phenomenon is exclusive to continual learning with abrupt task changes. Overall, our results suggest that even large Transformer language models trained on natural-language will eventually lose the ability to efficiently adapt to new data after sufficiently long training, in both continual and stationary settings.

AI.tldr: 研究在GPT风格Transformer模型中是否还存在可塑性问题。在5M到314M参数的模型中，发现即使是大型语言模型，在持续训练后也会失去适应新数据的能力。
AI.motivation: 可塑性丧失是持续学习中的基础挑战，此前多在较小架构中研究，很少在自然语言领域探索。需要确定在现代Transformer LLM范式中该问题是否仍然存在。
AI.method: 研究GPT风格Transformer模型（5M到314M非嵌入参数），在多语言持续学习问题上训练，通过越南语探测任务测量可塑性丧失。
AI.result: 在所有模型规模中都发现可塑性丧失证据。可塑性丧失 onset 遵循可预测的缩放定律，随模型规模次线性增长。在 stationary 多语言训练下也发现可塑性丧失，挑战了该现象仅限于突发任务变化持续学习的观点。
AI.conclusion: 更大模型可能延缓可塑性丧失的可测量效果，但仅增加参数数量可能不足以完全防止。即使大型Transformer语言模型在自然语言上训练，在足够长的训练后，在持续学习和 stationary 设置下都会最终失去有效适应新数据的能力。

relevance_reason: Completely different field and application domain. This paper is about plasticity loss in Large Language Models for multilingual text processing (NLP), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - specifically Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. Although both mention "transformer" architectures, this paper studies language models for NLP tasks, not visual understanding or motion generation. The application domains are entirely unrelated - NLP vs 3D motion generation in computer graphics.

title: Open-Vocabulary BEV Segmentation with 3D-Aware Geometric Constraints
comment: This paper has been accepted by ECCV 2026
summary: Bird's-eye view (BEV) perception fuses multi-camera images into a unified top-down representation for autonomous driving. Despite recent progress, state-of-the-art methods remain confined to closed-set scenarios, making them vulnerable to unpredictable real-world environments. In this work, we introduce open-vocabulary BEV segmentation (OVBS), which leverages vision-language models (VLMs) to recognize categories beyond the training set while maintaining precise BEV perception and real-time efficiency. A key challenge in OVBS lies in the 3D geometric inconsistency inherent in the ill-posed lifting of 2D VLM semantics into BEV. To address this, we propose OVBEVSeg, a geometry-aware OVBS framework that enhances efficient Gaussian splatting (GS)-based unprojection by leveraging robust 3D geometric constraints across three progressive stages: (1) 2D-to-BEV pseudo-labeling via reliable 3D projection for OV generalization; (2) joint 2D-BEV per-scene optimization with BEV structural constraints for 3D geometric consistency; and (3) 3D geometric distillation for online efficiency. On the nuScenes dataset, OVBEVSeg achieves state-of-the-art performance, outperforming closed-set methods by 15.3 mIoU on unseen categories. Remarkably, even with no novel-class ground-truth labels, it remains competitive with self- and semi-supervised baselines trained with up to 40% of ground-truth annotations. Furthermore, it achieves 2.5x faster inference with only 0.22x the memory consumption of projection-based methods. Project page: https://hchoi256.github.io/projects/ovbevseg/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出开放词汇BEV分割(OVBS)任务，利用视觉语言模型识别训练集外的类别，并通过几何感知框架OVBEVSeg解决2D到BEV升维中的3D几何不一致问题，在nuScenes数据集上实现SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有BEV感知方法局限于封闭集场景，无法识别训练时未见过的类别，难以应对真实世界不可预测的环境，因此需要开放词汇BEV分割能力。
AI.method: 提出OVBEVSeg框架，采用三阶段几何感知策略：(1)通过可靠3D投影进行2D-to-BEV伪标签生成实现OV泛化；(2)联合2D-BEV每场景优化结合BEV结构约束保证3D几何一致性；(3)3D几何蒸馏实现在线效率。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上，OVBEVSeg比封闭集方法在未见类别上提升15.3 mIoU；即使无新类别标注，也能与使用40%标注的半监督方法竞争；推理速度提升2.5倍，内存消耗仅为0.22倍。
AI.conclusion: OVBEVSeg成功实现开放词汇BEV分割，在保持实时效率和精确BEV感知的同时，能够识别训练集外的类别，为自动驾驶感知系统的实际部署提供了可行方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about BEV (Bird's Eye View) segmentation for autonomous driving, which is completely unrelated to the research profile's focus on Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. While both involve VLMs and 2D-to-3D transformation, the application domains are fundamentally different: autonomous driving scene perception vs human motion synthesis. The paper addresses geometric consistency for scene understanding, not human motion extraction or generation. Even though the pain points mention 3D motion extraction from 2D video, this paper's 2D-to-BEV transformation is about environmental geometry, not human body motion geometry. The methods (BEV segmentation, geometric constraints) are specific to autonomous driving perception, not human motion generation or text-to-motion synthesis.

title: BluTrain: A C++/CUDA Framework for AI Systems
summary: Progress in deep learning is, at scale, more a matter of systems engineering than of modelling: the behaviour of a model in training (its throughput, its memory footprint, and the numerical fidelity of the result) is determined less by the architecture itself than by how that architecture is expressed on the hardware. To achieve absolute control over this hardware expression while abstracting away systems complexity to make modelling seamless and eliminating the need for repetitive orchestration logic, BluTrain was architected from first principles as a robust, lightweight, and architecture-general training framework in standard C++ and the core CUDA programming model. Every layer is implemented natively: a typed tensor module with reverse-mode autograd, a linear-algebra library, a caching allocator, a multi-mode distributed-execution module, and an MLIR-based deep-learning compiler. In formal evaluations training a 124M-parameter GPT-2 baseline in FP32 on an 8-GPU 6000 Ada system, BluTrain outperforms industry-standard baselines in both throughput (sustaining an average of 407K tokens/s versus PyTorch's 395K tokens/s) and memory efficiency (achieving up to a 22% footprint reduction), while strictly preserving numerical fidelity and converging to a marginally lower final validation loss. With every layer explicitly open to native tuning, the performance ceiling is the framework's own to raise.

AI.tldr: BluTrain是一个从第一性原理构建的轻量级C++/CUDA深度学习训练框架，通过原生实现每一层（张量模块、自动微分、线性代数库、缓存分配器、分布式执行模块和MLIR编译器）来实现对硬件的绝对控制。评估表明，在8-GPU 6000 Ada系统上训练124M参数GPT-2模型时，BluTrain的吞吐量（407K tokens/s）优于PyTorch（395K tokens/s），内存占用降低22%，同时保持数值保真度。
AI.motivation: 深度学习的进展在更大程度上取决于系统工程而非模型架构：模型训练过程中的行为（吞吐量、内存占用、数值保真度）更多由架构在硬件上的表达方式决定，而非架构本身。需要实现对硬件表达的绝对控制，同时抽象化系统复杂性，使建模无缝化。
AI.method: 从第一性原理设计BluTrain框架，使用标准C++和CUDA核心编程模型，原生实现每一层：带反向模式自动求导的类型化张量模块、线性代数库、缓存分配器、多模式分布式执行模块和基于MLIR的深度学习编译器。在8-GPU 6000 Ada系统上训练124M参数GPT-2基线模型（FP32）进行正式评估。
AI.result: 在吞吐量方面，BluTrain持续达到平均407K tokens/s，而PyTorch为395K tokens/s；内存效率方面，实现高达22%的内存占用降低；严格保持数值保真度；收敛到略低的最终验证损失。
AI.conclusion: BluTrain在吞吐量和内存效率上均优于行业标准PyTorch，同时保持数值保真度。由于每一层都明确开放原生调优，性能天花板取决于框架本身的提升空间。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about a C++/CUDA deep learning training framework (BluTrain) for training LLMs (GPT-2), focusing on system-level infrastructure (throughput, memory efficiency). It has NO connection to Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is completely different - this is ML systems/infrastructure, not computer graphics or motion generation. No methods overlap with the research profile's focus on video-to-motion extraction, VLM-based screening, visual-guided feature extraction, or diffusion-based motion synthesis.

title: SignNet-1M: Large-Scale Multilingual Sign Language Video Dataset with Downstream Benchmarks
summary: Sign language models are typically trained on datasets captured under constrained conditions, with limited viewpoint, background, and signer-identity diversity, leading to poor robustness under real-world distribution shifts. We introduce SignNet-1M, a large-scale augmented dataset spanning ASL, CSL, and German Sign Language (DGS). SignNet-1M synthesizes realistic variations along three axes: (i) novel-view rendering (rotation and zoom) via 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS), (ii) scene/identity editing via diffusion models for background replacement and signer substitution while preserving sign motion and linguistic content, and (iii) post-rendering augmentations that emulate capture and compression artifacts (e.g., pose/temporal perturbations and video-level corruptions) to better match in-the-wild recordings. Beyond data release, we provide a unified benchmark suite across downstream tasks (e.g., translation and recognition) and ablations that isolate each augmentation component. Experiments across backbones show that training with SignNet-1M consistently improves generalization under cross-view, cross-background, cross-identity, and post-rendering shifts, while maintaining strong in-distribution performance. The dataset, full augmentation pipeline, and benchmark are available at https://signnet.chatsign.ai/.

AI.tldr: SignNet-1M是一个大规模手语数据集，通过3D高斯溅射、扩散模型和后处理增强技术，生成包含ASL、CSL和德语手语的多样化训练数据，显著提升模型在跨视角、跨背景、跨身份等真实场景下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有手语模型在受限条件下训练，缺乏视角、背景和签名者身份的多样性，导致在真实世界分布变化下表现不佳。
AI.method: (i) 3D高斯溅射实现新颖视角渲染；(ii) 扩散模型进行背景替换和签名者替换；(iii) 后处理模拟采集和压缩伪影
AI.result: 在跨视角、跨背景、跨身份和后处理位移变化下，训练于SignNet-1M的模型一致提升泛化能力，同时保持较强的分布内性能。
AI.conclusion: 大规模数据增强是提升手语模型鲁棒性的有效方法，SignNet-1M为手语研究和应用提供了重要的数据集和基准。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on sign language video dataset generation (ASL/CSL/German), which is primarily a computer vision/speech processing task rather than Computer Graphics Text-to-Motion generation. While it uses 3D Gaussian splatting and diffusion models, the application domain is different - it's about creating training data for sign language recognition, not generating 3D human motion from text. The pain points don't align: there's no mention of 2D-to-3D motion extraction, VLM-based quality assessment, or cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion. Some methods overlap (diffusion, 3D representation), but the core application domain mismatch makes this only marginally relevant at best.

title: Assessing Distribution Shift in Human Activity Recognition for Domain Generalization
summary: While the field of Human Activity Recognition (HAR) continues to draw interest from researchers and advance in important ways, some key challenges remain. One of the most difficult aspects of building HAR models that show good performance in real-world settings is dealing with data diversity from device and sensor heterogeneity, and contextual changes that are intrinsic to real-world applications. While data diversity in HAR has been well-acknowledged in the literature, there remains a gap in understanding the effect of various types of distribution shifts on HAR models and the domain generalization problem that arises. Towards that end, this paper systematically evaluates 4 different types of distribution shifts, including variations in device type, sensor placement, sampling rate, and user behavior. Quantifying their effects, we illustrate that diversity shifts predominantly define all types of shifts, indicating the existence of unique features that are not shared across different domains. We then introduce a uniform HAR-based distribution shift benchmarks and conduct a comprehensive evaluation of up to 28 domain generalization methods. Our analysis exposes the limitations of current domain generalization algorithms in achieving model generalizability, marginally outperforming the empirical risk minimization baseline. This work represents the first systematic exploration of domain generalization and adaptation concerning specific distribution shifts in sensor-based HAR, offering an open-source benchmark platform and datasets to spur further research.

AI.tldr: 本文系统性地研究了在传感器-based人类活动识别(HAR)中，4种不同类型分布偏移（设备类型、传感器位置、采样率、用户行为）对模型泛化性能的影响，并创建了统一的HAR分布偏移基准，对28种领域泛化方法进行了综合评估。
AI.motivation: 现实世界的HAR应用面临数据和传感器异构性以及上下文变化带来的挑战。虽然数据多样性已被广泛认可，但各种分布偏移对HAR模型的影响以及领域泛化问题仍未得到充分理解。该研究旨在系统性地评估不同类型的分布偏移并揭示当前领域泛化方法的局限性。
AI.method: 系统性地评估了4种不同类型的分布偏移：设备类型变化、传感器位置变化、采样率变化和用户行为变化。对多达28种领域泛化方法进行了综合评估，并引入统一的基于HAR的分布偏移基准和开源数据集。
AI.result: 研究表明多样性偏移主要定义了所有类型的偏移，表明存在不同领域之间不共享的独特特征。当前领域泛化算法在实现模型泛化性方面存在明显局限性，仅略优于经验风险最小化(ERM)基准。
AI.conclusion: 这是首次对传感器-based HAR中特定分布偏移进行领域泛化和适应的系统探索。研究创建了开源基准平台和数据集，为推动该领域的进一步研究提供了重要资源。

relevance_reason: Complete domain mismatch. The research profile is about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion generation (synthesizing new 3D human motion from text/video), while this paper is about Sensor-based Human Activity Recognition (classifying motion from accelerometer/gyroscope sensor data). Even though both involve "human motion," they are completely different applications: motion synthesis vs. motion recognition. The paper uses sensor data from wearable devices, not visual data (2D video), and addresses domain generalization for recognition tasks, not motion generation or cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion space.

title: Structural Kolmogorov-Arnold Convolutions: Learnable Function on the Values or the Filter Shape as Parameter-Efficient Alternative to Per-Edge Convolutional KANs
summary: Convolutional Kolmogorov--Arnold Networks (KANs) replace the fixed weights of a convolutional kernel with learnable univariate functions. The dominant formulation attaches one such function to every kernel entry and lets it act on pixel values, expressive but parameter-heavy and prone to overfitting. We argue that the learnable functions are better placed in the \emph{structure} of the convolution than on each edge, and we organise the design space along a single axis: whether the function acts on the pixel \emph{values} or on the filter \emph{shape}. We study three realisations. SV-KAN applies one shared univariate function to the values and leaves the spatial filter free and static, aa classical convolution with a single learnable shared activation. AG-KAN keeps the shared value function but supplies the spatial structure through a content-adaptive Gaussian gate. RF-KAN instead moves the learnable functions onto the filter shape, building each filter from oriented ridge profiles expanded in a localised oscillatory (Morlet) wavelet basis with content-adaptive amplitudes. Under a matched four-layer protocol with in-run references and three seeds, RF-KAN and SV-KAN reach $88.47\pm0.10\%$ and $88.20\pm0.31\%$ on CIFAR-10 and $64.40\pm0.19\%$ and $64.57\pm0.30\%$ on CIFAR-100, at about $0.4$M parameters. At this matched scale the shape model and the simplest value model meet at the top, both above a plain convolution and every per-edge KAN we tested, including the official Gram variant, at roughly a fifth of the parameters. A controlled study attributes the RF-KAN gain to an intrinsically localised oscillatory basis and to content adaptivity, and an ablation that removes the learned shape entirely, leaving only the shared value function, collapses accuracy by over forty points, identifying the learned shape as the load-bearing ingredient at this scale.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将卷积柯尔莫哥洛夫-阿诺德网络(KANs)中的可学习函数从逐像素方式改为在滤波器结构上学习，并研究了三种实现方案：SV-KAN、AG-KAN和RF-KAN。
AI.motivation: 传统KAN在每个卷积核权重处附加可学习函数，参数量大且易过拟合。作者认为可学习函数应放在卷积的"结构"而非每个"边"上。
AI.method: 设计三种KAN变体：1) SV-KAN对像素值应用共享单变量函数，滤波器保持静态；2) AG-KAN保留共享值函数并添加内容自适应高斯门；3) RF-KAN将可学习函数移到滤波器形状上，使用局部振荡(Morlet)小波基构建。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10上RF-KAN和SV-KAN分别达到88.47%和88.20%，在CIFAR-100上达到64.40%和64.57%，参数量约0.4M。RF-KAN和SV-KAN在相同规模下性能相当，均优于普通卷积和官方Gram变体，参数量约为后者的五分之一。
AI.conclusion: RF-KAN的性能提升源于其固有局部振荡基和内容自适应特性。消融实验表明学习滤波器形状是核心要素，去除后准确率下降超过40个百分点。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KANs) for image classification on CIFAR datasets - purely about improving CNN architectures for image recognition. The application domain has NO overlap with Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. It doesn't address any of the pain points (video-to-3D motion extraction, VLM-based screening, visual-guided feature extraction, cross-modal alignment) and uses completely unrelated methods (KAN variants vs diffusion-based motion synthesis, VLMs, video generation models).

title: Solving Inverse Problems of Chaotic Systems with Bidirectional Conditional Flow Matching
summary: Modeling chaotic systems is crucial yet challenging. Inverse problems in chaotic dynamics, namely inferring initial conditions from final states, remain largely unsolved because of ill-posedness, non-uniqueness, instability, and potentially chaotic time-reverse dynamics. We address this open problem with Bidirectional Conditional Flow Matching (Bi-CFM), which learns bidirectional mappings between distributions of initial and final states to capture the stochasticity of chaotic evolution and mitigate exponential error accumulation over time. Furthermore, for systems with conservation laws, we extend it to Conservation-constrained Bi-CFM (CBi-CFM). Across the classic Lorenz, Circuit, and high-dimensional Lorenz 96 systems, Bi-CFM improves five distribution-level metrics over baselines while achieving a speedup of more than two orders of magnitude. In the three-body planet-planet scattering problem in planetary dynamics, CBi-CFM better respects conservation laws, with conservation errors comparable to those of the ground truth. Finally, on real observations of globular clusters, collisional million-body systems shaped by $\sim 10^{10}$ years (10 Gyr) of evolution, our method represents an advance in accuracy, establishing a scalable route to solving inverse problems of long-timescale real-world chaotic dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出双向条件流匹配(Bi-CFM)方法解决混沌动力学中的逆问题，即从最终状态推断初始条件。该方法学习初始状态和最终状态之间的双向映射，捕获混沌演化的随机性并减轻指数误差积累。对于满足守恒律的系统，进一步提出守恒约束的CBi-CFM。在Lorenz、Lorenz96系统和三体行星散射问题中验证了其有效性，并在真实球状星团观测中展示了可扩展的应用前景。
AI.motivation: 混沌动力学中的逆问题（从最终状态推断初始条件）长期未解决，因为本身是病态的、非唯一的、不稳定的，且时间反向动力学可能也是混沌的。现有方法在精度和效率上存在局限。
AI.method: 提出双向条件流匹配(Bi-CFM)，学习初始状态和最终状态分布之间的双向映射，捕获混沌演化的随机性并减轻指数误差积累。对于有守恒律的系统，扩展为守恒约束的CBi-CFM。
AI.result: 在经典Lorenz、电路和高维Lorenz96系统中，Bi-CFM在5个分布级指标上超越基线，且推理速度提升超过两个数量级。在三体行星-行星散射问题中，CBi-CFM较好地遵守守恒律，守恒误差与真实值相当。在球状星团的真实观测（碰撞百万天体系统，10 Gyr演化）中，该方法在精度上取得显著进展。
AI.conclusion: Bi-CFM/CBi-CFM为混沌动力学逆问题提供了高效、可扩展的解决方案，在保持守恒律的同时实现了高精度和快速推理，为解决真实世界中长时间尺度的混沌动力学逆问题开辟了可行路径。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant - this paper addresses inverse problems in chaotic dynamical systems (Lorenz attractors, three-body planetary scattering, globular clusters), which is in the domain of physics/dynamical systems simulation, not Computer Graphics or 3D Human Motion Generation. While both use flow matching/diffusion-like methods, the application domains are fundamentally different - this has nothing to do with text-to-motion generation, video-to-3D motion extraction, or visual-guided human motion synthesis. The paper deals with inferring initial conditions from final states in chaotic physics systems, entirely outside the scope of computer graphics and human animation.

title: MATCH: Flow Matching for Multi-View Anomaly Detection
summary: Detecting anomalies in industrial objects is an important topic for increasing production efficiency. More complex objects often require the analysis of several view points, which has led to the field of multi-view anomaly detection. We present MATCH, the first multi-view anomaly detection method based on Flow Matching (FM). With the ODE formulation of Flow Matching, we can estimate likelihoods and thereby derive an anomaly score to detect anomalies in multi-view image data at object, image, and pixel-level. The architectural flexibility of FM models allows us to efficiently transform features of different spatial sizes to the normal distribution. We evaluate thoroughly on the already established Real-IAD data set and are also the first to provide a comprehensive evaluation of popular anomaly detection methods for the MANTA-Tiny data set. MATCH achieves state-of-the-art performance in both anomaly detection and segmentation, all while running on consumer-level hardware. By omitting the costly divergence term needed for likelihood estimation, we ensure that MATCH is usable in real-time production scenarios. Lastly, several ablation studies are conducted to validate the methodological choices.

AI.tldr: MATCH是首个基于流匹配(Flow Matching)的多视角异常检测方法,能够在对象、图像和像素级别检测工业图像数据中的异常,在Real-IAD和MANTA-Tiny数据集上实现了最先进的异常检测和分割性能,且可在消费级硬件上实时运行。
AI.motivation: 工业生产中复杂对象通常需要从多个视角进行分析,以提高生产效率。现有方法缺乏专门针对多视角数据的异常检测方案,因此需要开发新的多视角异常检测方法。
AI.method: 利用流匹配的ODE公式估计似然性来推导异常评分,结合FM模型的架构灵活性高效处理不同空间大小的特征并将其转换为正态分布。通过省略昂贵的散度项实现实时性能。
AI.result: 在Real-IAD和MANTA-Tiny数据集上实现了最先进的异常检测和分割性能,能够在消费级硬件上运行,且可实时用于生产场景。
AI.conclusion: MATCH为工业异常检测提供了一种高效、准确的多视角解决方案,在性能和实用性之间取得了良好平衡,有望在实际生产环境中得到广泛应用。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The paper is about industrial anomaly detection in manufactured products using flow matching, while the research profile is about text-to-motion generation for 3D human motion in computer graphics. Even though both use "flow matching/diffusion" type methods, the application domains are entirely different - industrial quality control vs human motion synthesis. The paper addresses detecting defects in multi-view industrial images, not generating or extracting 3D human motion from video.

title: Difference-Making without Making a Difference
summary: Over a series of seven papers, Andreas & Günther have introduced seven definitions of actual causation and have classified them as belonging to three different, competing, types of accounts: factual difference-making, counterfactual difference-making, and regularity-based. I show that their most recent - factual difference-making - definition instantiates all three types, thereby proving that these are distinctions without a difference. I further compare their novel account to the other six accounts on several crucial examples, revealing that this undermines all seven of their accounts.

AI.tldr: 本文批判分析了Andreas & Günther系列论文中提出的七种因果关系定义，揭示这些定义之间的界限并不清晰。
AI.motivation: 旨在质疑因果关系理论中不同类型账户之间的区分是否真正具有本质差异。
AI.method: 通过比较分析和逻辑论证，检验最新定义与其他六个定义的关系。
AI.result: 发现factual difference-making定义同时涵盖三种类型，且所有七个定义都存在问题。
AI.conclusion: 这些看似不同的因果关系定义实为"没有区别的区别"，整个分类体系需要重新审视。

relevance_reason: This paper is about causal inference theory in philosophy - specifically analyzing Andreas & Günther's causal relationship definitions. It has no connection to Computer Graphics, Text-to-Motion, 3D Human Motion Generation, Video Generation Models, VLM, or any of the methods/pain points in the research profile. This is a philosophy paper completely unrelated to the computer graphics and motion generation domain.

title: Modality-Aware Out-of-Distribution Detection for Multi-Modal Action Recognition
summary: The incorporation of additional modalities into action recognition models increases their performance across a wide range of settings. However, how this additional information can contribute to making the models more robust remains underexplored, particularly for the case of multi-modal out-of-distribution (OOD) detection. While methods exist that regularize the multi-modal training process with OOD detection in mind, they still apply off-the-shelf OOD detectors designed for the uni-modal case during inference, discarding important information. Based on an interesting relationship we find between the multi-modal and uni-modal predictions, we propose to use this signal to build a post-hoc detector explicitly designed for the multi-modal scenario. We combine this new source of information with a feature-space score, which detects off-manifold samples in the multi-modal space, and normalize them by the multi-modal logits. In doing so, the proposed hybrid detector is compatible with existing training-time approaches and consistently improves performance. Experiments on a wide range of established datasets from the MultiOOD benchmark show that, on average, our approach outperforms the state of the art. Our results show the importance of explicitly considering the different modalities at inference time for multi-modal OOD detection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对多模态分布外检测的后验检测器，旨在解决现有方法在推理时丢弃多模态信息的问题。通过利用多模态与单模态预测之间的关系，结合特征空间分数和多模态logits归一化，在MultiOOD基准数据集上取得领先性能。
AI.motivation: 当前将额外模态融入动作识别模型的研究侧重于提升性能，但对如何使模型更鲁棒的关注不足，特别是多模态分布外(OOD)检测。现有的多模态训练正则化方法在推理时仍使用针对单模态设计的OOD检测器，丢弃了重要的多模态信息。
AI.method: 1. 发现多模态与单模态预测之间存在有趣的关系；2. 利用这一关系构建针对多模态场景的后验检测器；3. 将新信息源与特征空间分数结合(检测多模态空间中的离群样本)；4. 通过多模态logits进行归一化。
AI.result: 在MultiOOD基准的多个标准数据集上实验表明，该方法平均优于现有最佳方法，验证了在推理时显式考虑不同模态对多模态OOD检测的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法兼容现有的训练时方法且始终如一地提升性能，证明了在推理阶段显式考虑多模态信息的必要性，为多模态OOD检测提供了新的研究方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Multi-Modal Out-of-Distribution Detection for Action Recognition, which is a different application domain from Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. While both deal with human motion data, action recognition is a classification task (recognizing existing actions), whereas the research profile is about motion generation (creating new 3D motion from text). The paper does not address text-to-motion generation, visual-guided motion synthesis, or diffusion-based motion generation - the core methods in the profile. It uses multi-modal OOD detection which is unrelated to the pain points of 2D-to-3D motion extraction, VLM quality assessment, or cross-modal alignment between video and 3D motion space.

title: Accuracy and Satisfaction in Multi-Turn LLM Dialogues for NFR Assessment
comment: 9 pages, 5 figures. Accepted to SIGDIAL 2026 (27th Annual Meeting of the Special Interest Group on Discourse and Dialogue)
summary: LLM-based dialogue assistants have become mainstream tools for software developers, yet current evaluation benchmarks focus exclusively on functional correctness. This leaves a critical gap in assessing the quality and accuracy of these conversations when handling Non-Functional Requirements (NFRs), which are inherently vague, context-dependent, and involve many parts of a program. Evaluating how well these systems support collaborative reasoning about NFRs requires methods that go beyond single-turn accuracy to capture both the correctness of the system's outputs and the quality of the multi-turn interaction. In this paper, we investigate the accuracy and quality of multi-turn conversations between developers and an LLM-based agent in the domain of Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act (HIPAA) regulatory compliance. We hired 49 programmers to interact with GitHub Copilot to assess 148 HIPAA-derived NFRs against the iTrust codebase, a system designed to comply with HIPAA regulations, across three dimensions: requirement satisfaction level, reasoning, and code localization. We find that developers tend to agree with LLM assessments, but accuracy against expert ground truth is low. We model user satisfaction and find that longer system responses and more information-providing turns negatively affect user satisfaction, whereas proactive interactions positively affect it. Our findings provide insights for designing LLM-based dialogue systems that support NFR assessment.

AI.tldr: 本文研究LLM对话助手（如GitHub Copilot）在处理医疗保健领域非功能需求（NFRs）时的多轮对话质量，填补了当前评估基准仅关注功能正确性的空白。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM评估基准仅关注功能正确性，缺乏对非功能需求（NFRs）处理质量的评估。NFRs具有模糊性、上下文依赖性，涉及程序多个部分，需要多轮协作推理，因此需要新的评估方法来捕捉系统输出的正确性和多轮交互质量。
AI.method: 研究招募49名程序员与GitHub Copilot交互，评估148个HIPAA衍生的NFRs在iTrust代码库上的合规性，从需求满足水平、推理和代码定位三个维度进行评估，并建模用户满意度。
AI.result: 开发者倾向于同意LLM的评估结果，但与专家标准答案对比的准确率较低。研究发现更长的系统响应和信息提供轮次对用户满意度有负面影响，而主动交互则对满意度有正面影响。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为设计支持NFR评估的LLM对话系统提供了有价值的见解，表明需要在系统响应长度和交互主动性之间找到平衡，同时需要改进NFR评估的准确性。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about LLM dialogue systems for healthcare software requirements assessment (HIPAA compliance), which is entirely different from Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domains are completely different (healthcare software engineering vs. computer graphics), and it doesn't address any of the pain points (3D motion extraction from 2D video, visual-guided feature extraction, cross-modal alignment). Additionally, the paper studies LLMs (Large Language Models for text), not VLMs (Visual Language Models for images/video) mentioned in the research profile.

title: EgoSAT: A Comprehensive Benchmark of Egocentric Streaming Interaction Understanding
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026. Project page: https://leiyj23.github.io/EgoSAT/
summary: We introduce EgoSAT, the first comprehensive benchmark for egocentric video reasoning in streaming settings, designed to evaluate the capabilities of modern vision-language models (VLMs). The benchmark targets streaming interaction understanding, where video frames arrive sequentially and models must continuously interpret evolving visual context. EgoSAT unifies several previously distinct tasks within a single streaming framework. In this formulation, queries about completed events correspond to retrospective reasoning, queries about ongoing activities require online understanding, and queries about future actions involve prospective anticipation. This unified setting requires models to reason about the past, present, and future while operating under the constraint that only previously observed frames are available. EgoSAT contains 1,997 unique videos spanning 165 hours of egocentric footage and around 4,800 high-quality question-answer pairs, carefully designed to probe reasoning across varying temporal contexts. Using this benchmark, we evaluate a diverse set of both open-weight and closed-weight VLMs, providing a systematic assessment of their ability for streaming interaction understanding. By distinguishing answerability and conducting diagnostics on confidence of models, we find existing models not only struggle with prospective and retrospective modeling, but also exhibit severe mis-calibration: confidence often fails to track inherent answerability, leading to dangerous "confidently wrong" behaviors. Project page: https://leiyj23.github.io/EgoSAT/

AI.tldr: EgoSAT是首个针对流式设置下自我中心视频推理的综合基准，用于评估现代视觉语言模型(VLMs)的能力。该基准包含1,997个独特视频（约165小时自我中心 footage）和约4,800个高质量问答对，统一了回顾性推理、在线理解和前瞻性预测三种任务。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏专门评估视觉语言模型在流式交互理解方面能力的基准。之前的研究将各种任务分散处理，未能系统评估模型在连续帧到达时对过去、现在和未来事件的推理能力。此外，现有模型是否真正具备在流式设置下进行推理的能力尚不明确。
AI.method: 构建统一的流式框架，将回顾性推理（关于已完成事件的查询）、在线理解（关于正在进行活动的查询）和前瞻性预测（关于未来动作的查询）整合到单一基准中。对多种开源和闭源VLMs进行系统评估，并通过区分可回答性和模型置信度进行诊断分析。
AI.result: 现有模型不仅在前瞻性和回顾性建模方面存在困难，还表现出严重的校准不当问题：模型置信度往往无法追踪内在可回答性，导致出现危险的"自信但错误"行为。
AI.conclusion: 当前视觉语言模型尚未准备好进行流式交互理解，需要在时间推理能力和置信度校准方面进行显著改进。该基准为未来VLM研究提供了重要的评估标准和改进方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about egocentric video understanding and reasoning (analyzing/understanding what happens in first-person videos), not about 3D human motion generation. While both mention VLMs, the application domains are fundamentally different: the research profile focuses on generating 3D human motions from text/video (text-to-motion synthesis), while EgoSAT focuses on evaluating VLMs' reasoning capabilities about video content (understanding, prediction). The pain points in the profile are about motion extraction, quality assessment for motion generation, and cross-modal alignment for generating motion - none of which this paper addresses. The paper evaluates VLMs on video QA tasks, not on extracting 3D motion information or generating motions.

title: Grading the Grader: Lessons from Evaluating an Agentic Data Analysis System
summary: Agentic data analysis systems produce rich outputs, including code, numerical results, and verbal diagnostics. This makes them more challenging to evaluate than single-turn LLM responses. It is therefore necessary to distinguish genuine disagreement between an agent's output and a ground-truth answer from grading artifacts. We investigate how reliably automated graders assess such a system and what strategies improve grading quality by applying LAMBDA, a multi-agent data-analysis system, on 153 numerical QRData tasks from DSGym. We develop and evaluate a three-layer human-AI grading cascade: strict regex matching, LLM-based lenient grading, and snippet-based human inspection, which combines non-GenAI and GenAI strategies with different failure profiles. Both automated graders achieve 100% observed precision (0/70 false positives). The lenient grader's recall is 97% against human labels. A keyword-anchored extraction pipeline raises the strict grader's recall by 60 percentage points over a last-number heuristic; the lenient grader is architecturally parser-independent. An iterative nudge mechanism raises grading run success from 36% to 97% and lenient-pass rates from 16% to 46%; comparing nudging with and without original-question re-injection shows that re-injection offers no benefit, confirming the nudge as an answer template cue. We further observe in this case study that variable type is the task metadata field most consistently associated with grading pipeline dynamics and observed outcome grades.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了自动化评分系统在代理式数据分析系统(Agentic Data Analysis)上的效果，提出三层人机评分级联方案，在153个数值任务上达到100%精确率和97%召回率。
AI.motivation: 代理式数据分析系统产生丰富输出(代码、数值结果、口头诊断)，比单轮LLM响应更难评估。需要区分系统输出与真实答案的真正分歧与评分伪影。
AI.method: 在DSGym的153个数值QRData任务上应用多代理数据分析系统LAMBDA，开发三层人机评分级联：严格正则匹配、基于LLM的宽松评分、基于snippet的人工检查，结合非GenAI和GenAI策略。
AI.result: 两个自动化评分器均达到100%观察精确率(0/70误报)。宽松评分器对人工标签的召回率为97%。关键词锚定提取管道将严格评分器的召回率提升60个百分点。迭代nudge机制使评分运行成功率从36%提升到97%，宽松通过率从16%提升到46%。变量类型是与评分管道动态和观察结果最相关的任务元数据字段。
AI.conclusion: 自动化评分系统可有效评估代理式数据分析系统，三层评分级联结合非GenAI和GenAI策略能实现高质量评估。nudge机制是关键提升手段，而原始问题重注入无额外收益。变量类型是影响评分管道表现的重要因素。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about evaluating automated grading systems for agentic data analysis (numerical/tabular tasks), which has no connection to Computer Graphics or 3D Human Motion Generation. While it mentions LLM-based scoring, this is in a completely different application domain (data analysis/grading). The research profile focuses on text-to-motion synthesis, video-to-3D motion extraction, and visual-guided motion generation - not on grading numerical tasks. No mention of motion generation, computer graphics, video-to-3D, diffusion models for motion, or any related methods.

title: Transformation Behavior of Images in Latent Space
summary:
Training of neural networks for histopathology classification tasks typically relies on data encoding into latent space, which reduces complexity and improves performance. There are several encoder networks available, either pretrained on general image datasets such as ImageNET, or specifically on histopathological images. Training of encoder networks should be adapted to downstream tasks, allowing encoding of biologic/diagnostic content while rendering networks invariant to label-irrelevant transformations.
  This paper investigates the effect of classical image transformation on the latent space, using networks provided by Lunit Inc. and Bioptimus, both focusing on pathological images, and by Meta Research Team. We assess variance of embeddings resulting from standard data transformations by comparing original and transformed image embeddings and by contrasting them with random, unrelated embeddings, using image tiles from hematoxylin/eosin-stained sections available in a colorectal tissue dataset and the publicly accessible TCGA dataset.
  Our findings show that embeddings of original and transformed images are closer to each other than to random embeddings, indicating robustness to transformations. However, they are not fully invariant, revealing that the encoder networks do not completely neutralize transformation effects in latent space, explaining why transformation-mediated augmentation of datasets can improve performance. Significant differences were observed between general and histopathology-specific encoder networks.

AI.tldr: 研究病理图像编码器网络对图像变换的鲁棒性，评估原始图像与变换后图像的嵌入向量相似度
AI.motivation: 病理图像分类任务中，编码器网络需要捕获生物学/诊断相关信息，同时对标签无关的图像变换（如数据增强）保持不变性，以提升模型性能
AI.method: 使用Lunit、Bioptimus和Meta提供的病理专用及通用编码器网络，对结直肠组织和TCGA数据集的H&E染色切片进行变换，通过比较原始图像、变换图像和随机图像的嵌入向量相似度来评估鲁棒性
AI.result: 原始图像与变换图像的嵌入向量相似度高于随机嵌入向量，表明编码器具有一定鲁棒性但未完全实现变换不变性；病理专用编码器与通用编码器之间存在显著差异
AI.conclusion: 编码器网络无法完全消除变换对潜在空间的影响，这解释了基于变换的数据增强能够提升模型性能的现象

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about medical pathology image analysis (colorectal tissue, H&E stained sections) using encoders to study robustness to image transformations. The application domain is entirely different - medical imaging vs. 3D human motion generation in computer graphics. While both involve encoder networks and embeddings, they serve completely different purposes. This paper does not address any of the specified pain points (3D motion extraction from 2D video, VLM-based quality assessment, visual-guided feature extraction for motion models, or cross-modal alignment between video and 3D motion space). No connection to text-to-motion generation, diffusion-based motion synthesis, or visual language models for human motion applications.

title: Matching Tasks to Objectives: Fine-Tuning and Prompt-Tuning Strategies for Encoder-Decoder Pre-trained Language Models
summary: Prompt-based learning has emerged as a dominant paradigm in natural language processing. This study explores the impact of diverse pre-training objectives on the performance of encoder-decoder pre-trained language models across generation and question answering tasks, with a focus on commonsense knowledge retrieval and completion. We highlight the benefits of incorporating multiple objectives during both pre-training and fine-tuning stages. We introduce the Match Task to Objective (MTO) framework and methods for determining the appropriate objective for a given task. This framework offers automated methods to prepare task-related data for adaptation through unsupervised training, based on the identified objective. In the fine-tuning stage, we design novel templates that align with the objectives of the pre-training and adaptation stages. When aligned with task requirements, these strategies can achieve a performance gain of over 120\% compared to conventional methods in few-shot settings. They significantly outperform related works in few-shot settings and exceed the baseline even in full-dataset scenarios. Furthermore, we extend this approach to include prompt-tuning methodologies, providing guidance for more effective soft prompt engineering and optimization. Our strategies significantly enhance prompt-tuning performance as well. These insights hold substantial value, precisely guiding the selection and optimization of models customized for specific tasks. Code is available at https://github.com/puraminy/MTO/

AI.tldr: 本文提出MTO框架，通过匹配任务目标与预训练目标来提升encoder-decoder模型在生成和问答任务上的性能，特别是在少样本场景下性能提升超过120%。
AI.motivation: 当前预训练模型在不同预训练目标下的性能差异机制尚不明确，缺乏系统性的任务-目标匹配方法，导致模型选择和优化缺乏有效指导。
AI.method: 提出MTO框架，包括识别任务目标、自动化准备任务相关数据进行无监督适应、以及设计对齐预训练目标的模板；在微调阶段引入提示调优方法进行软提示工程优化。
AI.result: 少样本设置下性能提升超120%，显著优于相关工作；在全数据集场景下也超越基线；显著提升提示调优性能。
AI.conclusion: MTO框架能有效指导模型选择和任务特定优化，为特定任务定制模型的选型和优化提供实质性指导。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about NLP - specifically encoder-decoder pre-trained language models for text generation and QA tasks. It has no connection to Computer Graphics, 3D Human Motion Generation, video-to-motion extraction, visual-guided feature extraction, or any of the mentioned methods (diffusion-based motion synthesis, VLM for motion). The application domain is entirely different - pure NLP/text processing vs. text-to-motion in 3D graphics.

title: MedPCFM: Improving Medical Point Cloud Completion by Integrating Point Transformers and Flow Matching
summary: Medical point cloud completion is important for anatomical reconstruction and downstream clinical workflows, yet generative modeling in this setting remains insufficiently studied. We investigate completion through continuous-time generative modeling and introduce PCFM, a PTv3-backed flow matching approach for medical point cloud completion. We evaluate on SkullFix and SkullBreak, and additionally on the more recent Mandibular Defect dataset. We build strong baselines by adapting PTv3 to a deterministic encoder-decoder completion model and by instantiating diffusion completion (PCDiff) with both PVCNN and PTv3 denoisers. PCFM with PTv3 is competitive with the deterministic PTv3 baseline and achieves state-of-the-art generative performance across datasets, while requiring substantially fewer sampling steps than diffusion. At the best operating points, PTv3 also yields clear throughput gains, providing up to a 7$\times$ speed-up for PCFM compared to a PVCNN backbone. Finally, we study empirical scaling trends by varying model size and point cardinality, showing consistent gains with higher point resolution and informative trade-offs across model scales.

AI.tldr: 研究提出PCFM方法，利用连续时间生成模型进行医学点云补全，在SkullFix、SkullBreak和Mandibular Defect数据集上实现先进生成性能，比扩散模型需更少采样步骤，PTv3骨干可提速7倍。
AI.motivation: 医学点云补全对解剖重建和下游临床工作流重要，但该场景下的生成建模研究不足，需探索更高效的补全方法。
AI.method: 提出PCFM——基于PTv3的流匹配方法用于医学点云补全；构建PTv3确定性编码器-解码器基线和PCDiff扩散补全模型作为对比。
AI.result: PCFM+PTv3与确定性PTv3基线相当，在各数据集上实现先进生成性能；比扩散模型需显著更少采样步骤；PTv3提供最高7倍提速；更高点分辨率带来一致性能提升。
AI.conclusion: PCFM结合PTv3在医学点云补全任务上兼具高效性和生成质量，为该领域提供了有竞争力的解决方案。

relevance_reason: The paper addresses medical point cloud completion (healthcare/medical imaging domain) which is completely different from the research profile's focus on 3D human motion generation (computer graphics). Although both involve 3D point clouds and use diffusion/flow matching methods, the application domains are entirely unrelated. Medical point cloud completion for skull/jaw reconstruction has no connection to text-to-motion generation or human motion synthesis. This represents a fundamental domain mismatch where even similar methods cannot compensate for the wrong application area.

title: World Models in Pieces: Structural Certification for General Agents
summary: In the big-world regime, agents cannot be universally capable and their ability is inevitably specialized across a world model in pieces. Consequently, standard uniform guarantees fail to distinguish between the understanding of critical bottlenecks and irrelevant failures. We first formalize this limitation by proving that general agents are not universal, rendering standard worst-case analysis uninformative. To overcome this, we introduce structural certification, a transition-local framework that maps bounded goal-conditioned performance to entry-wise guarantees on the agent's internal world model. Our main contribution is constructive. We provide algorithms that filter specific transitions using deep compositional goals and prove that a general agent on these goals has a structural world model with a $\mathcal{O}(1/n) + \mathcal{O}(δ)$ error bound. Conversely, this bound is tight in the small-$δ$ regime, whose existence is explicitly guaranteed by our certification. These results enable the certifiable deployment of general agents by localizing the specific transitions where long-horizon planning is reliable.

AI.tldr: 本文研究大世界环境下通用智能体的能力局限性问题。研究者证明在big-world regime下，通用智能体并非真正"通用"的，其能力必然需要针对特定世界模型进行专业化。标准的最坏情况分析无法区分关键瓶颈与无关失败。为解决这一问题，论文提出结构性认证框架，通过深度组合目标过滤特定转换，使智能体在局部转换上具有可证明的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 在big-world regime下，智能体无法成为真正通用的万能选手，其能力必须在不同世界模型上进行专业化划分。传统的统一保证（如最坏情况分析）无法有效区分哪些是真正的关键瓶颈，哪些只是无关的失败。这导致无法可靠地部署通用智能体进行长程规划。
AI.method: 1. 形式化证明通用智能体不是真正通用的，这使得标准最坏情况分析失去信息量。2. 提出结构性认证（structural certification）框架，这是一个转换局部的框架，将有界目标条件性能映射到智能体内部世界模型的逐项保证。3. 提供使用深度组合目标过滤特定转换的算法。
AI.result: 证明具有深度组合目标的通用智能体具有结构化世界模型，误差界为O(1/n) + O(δ)。该界在小δ regime下是紧的，而小δ regime的存在由认证明确保证。这些结果使得可以通过局部化特定转换来可靠地部署通用智能体成为可能。
AI.conclusion: 论文通过结构性认证框架解决了big-world regime下通用智能体的可靠性证明问题，提供了一种将全局性能保证转化为局部转换保证的方法。这使得长程规划在特定转换上的可靠性可以得到认证，为通用智能体的可信赖部署奠定了理论基础。

relevance_reason: This paper is about AI agents, world models, and formal verification in theoretical computer science - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics and Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely different: it deals with general AI agents and structural certification, not motion generation, video-to-motion extraction, or visual-guided synthesis. It doesn't address any of the specified pain points (3D motion extraction from 2D video, VLM-based quality assessment, visual-guided feature extraction, or cross-modal alignment). No relevance to the research field.

title: S1-Omni-Image: A Unified Model for Scientific Image Understanding, Generation, and Editing
summary: We present S1-Omni-Image, an open-weight unified multimodal model for scientific image understanding, generation, and editing. Unlike general-purpose image generation models, scientific image tasks require not only high-fidelity synthesis, but also robust understanding of scientific semantics, structural relations, domain knowledge, and task intent. To this end, S1-Omni-Image builds on the scientific multimodal reasoning backbone S1-VL-32B and couples its understanding capability with an image generation module under a unified think-before-generate paradigm. Given a user instruction, the model first produces a task-oriented reasoning trace, a textual answer, and a task special token; their hidden states are then injected into the generation module to condition image generation or editing. S1-Omni-Image supports scientific image understanding, generation, and editing in a unified framework. For generation, it focuses on scientific illustrations and text rendering, including logical diagrams, relational comparisons, data charts, and realistic scientific visualizations. For editing, it casts segmentation and other domain-specific vision tasks as native image editing problems, enabling multi-turn illustration editing, medical and geographic image segmentation, medical image translation, and scientific image super-resolution. We construct SciGenEdit, a 314K-sample training dataset, and release the model weights, inference code, and SciGenEdit-10K. Experiments show that S1-Omni-Image substantially improves scientific image generation and editing while preserving the scientific image understanding capability inherited from S1-VL-32B. It outperforms open-source models on GenExam and TechImage-Bench, achieves state-of-the-art results on four editing benchmarks including MSD, cigRockSEM, SynthRAD2025, and IXI, and maintains stable performance on scientific image understanding evaluations.

AI.tldr: S1-Omni-Image是一个开源的统一多模态模型，专注于科学图像的理解、生成和编辑。它基于S1-VL-32B推理骨干，结合图像生成模块，采用"先思考后生成"的范式，支持科学图像的多种任务。
AI.motivation: 科学图像任务不仅需要高保真合成，还需要理解科学语义、结构关系、领域知识和任务意图。现有通用图像生成模型无法满足这些需求。
AI.method: 基于S1-VL-32B科学多模态推理骨干，结合图像生成模块，采用统一的think-before-generate范式。模型先产生任务导向推理轨迹、文本答案和任务特殊token，其隐藏状态注入生成模块进行条件图像生成或编辑。
AI.result: 在GenExam和TechImage-Bench上优于开源模型；在MSD、cigRockSEM、SynthRAD2025和IXI四个编辑基准上达到最先进水平；并保持稳定的科学图像理解能力。
AI.conclusion: S1-Omni-Image在科学图像生成和编辑方面显著提升，同时保留了继承自S1-VL-32B的科学图像理解能力，为科学图像领域提供了统一的解决方案。

relevance_reason: Complete application domain mismatch. The paper is about scientific IMAGE understanding, generation and editing, while the research profile is about 3D HUMAN MOTION generation (text-to-motion). Even though both use VLMs, the paper doesn't address any motion generation tasks - it's purely about image synthesis for scientific/medical images. No overlap in pain points (motion extraction, quality assessment for motion, visual-guided feature extraction for motion models, 2D video to 3D motion alignment) and completely different target output (images vs 3D human motion).

title: OpenThoughts-Agent: Data Recipes for Agentic Models
summary: Agentic language models dramatically expand the applications of AI yet little is publicly known about how to curate training data for broadly capable agents. Existing open efforts such as SWE-Smith, SERA, and Nemotron-Terminal typically target a single benchmark, leaving open the question of how to train models that generalize across diverse agentic tasks. The OpenThoughts-Agent (OT-Agent) project addresses this gap with a fully open data curation pipeline for training agentic models. We conduct more than 100 controlled ablation experiments to systematically investigate each stage of the pipeline, yielding insights on the importance of task sources and diversity. We then assemble a training set of 100K examples from our pipeline and fine-tune Qwen3-32B on this dataset, which yields an average accuracy of 44.8% across seven agentic benchmarks and a 3.9 percentage point improvement over the strongest existing open data agentic model (Nemotron-Terminal-32B, 40.9%). Moreover, our training data exhibits strong scaling properties, outperforming alternative open datasets at every training set size in compute-controlled comparisons. We publicly release our training sets, data pipeline, experimental data, and models at openthoughts.ai to support future open research on agentic model training.

AI.tldr: OT-Agent项目通过完全开放的数据策展流程训练智能体模型，使用100K样本微调Qwen3-32B，在七个智能体基准测试中平均准确率达44.9%，比现有最强开源模型Nemotron-Terminal-32B提升3.9个百分点，且展现出良好的规模化特性。
AI.motivation: 现有开源智能体训练数据工作（如SWE-Smith、SERA、Nemotron-Terminal）通常只针对单一基准，缺乏能够泛化到多种智能体任务的训练数据策展方法。
AI.method: 通过100多次控制变量消融实验系统研究数据策展流程的每个阶段，评估任务来源和多样性的重要性，最终组装10万样本的训练集并微调Qwen3-32B模型。
AI.result: 在七个智能体基准测试中平均准确率达44.8%，比Nemotron-Terminal-32B（40.9%）提升3.9个百分点；在受控计算比较中，训练数据在各个训练集规模下均优于其他开源数据集。
AI.conclusion: OT-Agent项目提供了首个完全开放的智能体模型训练数据策展流程和数据集，证明多样化任务来源的重要性，并展现出良好的规模化特性，为智能体模型的开源研究提供了重要资源。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about training agentic AI models (LLM agents) for benchmark tasks, while the research profile is specifically about Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. The paper addresses data curation for LLM agents, not 3D human motion generation, video-to-motion extraction, visual-guided feature extraction, or any computer graphics task. No overlap in application domain or methods.

title: P-MTP: Efficient Document Parsing via Multi-Token Prediction with Progressive Depth Scaling
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have revolutionized document parsing by enabling end-to-end mapping from images to structured text, imposing a significant latency bottleneck, particularly for token-dense documents. While Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) has emerged as a promising approach for accelerating inference, its potential is constrained by optimization instability when scaling to deeper look-ahead depth. In this paper, we propose \textbf{P-MTP}, a framework that leverages \textbf{Progressive Multi-Token Prediction} with a lightweight MTP module to scale the look-ahead depth for high-throughput document parsing. Specifically, we introduce Progressive Curriculum Loss that adaptively re-weights different look-ahead depths using cumulative path reliability and retrospective target consistency. By effectively suppressing gradient noise in long-range predictions, P-MTP, facilitates an automated easy-to-hard optimization transition, enabling the model to master increasingly distant look-ahead depths. Furthermore, we propose Confidence-Gated Dynamic Drafting to maximize the effective look-ahead depth and acceptance rate by adaptively calibrating speculative length during inference, thereby minimizing computational waste and further pushing the boundaries of inference speedup. Experimental results across multiple benchmarks and architectures demonstrate that P-MTP, achieves up to a $5\times$ speedup with negligible loss in accuracy, providing the first successful validation of extensive look-ahead MTP in the document parsing domain.

AI.tldr: P-MTP是一种针对文档解析的渐进式多令牌预测框架，通过轻量级MTP模块扩展look-ahead深度，结合渐进课程损失和置信度门控动态草稿实现高达5倍推理加速。
AI.motivation: VLMs在文档解析中实现端到端映射但存在显著延迟瓶颈，特别是对于token密集型文档。现有多令牌预测(MPT)方法在扩展look-ahead深度时存在优化不稳定问题。
AI.method: 提出两种关键技术：1)渐进课程损失使用累积路径可靠性和回顾目标一致性自适应重新加权不同look-ahead深度；2)置信度门控动态草稿在推理时自适应调整投机长度。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试和架构上实现高达5倍推理加速，精度损失可忽略不计，首次成功验证了在文档解析领域扩展look-ahead MTP的可行性。
AI.conclusion: P-MTP通过渐进式easy-to-hard优化转换和动态推理策略，有效解决了MTP在文档解析中的优化不稳定问题，为高吞吐量文档解析提供了高效的加速方案。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about document parsing (OCR-like task) using Multi-Token Prediction (MTP) for LLM inference acceleration. The application domain is entirely different - it's in NLP/document understanding, not 3D human motion generation or computer graphics. While both mention VLM, the paper uses VLM for document processing while the research profile needs VLM for motion-related tasks (video-to-motion extraction). The methods are also different - this is about LLM optimization, not diffusion-based motion synthesis or visual-guided feature extraction for motion generation.

title: SENTRY: SAM2-Enhanced Neighbor-Aware and Temporally Reasoned Memory for Visual Tracking
comment: Accepted for publication at the European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV 2026)
summary: We revisit the memory update mechanism in SAM2-based visual object tracking and identify confidence-only mask selection as the dominant cause of drift under occlusion, rapid motion, and distractors. We introduce SENTRY, a training-free, plug-and-play, refine-before-write module that validates each memory update for short-horizon temporal consistency before committing it. SENTRY aggregates diverse segmentation hypotheses per frame, backtracks them into short tracklets, and uses neighbor-aware cycle-consistent matching against recent trajectories to favor temporally and geometrically consistent masks. It leaves the base architecture untouched, replacing confidence-driven writes with consistency-validated ones. For fair evaluation, we re-evaluate major open-source SAM2-based trackers across all available scales and datasets, filling gaps in prior reports. Integrated into five strong baselines, SENTRY delivers consistent gains across nine benchmarks, achieving new zero-shot SOTA on LaSOT, LaSOT_ext, GOT-10k, VOT20, VOT22, and DiDi. Despite these checks, the SAM2-L version runs at 32.8 FPS on an A100, and across compatible hosts adds only about 0.4--0.6 GB VRAM. Our results provide the first unified all-scale evaluation of SAM2-based trackers and show that enforcing temporal validity at write time stabilizes memory-augmented tracking without retraining.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SENTRY模块，解决SAM2跟踪器在遮挡、快速运动和干扰物下的漂移问题。该模块通过验证记忆更新的时间一致性来选择掩码，而非仅依赖置信度。
AI.motivation: SAM2跟踪器的记忆更新机制采用置信度-only的掩码选择策略，导致在遮挡、快速运动和干扰物下出现漂移，这是当前方法的主要瓶颈。
AI.method: SENTRY是一个无需训练、即插即用的模块，在写入记忆前验证短时域时间一致性。它聚合每帧的多样化分割假设，将它们回溯为短轨迹，并使用邻域感知的循环一致性匹配来选择时间 和几何一致的掩码。
AI.result: 集成到五个基线模型中，SENTRY在九个基准上取得一致性提升，在LaSOT、LaSOT_ext、GOT-10k、VOT20、VOT22和DiDi上实现新的零样本SOTA。SAM2-L在A100上运行速度为32.8 FPS，仅增加0.4-0.6 GB VRAM。
AI.conclusion: 在写入时强制执行时间有效性可以稳定记忆增强跟踪，且无需重新训练。SENTRY是首个统一的全尺度评估方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about visual object tracking using SAM2 in computer vision, which is completely unrelated to the research profile's field of Computer Graphics - Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation. The application domains are entirely different: one deals with tracking 2D objects in video sequences, while the other focuses on generating 3D human skeletal motions from text or video inputs. The methods (SAM2 segmentation, temporal memory modules) and pain points (tracking drift under occlusion) have no overlap with the target research area's methods (diffusion-based motion synthesis, VLM, visual-guided feature extraction for 3D motion generation) and pain points (cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion space).

title: Lite Any Stereo V2: Faster and Stronger Efficient Zero-Shot Stereo Matching
summary: Recent advances in stereo matching have achieved remarkable accuracy, but often rely on large models, heavy computation, or additional foundation-model priors, making them difficult to deploy on resource-constrained platforms. In contrast, efficient stereo models offer faster inference but are commonly considered less capable of strong zero-shot generalization. In this paper, we challenge this assumption by introducing Lite Any Stereo V2 (LAS2), an ultra-fast model series designed for efficient zero-shot stereo matching. LAS2 is developed from both architecture and training perspectives. Architecturally, we revisit efficient stereo design under practical deployment settings and propose a 2D-only cost aggregation framework, optimized for real inference latency rather than theoretical MACs alone. For training, we develop a three-stage strategy that combines synthetic supervision, self-distillation, and real-world knowledge distillation. To improve the reliability of real-world pseudo supervision, we further introduce pseudo-label filtering and an error-clamping operation, enabling smoother synthetic-to-real transfer. We instantiate LAS2 as a family of models, including feed-forward variants for different efficiency budgets and an iterative variant for higher accuracy. Extensive experiments show that LAS2 achieves state-of-the-art accuracy among efficient stereo methods while maintaining significantly lower latency. Specifically, LAS2-H achieves stronger overall zero-shot performance than the iterative method Fast-FoundationStereo, with 1.8x and 2.7x faster inference on H200 and Orin, respectively. The project page, demos, and code are available at https://tomtomtommi.github.io/LiteAnyStereoV2/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LAS2，一种超快速的高效零样本立体匹配模型系列，通过2D成本聚合架构和三阶段训练策略，在高效 stereo 方法中达到最优精度，且比Fast-FoundationStereo快1.8-2.7倍。
AI.motivation: 现有高效stereo模型虽推理速度快但零样本泛化能力弱，作者希望挑战这一假设，证明高效模型也可实现强大的零样本泛化。
AI.method: 架构上提出针对实际推理延迟优化的2D成本聚合框架；训练上采用合成监督、自蒸馏和真实知识蒸馏的三阶段策略，并引入伪标签过滤和误差限制操作。
AI.result: LAS2在高效stereo方法中达到最优零样本精度；LAS2-H比迭代方法Fast-FoundationStereo精度更高，在H200和Orin上分别快1.8倍和2.7倍。
AI.conclusion: 高效模型可实现强大的零样本泛化，LAS2在精度和速度之间取得良好平衡，适合资源受限平台部署。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation (generating human character animations from text/video), while the paper is about Stereo Matching (depth estimation from stereo image pairs for autonomous driving/3D reconstruction). Although both are in computer vision/graphics, stereo matching for depth estimation has virtually no relevance to human motion generation. The pain points (3D motion extraction from video, cross-modal alignment for motion, VLM-based quality assessment) are not addressed at all. Methods like 2D cost aggregation for disparity estimation are fundamentally different from diffusion-based motion synthesis or visual-guided feature extraction for human motion generation.

title: Boosting Text-Driven Video Segmentation via Geometry-Aware Distillation
summary: Text-driven Referring Video Object Segmentation (RVOS) aims to locate and segment target objects in videos given natural language. However, existing models are typically trained on 2D image or video datasets with naive segmentation losses, which overlooks the geometric consistency across frames and leads to weak spatial understanding. In this paper, we propose Geometry-enhanced Language-guided Video segmentation (GeoLaV), a two-stage framework that distills 3D geometric knowledge from images to enhance text-driven video segmentation. In the first stage, we perform monocular geometry pretraining with monocular novel-view synthesis, enabling the model to acquire geometry-consistent visual representations via spatial alignment on large-scale single-image datasets. In the second stage, we introduce geometry-aware distillation and fine-tune the model on video segmentation datasets, transferring 3D structural knowledge from a general 3D prior model. This process reinforces 3D awareness and improves both spatiotemporal coherence and language grounding in segmentation. Extensive experiments show that our method using only image segmentation data already provides notable zero-shot generalization in RVOS. When combined with geometry-aware distillation for fine-tuning on videos, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple RVOS benchmarks. The code is available at https://github.com/Tony1882880/GeoLaV.

AI.tldr: GeoLaV是一个两阶段框架，通过从图像中提取3D几何知识来增强文本驱动的视频目标分割。它首先在单图像数据集上进行单目几何预训练，然后进行几何感知蒸馏，在视频分割数据集上进行微调。
AI.motivation: 现有的文本驱动引用视频分割(RVOS)模型通常在2D图像或视频数据集上训练，使用简单的分割损失，忽略了帧间的几何一致性，导致空间理解能力较弱。
AI.method: 第一阶段：单目几何预训练 - 使用单目新视角合成，使模型通过大规模单图像数据集上的空间对齐获得几何一致的视觉表示。第二阶段：几何感知蒸馏 - 将3D结构知识从通用3D先验模型迁移到视频分割数据集上，增强3D感知并提高时空一致性和语言定位能力。
AI.result: 仅使用图像分割数据就能在RVOS中实现显著的零样本泛化。当结合几何感知蒸馏进行视频微调时，在多个RVOS基准数据集上达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过两阶段几何增强框架，成功地将3D几何知识从图像迁移到视频分割任务，显著提升了文本驱动视频分割的性能和泛化能力。

relevance_reason: Wrong application domain. The paper focuses on text-driven video object segmentation (RVOS), which is fundamentally different from text-to-motion generation in 3D human motion synthesis. While both involve text-guided video analysis, they address completely different tasks - segmentation vs motion generation. Although the paper does extract 3D geometry from 2D images (related to pain point #1), this is for segmentation rather than human motion synthesis. The methods (geometry-aware distillation for segmentation) differ from the profile's methods (diffusion-based motion synthesis, VLM for motion generation).

title: video-SALMONN-R$^3$: Learning to ReWatch, ReAsk, and ReAnswer for Efficient Video Understanding
summary: Video large language models (LLMs) are often constrained by computation and memory budgets, leading them to use reduced frame rates and spatial resolutions, which may cause them to miss critical information for question answering (QA). A practical and efficient solution is a two-stage paradigm: first perform coarse video understanding to localize relevant segments, and then re-watch these segments at higher temporal or spatial fidelity. In this paper, we present video-SALMONN-R$^3$, the first end-to-end video-LLM that enables re-watch through reinforcement learning without relying on chain-of-thought (CoT) cold-start. This design removes the need for costly CoT data annotations and avoids CoT-based supervised fine-tuning (SFT), which can otherwise degrade the pretrained video understanding abilities. To address the mismatch between the reasoning-first behavior induced by re-watch and the answer-first tendency of pretrained video-LLMs, we propose a re-answer strategy, in which the model first produces a direct answer in the first watch and then refines it after re-watching. Finally, to improve question adherence during re-watching, we propose a re-ask mechanism that re-injects the query when revisiting localized segments. Experimental results show that video-SALMONN-R$^3$ consistently outperforms both the base model and the QA-SFT baseline, while surpassing prior re-watch-based approaches with significantly lower computational cost. Code, models, and data will be publicly released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出video-SALMONN-R³，首个端到端的视频大语言模型，通过强化学习实现"重看"机制，无需链式思考冷启动。
AI.motivation: 视频LLM受计算和内存预算限制，常使用降低的帧率和空间分辨率，导致问答时可能遗漏关键信息。
AI.method: 提出两阶段范式：先进行粗粒度视频理解定位相关片段，再以更高时空分辨率重看这些片段。引入重答策略使模型首次观看直接给出答案，重看后修正；引入重问机制在重看时重新注入查询。
AI.result: 一致优于基线模型和QA-SFT基线，超越先前重看方法且计算成本显著降低。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了无需CoT冷启动即可实现有效的重看推理，为高效视频问答提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: The paper is about Video Understanding/Video QA for Video LLMs (learning to rewatch, reask, reanswer for efficient video understanding), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics - specifically 3D Human Motion Generation from text-to-motion. These are completely different application domains. The paper addresses video question answering and understanding, not 3D motion extraction from 2D video or motion generation. Although both papers mention VLMs, they are used for entirely different purposes - video QA vs. motion generation. The pain points are unrelated (video understanding vs. cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion space).

title: MambaRaw: Selective State Space Modeling for Efficient 4K Raw Image Reconstruction
summary: In-camera JPEG previews are ubiquitous in raw image formats and provide an sRGB reference at negligible storage cost. Although existing metadata-based reconstruction frameworks can exploit this side information when recovering raw images, their context models often become computationally expensive especially at high resolution, eg, 4K raw image, given that attention mechanisms scale quadratically with feature maps, hindering its practical application. To address these limitations, we propose MambaRaw, a JPEG-conditioned metadata-based raw image reconstruction framework that uses State Space Models (SSMs) to estimate entropy parameters efficiently. Our key contribution comprises a Spatial-Energy Coupled Context Modeling mechanism with two lightweight modules: (1) TileMambaBlock, which performs Mamba-style selective scanning only on information-dense tiles to improve the efficiency; and (2) Energy-Aware Refinement (EAR), an identity-initialized residual module that enhance feature representation to match the long-tail energy distribution of raw signals. Extensive experiments on three camera datasets (Sony, Olympus, Samsung) show consistent improvements over strong metadata-based baselines and set a new state of the art for JPEG-guided raw reconstruction with great efficiency. Notably, at low metadata bitrates, MambaRaw increases PSNR by 1.2--1.4 dB and reduces end-to-end coding latency by about 9%. Code is released at https://github.com/Peizeli1/MambaRaw.

AI.tldr: 提出了MambaRaw框架，利用状态空间模型(SSMs)从JPEG预览图高效重建原始raw图像，解决了高分辨率下注意力机制计算成本高的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有元数据重建框架在处理高分辨率(如4K)图像时，注意力机制的计算复杂度呈二次方增长，导致实际应用受限，需要更高效的上下文建模方法。
AI.method: 提出空间能量耦合上下文建模机制，包含两个轻量模块：1) TileMambaBlock使用Mamba风格选择扫描仅处理信息密集块；2) Energy-Aware Refinement身份初始化残差模块匹配raw信号的长尾能量分布。
AI.result: 在Sony、Olympus、Samsung三个相机数据集上相比强基线方法取得一致提升，PSNR增加1.2-1.4 dB，编解码延迟降低约9%，在低元数据比特率下效果显著。
AI.conclusion: MambaRaw在JPEG引导的raw图像重建任务中达到了新的最先进水平，具有出色的效率优势，为元数据压缩提供了一种有效方案。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile requires 3D human motion generation from text/video (motion synthesis), while this paper is about raw image reconstruction from JPEG previews (image enhancement). The paper addresses high-resolution image reconstruction quality, not motion generation or cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion. Although both use neural network methods, SSMs/Mamba for image processing is fundamentally different from the required methods (diffusion models, VLM, video generation models) for text-to-motion generation. No pain points from the research profile are addressed.

title: Advancing WordArt-Oriented Scene Text Recognition: Datasets and Methods
summary: WordArt (artistic text) features highly customized fonts, textures, and layouts, making WordArt-oriented scene TExt Recognition (WATER) substantially more challenging than general Scene Text Recognition (STR). Existing STR datasets and methods, typically built around regular scene text and fixed-template inputs, struggle to scale to WATER. Thus, we aim to advance this task from both data and model perspectives. On the data side, we construct a 2M synthetic dataset, WATER-S, with the scale improved by hundreds of times compared to existing artistic text data. WATER-S consists of two complementary subsets. One rendered by an upgraded rendering pipeline (SynthWordArt), which provides highly accurate and controllable synthetic WordArt data. The other is generated by combining Qwen3-VL for prompt mining and Z-Image for image synthesis, which improves the coverage of realistic and diverse data. On the model side, we propose WATERec. It adopts an visual encoder supporting arbitrary-shaped inputs and an autoregressive decoder to model complex layouts, structurally breaking the bottleneck of fixed-template STR on WordArt. Experiments show that this architecture outperforms prior STR methods, achieving state-of-the-art performance on irregular texts such as WordArt. Together with WATER-R, carefully reorganized from existing real STR data, our strong baseline with the new synthetic data and model design reaches 90.40% accuracy on WordArt-Bench, surpassing both general-purpose and OCR-specialized vision-language models by a large margin. Code and data are available at https://github.com/YesianRohn/WATER.

AI.tldr: WATER是一个新兴的WordArt（艺术字）场景文字识别任务，比普通场景文字识别（STR）更具挑战性。研究者构建了200万规模的合成数据集WATER-S，并提出了WATERec模型，在WordArt-Bench上达到90.40%的准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有的STR数据集和方法主要针对规则场景文字和固定模板输入，难以扩展到WordArt任务。WordArt具有高度定制化的字体、纹理和布局，需要新的数据和方法来推动该领域发展。
AI.method: 数据方面：构建了WATER-S合成数据集，包含两个子集——使用升级版渲染管道SynthWordArt生成的高精度可控合成数据，以及结合Qwen3-VL提示挖掘和Z-Image图像合成的多样化真实数据。模型方面：提出WATERec模型，采用支持任意形状输入的视觉编码器和自回归解码器来建模复杂布局。
AI.result: WATERec架构优于现有STR方法，在WordArt等不规则文字上达到最先进的性能。结合重新整理的WATER-R真实数据，新合成数据和模型设计在WordArt-Bench上达到90.40%的准确率，显著超越通用视觉语言模型和专用OCR模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过大规模合成数据和创新模型架构的结合，成功推动了WordArt识别任务的发展，为该领域建立了强大的基线方法。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about WordArt text recognition (OCR) - extracting text from images. The research profile needs text-to-motion generation for 3D human motion, which involves generating 3D human motion from text/video inputs. While both use Visual Language Models, the application domains are entirely different: OCR/text recognition vs 3D human motion synthesis. The pain points are also unrelated - this paper doesn't address 3D motion extraction, visual-guided feature extraction for motion models, or cross-modal alignment between 2D video and 3D motion space.

title: RetiSEM: Generalising Causal Models for Fragmented Biomedical Data
summary: Learning causal models from fragmented biomedical data is challenging because clinical, molecular, and imaging variables are often incomplete or not jointly observed. We propose RetiSEM, a domain-constrained structural equation modelling (SEM) framework for causal graph recovery and mediation analysis under limited multimodal resources. This proposed work organises variables into biologically informed blocks, applies forbidden-edge constraints, and decomposes pathway-level effects into TE, NDE, and NIE components. We evaluate RetiSEM across ten synthetic benchmark scenarios that vary in dimensionality, nonlinearity, causal depth, and pathway structure, together with a fragmented real-world setting that combines NHANES clinical variables with externally derived retinal representations. This approach achieves lower structural error and higher causal accuracy than unconstrained baselines across the synthetic benchmarks. In the real-data analysis, retinal variables behave mainly as downstream biomarker-like indicators, with smaller but detectable indirect effects. These findings support our strategy as an interpretable framework for testing structured causal hypotheses in limited-resource biomedical AI. The code and resources for this work are publicly available at: https://github.com/Inamullah-Colab/ReitSEM.

AI.tldr: RetiSEM是一个领域约束的结构方程模型(SEM)框架，用于在多模态数据有限的情况下进行因果图恢复和中介分析。
AI.motivation: 从碎片化生物医学数据学习因果模型具有挑战性，因为临床、分子和影像变量通常不完整或无法联合观测。
AI.method: 将变量组织成生物学信息块，应用禁止边约束，并将通路级效应分解为总效应(TE)、自然直接效应(NDE)和自然间接效应(NIE)成分。在十个合成基准场景和结合NHANES临床变量与外部视网膜表示的真实碎片化环境中进行评估。
AI.result: 在合成基准测试中达到比无约束基线更低的结构误差和更高的因果准确性。真实数据分析显示视网膜变量主要作为下游生物标志物指示物，间接效应较小但可检测。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为有限资源生物医学AI中测试结构化因果假设提供了一个可解释的框架。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about biomedical causal inference (Structural Equation Models) for fragmented clinical/medical imaging data - completely different field from Computer Graphics. The paper deals with clinical variables, retinal imaging, and causal graph recovery in biomedical domain, not 3D human motion generation. No overlap in application domain, methods (SEM vs diffusion-based motion synthesis), or research area.

title: VistaRef: Boosting Visual Spatial Orientation Awareness for Pointing-to-Object Detection
summary: Grounding deictic gestures in natural images is fundamental to AR and human-robot collaboration, providing a basis for seamless spatial interaction. While Transformer-based visual models have achieved significant progress in general object detection, their global attention mechanisms often neglect micro-geometric relationships, degrading orientation accuracy. In pointing tasks, this deficiency manifests as an inability to accurately capture the pointing ray implied by finger poses, which results in pointing drift and localization ambiguity when dealing with distant or densely packed objects. To address this, we propose VistaRef, a framework designed to explicitly enhance spatial orientation awareness. First, we develop the Local Hand Entity Modeling (LHEM) module, which incorporates hand-pose embeddings to strengthen the model's capability to capture subtle finger deviations. Second, drawing inspiration from multi-view geometry, we construct the Geometric Ray Modeling (GRM) module to transform implicit orientation information into explicit spatial geometric features, guiding feature aggregation and deep fusion via attention mechanisms. Furthermore, we introduce a novel Orientation-Consistent Alignment Loss (OCAL) to synergistically supervise hand presence and pointing consistency, ensuring that all architectural improvements collectively serve the core objective of spatial localization. Experimental results demonstrate that VistaRef significantly outperforms the baseline, achieving a 14-point absolute gain in grounding accuracy. Qualitative analysis further confirms that VistaRef effectively models the geometric correlation from hand to target, bridging the spatial perception gap inherent in traditional Transformers for complex scenarios. Code: https://github.com/lingli1724/VistaRef.

AI.tldr: VistaRef是一个用于自然图像中指示手势定位的框架,通过局部手部实体建模、几何射线建模和方向一致性对齐损失来增强空间方向感知能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的Transformer视觉模型全局注意力机制常忽略微观几何关系,导致无法准确捕捉手指姿态暗示的指向射线,在处理遥远或密集物体时出现指向漂移和定位模糊,影响AR和人机协作中的空间交互。
AI.method: 提出三模块框架:(1)LHEM模块融入手部姿态嵌入以增强捕捉细微手指偏差;(2)GRM模块受多视图几何启发,将隐式方向信息转化为显式空间几何特征,通过注意力机制引导特征聚合和深度融合;(3)OCAL损失协同监督手部存在和指向一致性。
AI.result: VistaRef显著优于基线模型,在定位精度上获得14个百分点的绝对提升,定性分析证实其有效建模了从手到目标的几何相关性。
AI.conclusion: VistaRef通过显式增强空间方向感知能力,弥合了传统Transformer在复杂场景下的空间感知差距,为AR和人机协作中的无缝空间交互提供了基础。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper (VistaRef) is about pointing gesture detection/localization in 2D natural images for AR and human-computer interaction - a computer vision task. The research profile is about Text-to-Motion in 3D Human Motion Generation - a computer graphics task focused on generating 3D human motion. Both involve hand gestures but in completely different application domains: one detects WHERE someone points in an image, the other GENERATES 3D human motion sequences. The methods also differ: the paper uses hand pose embedding and geometric ray modeling, while the profile uses video generation models, VLMs, and diffusion-based motion synthesis. No alignment with any of the four pain points (3D motion extraction from 2D video, quality assessment, visual-guided features, cross-modal alignment).

title: GeoIMO: Geometry-Driven Independent Motion Classification for Event Cameras
summary: Existing automotive event datasets rely on appearance-based annotations from frame pipelines, making them poorly suited for motion-aware event perception. We present a geometry-driven, annotation-free framework that classifies detected objects as static or independently moving by exploiting ego-motion structure directly from the event stream. A Focus of Expansion model with yaw compensation estimates global background motion, while objects are labeled as moving when local motion deviates from this prediction, as quantified by a scale-invariant residual. Temporal stabilization improves robustness across consecutive event windows. The method requires no learning, no manual motion labels, and works with any input bounding boxes. Experiments on MVSEC and the Prophesee 1 Megapixel Automotive Detection dataset demonstrate consistent performance across diverse driving scenarios, with yaw compensation improving results during turns and a simple translational local model offering a favorable accuracy-efficiency trade-off.
